**Not so long from now... In a galaxy 🌌 close by...**
**You’re invited to our GOTV Phonebank with Mark Hamill on Saturday, March 2nd, at 4pm PST!**
Joining us to make calls with Star Wars star Mark Hamill himself is one of the most impactful things you can do right now to ensure that Adam wins on Election Day. The Force is strong with this event and you’re not going to want to miss it!
**[Can Adam count on you to sign up for our upcoming GOTV phone bank with Mark Hamill?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3992?t=4&akid=5825%2E5257348%2E0yJVAW)**
[RSVP](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3992?t=5&akid=5825%2E5257348%2E0yJVAW)
---
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3992?t=6&akid=5825%2E5257348%2E0yJVAW)
The great thing about making calls is that it’s fun and easy. You can do it from just about anywhere.
**_Right now_ is the *single* most important time to volunteer with our campaign. Will you RSVP right now?**
[RSVP](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3992?t=7&akid=5825%2E5257348%2E0yJVAW)

We can’t wait to see you soon!
— Team Schiff 💙

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Shabbat shalom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Shabbat Shalom, friend.
I wanted to reach out quickly before I sit down for dinner.
Throughout my time in public service, I’ve been guided by the Jewish concept of “Tikkun Olam,” or acting with kindness to repair the world.

I firmly believe that if we all come together, we can accomplish great things and build a better world for our kids and generations to come. It’s why I work so hard each day – and it’s why I’m running for reelection.

It’s such a blessing to have people like you on my team. When Democrats defy the odds and protect our Senate majority this year, it will be because people like you are committed to making positive change.
**So if you’re able, I’d be grateful if you could chip in your first $5 – or whatever amount makes sense for you – to my campaign tonight. You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_email_march_2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80128701/458458636/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3509-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmExOTYzMi0yOWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiyoIHgesOEni93k8ZFvOa2x5MNW4ZODn0mECJ7B2RY=)

Thank you.
Jacky 💜

The November election is less than nine months away, and **the Democrats believe they have a great chance at flipping our seats blue.** They are pulling out all the stops to kick us out of office, but we aren't going to let that happen!

I have given a voice to Iowans in Washington during my tenure in the House of Representatives. **I have stood for life, fiscal responsibility, fixing our economy, caring for our veterans, and prioritizing improving our education system.**

We still have a lot of work to do. Republicans are doing all they can do to work against the dangerous agenda being put forward by President Biden and Democrats in the House and Senate.

**That is why it is so important to expand our majority this November.

That majority can be won or lost right here in Iowa.

**We missed our**END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE.** Will you contribute to my campaign to keep your voice in Congress?**

**TIME IS RUNNING OUT!****

subject: FWD: I've been endorsed by Vivek! 🇺🇸
body:
|
---
| | Hi Peter - did you see the exciting campaign news from Max Ukropina this morning??

_**Max was just endorsed by former presidential candidate and America First leader Vivek Ramaswamy!**_

We can't even begin to describe the energy we have in these final four days!

[**Read the note from Max below and click here to check out Vivek's special endorsement message!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=941b489a94&e=86e91e802d)

\- Team Max Ukropina
---
| **From:** Max Ukropina
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SUBJ: **I've been endorsed by Vivek! 🇺🇸
---
| Hi Peter - I have exciting news!

Former presidential candidate and America First leader Vivek Ramaswamy **__just endorsed my campaign for Congress in the 47th District!__**

I am HONORED to have Vivek's support ... this is another sign of our campaign's incredible momentum among grassroots patriots in these final four days!

[_**> >> Check out Vivek's endorsement message here and rush in a donation to support our campaign TODAY!**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=445ddeac0b&e=86e91e802d)
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=cf9716cdd9&e=86e91e802d)
---
| **Vivek and I share the same motivations for running for office: business guys who both recognize that career politicians are destroying our country.**

We both see the need for America First fighters to go to Washington with bold solutions to our problems instead of preserving business-as-usual.

We have an opportunity on Tuesday to do just that ... disrupt the status quo and elect new leadership to go to Washington and fight for Orange County and our country.

[**I've never been more confident that we're going to win this Election in four days ... I need your support now more than ever. Please contribute whatever you can TODAY to help us WIN this Election and SAVE our country!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=453fb5aa67&e=86e91e802d)

Thank you friend,

Max Ukropina

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=4153a2953ab6482f86644a7230917ad5&_e=xi-NSHF-Wq1ZRJ_tEWN3CIunSptrVRmpzcNbvqY47CKV-n1HxrTf7oF4e4bfqNoT3izvqrdP9TZfu7sHz7tO7I0gM0W_61dpaaHiprNHL7CBn6u8SbZ9WWcI9B4aRf_-jtGxLWn8I0_rWgdWMZLD4JjgY2LQRy0gP01RqiKh8k8YOwXcVaPqui6A6iQgVamMrbqD9b_s2d-7EADkVcit0BUE20akkPEQcGXQ_q1H6x-xl6QsujgnU7d05YxR34rticZCE9oWV4zOQu6nOun2ixL0xWaUjkh_SoFm2xPimGve7TCPQqgRLDhaFWPvxxO4mkO6w4UQOhjRFP8O7fjBvt45qcJl-El5A3dKrAHmI7n3KcNTsV0FP4KexeQkuDsOqfPr0sSx5bLQC9UudqQX0g%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=4153a2953ab6482f86644a7230917ad5&_e=xi-NSHF-Wq1ZRJ_tEWN3CIunSptrVRmpzcNbvqY47CKV-n1HxrTf7oF4e4bfqNoT3izvqrdP9TZfu7sHz7tO7I0gM0W_61dpaaHiprNHL7CBn6u8SbZ9WWcI9B4aRf_-jtGxLWn8I0_rWgdWMZLD4JjgY2LQRy0gP01RqiKh8k8YOwXcVaPqui6A6iQgVamMrbqD9b_s2d-7EADkVcit0BUE20akkPEQcGXQ_q1H6x_nywHt37QLw1wgLVHPF_bSSu0hDkbtfAyB9XFw4UQ1MgRTQWDS0X9JAZWqPl7FtdjElaDvvQGb_t87BTP4HC-w12NZFcP62JWO-OAIuqKXfYu6iJ5_OSEO1J-vum_YNqVmyPkcHJgL-L0FpFeUVFVofbuGPkynbkHjfQk0fQ1GUQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=4153a2953ab6482f86644a7230917ad5&_e=xi-NSHF-Wq1ZRJ_tEWN3CIunSptrVRmpzcNbvqY47CKV-n1HxrTf7oF4e4bfqNoT3izvqrdP9TZfu7sHz7tO7I0gM0W_61dpaaHiprNHL7CBn6u8SbZ9WWcI9B4aRf_-jtGxLWn8I0_rWgdWMZLD4JjgY2LQRy0gP01RqiKh8k8YOwXcVaPqui6A6iQgVamMrbqD9b_s2d-7EADkVcit0BUE20akkPEQcGXQ_q1H6x-IN-PJL6bqa1EgEXPVPL3jGuCeXWHsmtdB9KIz3tztPwSQPuFVWZ46YxVMoNGRQJvZHaldDqHVCdxESLZ9RyEFZGD5bYiqsuah5LbX1_C_HkMKyCxax0NzXTlCguUK0pPgl-qgZgWYmoO2UQmcUVCAAm0BQFWLjo-0WITvxr3DGA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=4153a2953ab6482f86644a7230917ad5&_e=xi-NSHF-Wq1ZRJ_tEWN3CIunSptrVRmpzcNbvqY47CKV-n1HxrTf7oF4e4bfqNoT3izvqrdP9TZfu7sHz7tO7I0gM0W_61dpaaHiprNHL7CBn6u8SbZ9WWcI9B4aRf_-jtGxLWn8I0_rWgdWMZLD4JjgY2LQRy0gP01RqiKh8k8YOwXcVaPqui6A6iQgVamMrbqD9b_s2d-7EADkVcit0BUE20akkPEQcGXQ_q1H6x-lhQ4n7wjb-yDlgkmtPpW5nw7DXKzTzqkOODxTZw1rpgkpZou3QX2J3nEUJS9yPjho97ykBUl9dQ4E3MG3iUl5U9UsAdeyqMpbDKAK8K-Ar4-81kKe8Yy_hi-g1dU-0z4uz7hD9WtlcootZoGK7Zm1UhJ8vJ7YyxCD8iSTcQyq4A%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

I’m running to RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM. | My Democrat opponent, Tammy Baldwin, has been a career politician for 20 years and has voted with Biden over 95% of the time. She’s supported Biden’s catastrophic open borders, letting drug cartels overwhelm our Southern Border and wreak havoc in communities across the country, and voted for Biden’s disastrous economic agenda that sent inflation skyrocketing. Control of the Senate and the Presidency will come down to Wisconsin. This will be the #1 battleground state for Republicans and Democrats. My opponent already has over $8,000,000 in the bank, with millions more pledged by Leftist special interest groups. I haven’t spent 20 years building up a network of D.C. special interest groups to bail me out of a tough fight. I can’t sit on the sidelines as Democrats and their radical Leftist agenda rob American families of the opportunity we’ve been so blessed with. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services, and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: January 6th 2021 - I was ready to fight that day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
A lot of people have asked me what that day was like for me as a combat veteran, so I wanted to take a moment to share some reflections with you.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80129985/458484686/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_20240301_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5Njk2OTkyLTMxZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8K7ejSyvlR_Le_ydDi_EJxBMMxvug8p-t46ZY-Mgb2Q=)
See this? That's me on January 6:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80129986/458484687/-823092696?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_20240301_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5Njk2OTkyLTMxZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8K7ejSyvlR_Le_ydDi_EJxBMMxvug8p-t46ZY-Mgb2Q=)
As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker — something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
Maybe it is the Marine in me, but I will always fight for our democracy. I'd have done it in the Capitol that day -- and I will fight as hard as I can to win this race and keep GOP election-deniers out of the Senate..
Nothing less than our democracy is at stake in this election. If Republicans win Arizona, they win the presidency and they take control of the Senate. We can't let that happen, and I can't do it without you.
_**[Can you please split $3 between Upset the Setup and my campaign for the United States Senate today? Everything comes down to Arizona, and I cannot do this without you. Please, Peter.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80129987/458484688/-823092696?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_20240301_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5Njk2OTkyLTMxZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8K7ejSyvlR_Le_ydDi_EJxBMMxvug8p-t46ZY-Mgb2Q=)**_

name: Dalila Epperson
subject: Time To Vote
body:
Republicans- Lowest Turnout!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/97OtyYTCo/c?w=XWRU_X-paLt8FU7PKenM9gNDrTefInt49OtsUpx-1J4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk3T3R5WVRDbz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)_**

| | |

| | Time To Vote

| | This looks to be one of the lowest voting turnouts ever! Monterey County is just over 12% with only about 4% Republicans and about 8% Democrats having voted. SLO and Santa Cruz aren't much better. I realize we like to vote on Voting Day: March 5th. But if you know of disenfranchised Republicans who haven't voted, encourage them to vote and offer to bring their ballot in for them to the Elections Department. I've heard there is some confusion over Prop/Measure 1 - Vote NO. Newson is taking real money from good mental health programs and sinking into the blackhole of more housing for illegals and homeless. Throwing money at the homelessness issue is not helping the real issue of WHY they are homeless! And the illegals? As long as they remain ILLEGAL, they do not get any benefits. I'm first generation and my grandparents and mom went through the legal process and were proud to become Americans and learn the English language as well. Also, there are great candidates running for local Republican Central Committees. Find out who they are in your county! In Monterey - if you need the names of them email me and I'll give you the list dependent on your Supervisorial District. I also have access to Santa Clara and Santa Cruz if you live there. But SLO did not do the election option for their Central Committee if you had not heard. And now for some great news on my Campaign\- I am top two (unopposed Republican running against unopposed Democrat) so I'll fly through this March 5th Primary. This is why my focus and strategy is already on November 5th. Right now I'm fundraising. Take the Labels Off and look at what they're teaching the children, the legislation taking away Parental Rights, the gutting of Prop 13 (I'm endorsed by Howard Jarvis), and now floating wind turbines that will kill thousands of whales, dolphins, seals, sea lions and devastate Commercial Fisheries! This is what we have to talk about to our Democrat friends and neighbors. Everyone will be terribly affected. clean_body: Republicans- Lowest Turnout! | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Time To Vote | | | | | | | This looks to be one of the lowest voting turnouts ever! Monterey County is just over 12% with only about 4% Republicans and about 8% Democrats having voted. SLO and Santa Cruz aren't much better. I realize we like to vote on Voting Day: March 5th. But if you know of disenfranchised Republicans who haven't voted, encourage them to vote and offer to bring their ballot in for them to the Elections Department. I've heard there is some confusion over Prop/Measure 1 - Vote NO. Newson is taking real money from good mental health programs and sinking into the blackhole of more housing for illegals and homeless. Throwing money at the homelessness issue is not helping the real issue of WHY they are homeless! And the illegals? As long as they remain ILLEGAL, they do not get any benefits. I'm first generation and my grandparents and mom went through the legal process and were proud to become Americans and learn the English language as well. Also, there are great candidates running for local Republican Central Committees. Find out who they are in your county! In Monterey - if you need the names of them email me and I'll give you the list dependent on your Supervisorial District. I also have access to Santa Clara and Santa Cruz if you live there. But SLO did not do the election option for their Central Committee if you had not heard. And now for some great news on my Campaign\- I am top two (unopposed Republican running against unopposed Democrat) so I'll fly through this March 5th Primary. This is why my focus and strategy is already on November 5th. Right now I'm fundraising. body:
The State of the Union is fast approaching, and President Biden is counting on this team to rally behind him. | | |
---
Peter: The State of the Union is fast approaching -- circle Thursday, March 7 on your calendars! -- and President Biden is counting on this team to rally behind him and say you are, "On Board.” While the opposition is busy flooding the airwaves, the President and Vice President are counting on this team to share their message of positivity and progress. The State of the Union is a big moment to shine a light on that story! There are a few ways that you can show you're on board today:
1. **Attend a Watch Party:** [Join campaign staff and other supporters to watch the State of the Union and learn more about getting involved in your state in this election.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.HV-T5b9C6Y6Pisqo-P4PmwBtZ_GxELuT586x3F0HSffCjx3msBUWHXg-TdqKkC87ijq0RGOBUK-_iWC9KlkzW1NvjqTgD47-pgqLHiR4GNEHkVerYLm45eCeK0w7vxaPQ0_WJ7wGk5QhR1uv-BjWaNivC5OkRjXYTRd10u7NYDJdIJlWQHdtGzwBEXEAYQssTuHTFsfmKPjqdVkOynQi3bgJm1gcO1BMYprAS8Spe_eVxygOj2-nheh1KOqfDb-GjPsPbhnggBOlHb6nfX7UQTrTWlMCEvGaGbFztwS4LssWQpu97Afv2kER0BZb2cyzFc6lixGeff8j1FYnadKRhp1-9tQUppPHfZsTmgfoP1b0SIFBFFEJ5zkDV3NgBxVkVybHjCmXD5JolJsOabORRdCrrtrSuRA8rs2jlYGZ2kDXalq7oFmJezTFH8TpHAKe/44b/RaSxEWltT-uEluPpRB1_Nw/h0/h001.m9qdjTZ0IP7SN4eJHIMR2AzX9CpnfoUlKx183IZKRjs)
2. **Join the Virtual Watch Party:** [Can't join us? Attend our virtual watch party instead. It's your chance to connect with like-minded supporters from coast to coast, all tuning in to stand with Biden-Harris.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.HV-T5b9C6Y6Pisqo-P4PmwBtZ_GxELuT586x3F0HSfeEiq0WEzq3_31BUKSCUAiCkSLHoIF_NIBNRSIfYqddyvP47DFG5UXun8MD2YpWfgO3iEH99rSmwgS2RRNrmyvToTk6IYuD2cqNrDeRcyvKPOI-vTkB4arQn30pcuLt6fxmnFtHIBnsBfisc42Jkv_dcteNvPwVmP50RA4tXqiHFohzHO4g5ncN5gLdzkSUfu5XIEocTjJll9hKb7HYCIc3xl9IQfh_fk3ywLfT4NO5zIDEG9_21Qfva4GfF5jt3ARlmrKu_LefLMbAC2eEsRRBoIZ2m-9Lv01NOtDrbVt51s6Bsez6_gGXH1hP6n_iu3aEFJzC7KBR855h3P6M1do8FP4jKwp5raWBKAW4m1DZhUJa6OKTwTWZju3izRwVwUo/44b/RaSxEWltT-uEluPpRB1_Nw/h1/h001.osxqdJtcQqcCYfSIDGw0qiyEskA-gJtWVjMr9aGQtuI)

We have to carry this momentum far past the State of the Union, so our team is eager to hear about how else you’d like to be involved through our Supporter Interest Survey. [You’re the backbone of this movement, Peter. So take a few minutes to fill out the survey here >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_TQgwun1VbeJQpOeMNBYTMJWIymfmIeJpXS3_zRZOXbFNFpknd8RcZYMYFlF8MwmZhnconhQ9Qq7QiDqKgMyT8V6jLrT1Lb7aPB7pmqe4oDgUVFo0pXIx7iAi30UhSOopjYgN_w11YFu6mFQ3AXaSqG39ZKeY-LpQfCxwLROIPI0Ewg4W-nVrWkPNjQ3Ycndkpy1utWNkmGtNi0isglkfQMiYyh_iw_Ra9Ld9sswBU7EwCK5lNcA1mdou155O2hPtFPh5I1AATqU6H3RA49nlSKvNVGaPIpRxrGZU0Q-Sbz3XXSs1SBDpVTqxznPHOdlzhnDyFWecWzgy2uNq0ccD8/44b/RaSxEWltT-uEluPpRB1_Nw/h2/h001.PMqtsGN-zOQQqYhGp-f2GCY4GuJu7OincX9Wr_6M5cw) Let’s make this State of the Union more than just a speech -- let’s make it a statement. All aboard, Team Biden-Harris

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter of President Biden and Vice President Harris. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. I am a product of all the people who have raised me and poured into me and for that, I feel so blessed to carry their legacy with me through this campaign. We still have a few more days before voting ends, and we’re not stopping yet!
Please continue to spread the word, donate and talk to your loved ones about what Team Lateefah stands for - justice, liberation and equity for all. Are you with me?
Love and solidarity,
Lateefah

It’s your belief and encouragement that keeps me in this fight through the dark and challenging times. Getting endorsed by the and shows how powerful our vision for this district is - that people are ready to have their voices heard in Congress and see meaningful change in our communities. | | ~ I am a product of all the people who have raised me and poured into me and for that, I feel so blessed to carry their legacy with me through this campaign. We still have a few more days before voting ends, and we’re not stopping yet! Please continue to spread the word, donate and talk to your loved ones about what Team Lateefah stands for - justice, liberation and equity for all. Are you with me? subject: Judicial Watch Settles Lawsuit that Uncovered Hillary’s Unsecure Emails

The Clinton email scandal uncovered by our simple FOIA lawsuit changed
the course of American history and led to Hillary Clinton’s defeat
in 2016.

Our historic lawsuit is now officially over and settled through a
remarkable payment of $97,000 by the corrupt State Department. Hillary
Clinton ignored the law but received special protection from both the
courts and law enforcement. For countless Americans, this double
standard of justice destroyed their confidence in the fair
administration of justice. Americans would never have known about
Hillary Clinton’s classified email and related pay-for-play
criminality but for our diligence.

A June 29, 2023, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31508&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJpZGVuLWRvZy0wMjk2MC1wZy0xOTkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0d06b50851b19dd251e70e77abc20501ba72edeea962f53dff8d6734edc6d7aa]
written by an Assistant Special Agent in Charge in the Presidential
Protection Division whose name is redacted with the subject line
“Message to Team FLD [First Lady Detail]” states:

The recent dog bites have challenged us to adjust our operational
tactics when Commander is present – please give lots of room
(staying a terrain feature away if possible). We will continue to keep
[redacted] in our sight but must be creative to ensure our own
personal safety. The senior leaders of the detail and agency continue
to address the issue at higher levels with staff and First Family –
working to have a better solution soon. Thank you for your patience
and understanding.

On July 29, 2023, nearly six weeks after agents had compiled the list
of 22 bite incidents, another attack of an agent
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31516&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJpZGVuLWRvZy0wMjk2MC1wZy0yNjUvXW9jY3VycmVkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=75567c886467c72a6264275cb623c71e4072ef99df0bd5924cec7af6dc769823
at Biden’s Rehoboth, DE, home. The July 30 incident report
indicates:

Commander ran towards the direction of post [redacted] booth and bit
SA [redacted] in the left forearm. Causing a severe, deep open wound.
As a result of the attack SA [redacted] started to loose [sic] a
significant amount of blood from [redacted] arm. SA [redacted]
remained calm and walked away from the area looking for help.

These Biden dog attack documents again raise fundamental questions
about President Biden and the Secret Service. And rather than protect
its agents, the Secret Service tried to illegally hide documents about
the abuse of its agents and officers by the Biden family.

That it took federal lawsuits to force the release of this information
speaks volumes. The Bidens are lucky no one has been killed as a
result of their reckless disregard for the safety of Secret Service
and White House employees.

In July 2023, we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=29933&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZ2VybWFuLXNoZXBoZXJkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bdb5157429c576e72d64b1b5c890073dba902b057b501a8ef2783831ba0f94b8]
from DHS in a
related lawsuit revealing 10 attacks by Biden’s German Shepherd,
Commander, on officers of the Secret Service between October 2022 and
January 2023. In several cases the agents required medical care,
including at a hospital.

In April 2022, we released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0e9f3bd65f45001f37bf54b814c3a1107c714c21dae6e3c8ec257dceffd1bf0f]
records including incident reports detailing multiple attacks and
damages caused to United States Secret Service members by President
Joe Biden’s dog Major at both the White House and Biden’s lake
home in Wilmington, DE. The documents also reveal that a member of the
Secret Service who was attacked by the dog was displeased that White
House Press Secretary Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident.

GHASTLY 7,300% SURGE IN ILLEGALS FROM SAME NATION AS STUDENT’S
MURDERER

Thanks to Biden throwing the border wide open, and sanctuary city
policies, our children are no longer safe on our streets. Our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog has chilling details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31512&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2hhc3RseS1zdXJnZS1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmFudHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c1d14985c2861a56d58547172176addf88f1c2721bb13104e322725a1365c8a6]
about the criminals from one nation in particular.

While most mainstream media coverage flagrantly omits that the man
charged in the murder of a Georgia nursing student is an illegal
immigrant who entered the United States through the famously porous
southern border, other important nuggets are also being left out of
most reports. The 26-year-old suspect, Jose Antonio Ibarra, comes from
a country—Venezuela—run by a dictator with close ties to
terrorists who refuses to accept deportees. This is especially
disturbing because the U.S. has seen a shocking 7,300% spike
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31230&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3Bpa2UtaW4taWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=036e61e42a72c46ee7f625c5583d340309c60b14e02ce63d487f92c662e86fd5]
in
migrants from Venezuela under the Biden administration’s disastrous
open border policies and now we are stuck with all of them. There is
no telling how many other violent criminals or terrorists are among
the hundreds of thousands of Venezuelans who have been released inside
the country by our government in the last few years.

Ibarra and his brother, another delinquent recently charged with
possessing a fake green card, crossed into El Paso, Texas in September
2022 and was released in the country like millions of other migrants
under the Biden administration’s policies. Immigration and Customs
Enforcement (ICE) confirmed in an Atlanta news report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31517&F=T&&hash=9a4cfd8b71c509ae416c58dba542e78eeb6717a22b0eb941f63763ba91885a1d]
that Ibarra “was paroled and released for further processing.”
Federal authorities say the brother, 29-year-old Diego Ibarra
“claimed a credible fear” of being returned to his native
Venezuela when he got arrested, which is a scandal-plagued tactic used
by millions of illegal immigrants to avoid getting deported. Before
the most recent arrest for murder the younger Ibarra had been arrested
several times, for driving under the influence of alcohol and driving
without a license, shoplifting and failure to appear for an offense.
One of the arrests occurred in New York City, which offers illegal
immigrants sanctuary and does not report criminals to the feds for
removal.

A few days ago, Ibarra got charged with malice murder, felony murder,
aggravated battery, aggravated assault, false imprisonment,
kidnapping, hindering a 911 call, and concealing the death of another.
Police say he killed 22-year-old nursing student Laken Hope Riley,
whose body was found in the woods behind a lake on the University of
Georgia campus. “On February 22, 2024 at approximately 12:07 p.m.,
the UGA Police Department received a call from a friend of Laken’s
who was concerned that she had gone to run at the Intramural Fields
earlier in the morning and had not returned as expected,” according
to a statement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31518&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2UudWdhLmVkdS90aW1lbHktd2FybmluZy1ob21pY2lkZS0yMDI0LTAyLTIyLXVwZGF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=665da12d5413288fb1e1467e2ad8f540a5bd3e90483e667be530a827dceab756]
issued by the University of Georgia Police. “Officers responded to
the area and immediately began a search at approximately 12:20 p.m.
and located her shortly afterward. She was unconscious and not
breathing, and had received visible injuries. Officers immediately
began rendering medical aid. Emergency medical responders determined
that she was deceased upon their arrival.”

Evidence shows that Ibarra acted alone. Only conservative media has
bothered to report the highly relevant details surrounding the
Venezuelan’s immigration status and that he moved to Athens, Georgia
because it offers illegal aliens sanctuary. The mainstream media
mostly sugar coated or avoided the subject altogether. One national
news outlet shamefully wrote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31519&F=T&&hash=6b58ca9f2cebbdf4ea412a76b7fb250fdcce0378c5654aaf8aabd746d034ba11]
that Riley’s violent murder has once again put the spotlight on the
dangers female runners face. While failing completely to mention
pertinent information about the illegal immigrant suspect, the article
delves into a survey by athletic wear company Adidas that reveals 92%
of women reported feeling concerned for their safety while running
with half afraid of being physically attacked. More than a third of
women experienced physical or verbal harassment, including sexist
comments, and being followed, according to the athletic wear survey.

It is distressing enough that a young woman lost her life to a suspect
who should not have been in the country and could have been deported
after previous arrests. We must also grapple with the fact that there
has been an inconceivable surge in illegal immigrants from Venezuela
since Biden became president. This is especially alarming because the
South American nation operates under a Marxist regime that encourages
international terrorist groups to run free. Venezuela’s government
issues travel documents to individuals linked to terrorism and allows
terrorists to operate with relative impunity. The country also has
close ties with Iran and other notorious state sponsors of terrorism.
A State Department report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67294&L=31225&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGUuZ292L3JlcG9ydHMvY291bnRyeS1yZXBvcnRzLW9uLXRlcnJvcmlzbS0yMDE5L3ZlbmV6dWVsYS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=abd13c19d625ab4580c8e078e14125f719d388015ffec348165b567639c87f1b]
reveals that Venezuelan Dictator Nicolas Maduro and his associates
“use criminal activities to help maintain their illegitimate hold on
power, fostering a permissive environment for known terrorist
groups.” That includes the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia
(FARC-D), the Colombian-origin National Liberation Army (ELN), and
Hizballah sympathizers. In a separate assessment the State Department
writes that Maduro has defined himself through his opposition to the
United States, regularly criticizing the U.S. government, its
policies, and its relations with Latin America.

Until next week,

clean_body: We settled our historic 2014 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that sought the emails of then-Secretary of State Hillary Clinton regarding the Benghazi attack. [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SETTLES LAWSUIT THAT UNCOVERED HILLARY’S UNSECURE EMAILS [] JUDICIAL WATCH SETTLES LAWSUIT THAT UNCOVERED HILLARY’S UNSECURE EMAILS We settled [] our historic 2014 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] that sought the emails of then-Secretary of State Hillary Clinton regarding the Benghazi attack. This suit led directly [] to the disclosure of Clinton’s use of a nongovernment email server to conduct government business (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:14-cv-01242). The settlement commits the State Department to a payment to us of $97,000. This lawsuit, about the Benghazi scandal, forced [] the Obama administration to admit to Hillary Clinton’s hidden classified and other government emails in 2015. We uncovered “talking points” created by [] the Obama White House and other documents showing that statements about the attack made on the eve of the 2012 elections by then-National Security Advisor Susan Rice were false. On December 6, 2018, U.S. District Court Judge Royce Lamberth ordered [] Obama administration senior State Department officials, lawyers and Clinton aides, as well as Susan Rice, to be deposed or answer written questions under oath. Judge Lamberth called the Clinton email system “one of the gravest modern offenses to government transparency.” On March 2, 2020, U.S. District Court Judge Royce Lamberth authorized [] us to depose Clinton about her emails and the existence of relevant Benghazi attack documents. The court also ordered [] the deposition of Clinton’s former Chief of Staff, Cheryl Mills, and two other State Department officials. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit, in an extraordinary intervention, exempted Clinton and Mills from testifying under oath. The Clinton email scandal uncovered by our simple FOIA lawsuit changed the course of American history and led to Hillary Clinton’s defeat in 2016. Our historic lawsuit is now officially over and settled through a remarkable payment of $97,000 by the corrupt State Department. Hillary Clinton ignored the law but received special protection from both the courts and law enforcement. For countless Americans, this double standard of justice destroyed their confidence in the fair administration of justice. Americans would never have known about Hillary Clinton’s classified email and related pay-for-play criminality but for our diligence. Our lawsuit exposed several key aspects about the scope of the Clinton email scandal and cover-up: John Hackett, former Director of Information Programs and Services (IPS) testified [] under oath that he had raised concerns that former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton’s staff may have “culled out 30,000” of the secretary’s “personal” emails without following strict National Archives standards. He also revealed that he believed there was interference with the formal FOIA review process related to the classification of Clinton’s Benghazi-related emails. Heather Samuelson, Clinton’s White House liaison at the State Department, and later Clinton’s personal lawyer, admitted [] under oath that she was granted immunity by the Department of Justice in June 2016. Justin Cooper, former aide to President Bill Clinton and Clinton Foundation employee who registered the domain name of the unsecure clintonemail.com server that Clinton used while serving as Secretary of State, testified [] he worked with Huma Abedin [], Clinton’s deputy chief of staff, to create the non-government email system. In the interrogatory responses [] of E.W. (Bill) Priestap, assistant director of the FBI Counterintelligence Division, he stated that the agency found Clinton email records in the Obama White House, specifically, the Executive Office of the President. Jacob “Jake” Sullivan, Clinton’s senior advisor and deputy chief of staff when she was secretary of state, testified [ both he and Clinton used her unsecure non-government email system to conduct official State Department business. Eric Boswell, former assistant secretary of state for diplomatic security during Clinton’s tenure as secretary of state, testified [] that Clinton was warned twice against using unsecure BlackBerry’s and personal emails to transmit classified material. To read more about this case, click here []. RECORDS REVEAL AT LEAST 23 BITING INCIDENTS BY BIDEN’S DOG COMMANDER There is a special sort of craziness and corruption when a president and first lady allow their dog to repeatedly attack Secret Service and White House personnel. We’ve uncovered more incident in 269 pages [] of records from the U.S. Secret Service related to aggression by President Biden’s dog Commander, including at least 23 biting incidents. After one incident, East Wing public tours were stopped for approximately 20 minutes due to the blood on the floor from the attack in the area of the “Booksellers.” We obtained the records through an October 2023 FOIA lawsuit [] after the Secret Service (a component of the Department of Homeland Security) failed to respond to a July 31, 2023, request for all records involving the “Biden family dog, ‘Commander,’ including but not limited to communications sent to and from [Secret Service] officials in the Uniformed and Non-Uniformed Divisions involved in White House operations and the Presidential Protection Division” (Judicial Watch Inc, v. U.S. Department of Homeland [] Security [] (No. 1:23-cv-02960). Additionally, we filed a February 13 complaint [] for Biden dog records dating from August and September 2023 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:24-cv-00429)). Our FOIA requests and lawsuits [] exposed initial White House falsehoods about the severity and number of attacks by the Bidens’ previous dog, Major. We then received a tip that Commander was also attacking [] Secret Service personnel and uncovered documents last July showing 10 biting incidents. According to a Judicial Watch source, President Biden mistreated his dogs. The source disclosed that Biden punched and kicked his dogs. The latest records we forced out include a spreadsheet [] of 22 incident reports between October 2022 and June 2023, 10 of which required medical treatment. On June 15, 2023, Dep. Asst. Dir. Darryl Volpicelli [] sent a report [] via email regarding an agent who received a “deep bite” by Commander while “inside the Kennedy Garden.” The incident shut down East Wing tours for 20 minutes: Video of the incident shows SA [redacted] enter the Kennedy Garden while Commander, who was off the leash and on the opposite side of the garden at the time, run at a high rate of speed towards SA [redacted] jump towards [redacted] and take [redacted] to the ground. [Redacted] (grounds keeper), who was also in the garden at this time, put Commander on a leash after the bite occurred. SA [redacted] said that [redacted] looked around the garden before entering it and did not see the family pet. SA [redacted] sustained an injury to [redacted] left arm (‘deep bite’) that reportedly needed stitches. SA [redacted] was treated by [White House Medical Unit] at the Residence Clinic. East Wing Tours were stopped for approximately 20 minutes due to blood from the incident being on the floors in the area of the Booksellers. A January 28, 2023, email chain [] discusses three biting incidents, “2 incidents today and one yesterday.” Later that day, a Presidential Protection Division official whose name is redacted emails Senior White House Advisor Anthony Bernal [] that “Commander bit one of the Navy Staff” who worked at Camp David. A photo is attached to a June 11, 2023, email [] from the Presidential Protection Division to Volpicelli with the subject line “Dog Bite.” The photo shows the torn clothing of an agent who was bitten in the chest by Commander while the agent was attempting to open the door for Jill Biden to the Oval Dining Patio area of the White House. The agent required medical attention. A June 29, 2023, email [] written by an Assistant Special Agent in Charge in the Presidential Protection Division whose name is redacted with the subject line “Message to Team FLD [First Lady Detail]” states: The recent dog bites have challenged us to adjust our operational tactics when Commander is present – please give lots of room (staying a terrain feature away if possible). We will continue to keep [redacted] in our sight but must be creative to ensure our own personal safety. The senior leaders of the detail and agency continue to address the issue at higher levels with staff and First Family – working to have a better solution soon. Thank you for your patience and understanding. On July 29, 2023, nearly six weeks after agents had compiled the list of 22 bite incidents, another attack of an agent [ at Biden’s Rehoboth, DE, home. The July 30 incident report indicates: Commander ran towards the direction of post [redacted] booth and bit SA [redacted] in the left forearm. Causing a severe, deep open wound. As a result of the attack SA [redacted] started to loose [sic] a significant amount of blood from [redacted] arm. SA [redacted] remained calm and walked away from the area looking for help. These Biden dog attack documents again raise fundamental questions about President Biden and the Secret Service. And rather than protect its agents, the Secret Service tried to illegally hide documents about the abuse of its agents and officers by the Biden family. That it took federal lawsuits to force the release of this information speaks volumes. The Bidens are lucky no one has been killed as a result of their reckless disregard for the safety of Secret Service and White House employees. In July 2023, we uncovered records [] from DHS in a related lawsuit revealing 10 attacks by Biden’s German Shepherd, Commander, on officers of the Secret Service between October 2022 and January 2023. In several cases the agents required medical care, including at a hospital. In April 2022, we released [] records including incident reports detailing multiple attacks and damages caused to United States Secret Service members by President Joe Biden’s dog Major at both the White House and Biden’s lake home in Wilmington, DE. The documents also reveal that a member of the Secret Service who was attacked by the dog was displeased that White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident. GHASTLY 7,300% SURGE IN ILLEGALS FROM SAME NATION AS STUDENT’S MURDERER Thanks to Biden throwing the border wide open, and sanctuary city policies, our children are no longer safe on our streets. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has chilling details [] about the criminals from one nation in particular. While most mainstream media coverage flagrantly omits that the man charged in the murder of a Georgia nursing student is an illegal immigrant who entered the United States through the famously porous southern border, other important nuggets are also being left out of most reports. The 26-year-old suspect, Jose Antonio Ibarra, comes from a country—Venezuela—run by a dictator with close ties to terrorists who refuses to accept deportees. This is especially disturbing because the U.S. has seen a shocking 7,300% spike [] in migrants from Venezuela under the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies and now we are stuck with all of them. There is no telling how many other violent criminals or terrorists are among the hundreds of thousands of Venezuelans who have been released inside the country by our government in the last few years. Ibarra and his brother, another delinquent recently charged with possessing a fake green card, crossed into El Paso, Texas in September 2022 and was released in the country like millions of other migrants under the Biden administration’s policies. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) confirmed in an Atlanta news report [] that Ibarra “was paroled and released for further processing.” Federal authorities say the brother, 29-year-old Diego Ibarra “claimed a credible fear” of being returned to his native Venezuela when he got arrested, which is a scandal-plagued tactic used by millions of illegal immigrants to avoid getting deported. Before the most recent arrest for murder the younger Ibarra had been arrested several times, for driving under the influence of alcohol and driving without a license, shoplifting and failure to appear for an offense. One of the arrests occurred in New York City, which offers illegal immigrants sanctuary and does not report criminals to the feds for removal. A few days ago, Ibarra got charged with malice murder, felony murder, aggravated battery, aggravated assault, false imprisonment, kidnapping, hindering a 911 call, and concealing the death of another. Police say he killed 22-year-old nursing student Laken Hope Riley, whose body was found in the woods behind a lake on the University of Georgia campus. “On February 22, 2024 at approximately 12:07 p.m., the UGA Police Department received a call from a friend of Laken’s who was concerned that she had gone to run at the Intramural Fields earlier in the morning and had not returned as expected,” according to a statement [] issued by the University of Georgia Police. “Officers responded to the area and immediately began a search at approximately 12:20 p.m. and located her shortly afterward. She was unconscious and not breathing, and had received visible injuries. Officers immediately began rendering medical aid. Emergency medical responders determined that she was deceased upon their arrival.” Evidence shows that Ibarra acted alone. Only conservative media has bothered to report the highly relevant details surrounding the Venezuelan’s immigration status and that he moved to Athens, Georgia because it offers illegal aliens sanctuary. The mainstream media mostly sugar coated or avoided the subject altogether. One national news outlet shamefully wrote [] that Riley’s violent murder has once again put the spotlight on the dangers female runners face. While failing completely to mention pertinent information about the illegal immigrant suspect, the article delves into a survey by athletic wear company Adidas that reveals 92% of women reported feeling concerned for their safety while running with half afraid of being physically attacked. More than a third of women experienced physical or verbal harassment, including sexist comments, and being followed, according to the athletic wear survey. It is distressing enough that a young woman lost her life to a suspect who should not have been in the country and could have been deported after previous arrests. We must also grapple with the fact that there has been an inconceivable surge in illegal immigrants from Venezuela since Biden became president. This is especially alarming because the South American nation operates under a Marxist regime that encourages international terrorist groups to run free. Venezuela’s government issues travel documents to individuals linked to terrorism and allows terrorists to operate with relative impunity. The country also has close ties with Iran and other notorious state sponsors of terrorism. A State Department report [] reveals that Venezuelan Dictator Nicolas Maduro and his associates “use criminal activities to help maintain their illegitimate hold on power, fostering a permissive environment for known terrorist groups.” That includes the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC-D), the Colombian-origin National Liberation Army (ELN), and Hizballah sympathizers. In a separate assessment the State Department writes that Maduro has defined himself through his opposition to the United States, regularly criticizing the U.S. government, its policies, and its relations with Latin America. subject: We need you for our 72 Hour Operation
body:
A TON of voters are waiting until Election Day to vote. We need your help to turn them out. |
---
| | Hi Peter - Election Day is four days away.

We know that a TON of Republican voters are still waiting to vote on Election Day.

_So starting Sunday, we're launching our campaign's data-driven **"72 Hour Operation"** straight through Election Day until the polls close at 8PM to turn out the vote for Max._

We're recruiting and organizing dedicated volunteers to call the voters we know haven't returned a ballot yet and canvass neighborhoods with large numbers of votes that still haven't been cast.

**This is it. Max needs you. This is our final, critical push to elect Max Ukropina our Republican nominee for Congress. **

[**Can you sign up today to volunteer for our 72 Hour Operation and help us push Max over the finish line?**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=65fedf64ad&e=86e91e802d)

Even if you only have a few hours to volunteer, your help will make all the difference.
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=1776763162&e=86e91e802d)
---
| After you sign up, our campaign will reach out to you ASAP to help coordinate when and how you can volunteer.

There are just four days left until Election Day. We don't want wake up the morning after and wish we had done more.

[**Please sign up to be a part of our final 72 Hour push today.**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=24060c6a52&e=86e91e802d)

Thank you,

Max Ukropina HQ

I promise to make this quick!

Our campaign for CA-45 is carrying out an unprecedented GOTV outreach effort district-wide right now.

The team and I are working around the clock to ensure every voter in our district knows where I stand on the issues that concern them.

We’re also reminding them that Michelle Steel has been a complete and utter failure in Congress. She has abandoned the hardworking families of CA 45, toeing the party line instead.

With the stakes so high, having a do-nothing Republican representative in a do-nothing feuding Republican Congress is hurting our district.

With your help, we will change that in November. But first, I must get through the March 5 Primary.

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: You Won - Assisted Suicide is Dead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Once again, we prevailed and the suicide bill has died for this year. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/you-won-assisted-suicide-is-dead?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# You Won! Assisted Suicide Bill Is Dead.
March 1, 2024 ,

On February 9 of this year we filed a letter of opposition in the hearing of SB 443 - the so-called "Aid in Dying" bill, otherwise known as Assisted Suicide.

[The bill is dead](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=421295883b&e=5bb5efcda7). Thanks to your voices and to the efforts of the MD Right to Life and Senators such as Mike McKay of Western Maryland, the legislation does not have the votes to make it through Committee.

I fought in opposition to this bill with my colleagues as a State Delegate, where it also died by a tie vote in 2019. Now, it has once again died - this time in Committee. The fact that we have Hospice where those with end-of-life pain can have medications that completely remove their pain is something that ethically avoids killing a human life.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=af756bb8fc&e=5bb5efcda7)
Surprisingly, I was the only candidate for Congress in MD-6 on record opposing this measure even though it is consistently opposed in a bi-partisan vote, and opposed strongly by our minority communities. As your next Member of Congress, I will alway stand firm for life, liberty and property of all.

Thank you for helping us almost reach our goal last night. We came up about $1500 short. We have just 29 days until this month's filing deadline which will be published as an indicator of strength. The outpouring of support is so encouraging. Thank you.

For those who haven't had the chance to chip in yet, now is the time. Thank you.

Freedom and Victory,
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=6e0b8e26bd&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for Congress (R-MD6)

P.S. Almost forgot to let you know that we have reached over 75,000 primary voters individually and are poised to reach another 75k shortly, and this week our Dan Cox for Congress MAGA voter guide landed in the mailboxes of Western Maryland Republicans. Thank you for funding the work!
P.P.S Did you see that [Biden arrested an American journalist today](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e3556df1df&e=5bb5efcda7)? He was accurately reporting on J6 and challenging the government narrative. This is a pure act of tyranny and violation of our First Amendment. Keep Steve Baker and family in prayer, and all our J6 political prisoners. In Congress I will press for their release and pardon!
---
|
---
Here is the letter of opposition we submitted into testimony to oppose the bill.

body:
Donald Trump is a changed man in the 2024 election. | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=ecwf0d26evo3x86552u69pcezeuaaa04ba1af5zfhbgi7ann8vbg2hghq5o2ky7urmt0ksotau3qoz72k7iyvyd3e11qgm8ybbhejp5eiszaczr4cxa3hzkk13p56jojo54xwfs88r6bc81qlzrbwmucv911ehdj7c9r81td2vvvqhwy4giagf6t90cons5dvq7abw9gcx99ydv74tahqzlvlqq92so7ca91wt2ely0mmt6k5r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s9q2vz&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
|
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=21cu5m9swd8yfn2v6e55yeyj5gbl8f541czjkyztlargpl1g689a3h3fsjjp55ntgn6zyhq33nu8daqeef90sc1d8zxnhwrqlyb3yzun6y4dmg70g0w96qc3d4k3f42neojopgnnfssff3b6td1fefrmhh2vq75hdchn0lzxudou5qeusnf03xo6h38gk4o947pxdi0o2y07w5kpcvvsj61xgu5r5fsr09a555ddlt1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s9q2vz&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=mpmrp97q62isthmwz2l3dzt1phe0aov4liyy7998azb35x4mv74u9wtuy8nps6akmd8k7b6qqqq55ss6uer03ckmxups4vm8a3pnfly5z69a219optpbqmk3veofixvwwcw4r97v21grc15tpu2zvs2l50f9a575k9sajhpgruonfxkh3500co3wg6e4a49d0bxjsbxqpw4yawuqppvhstpttsywn497jn7ownvtu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s9q2vz&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=lb2pws3dxc670tjude7hml1nszgnnqkj9f7j2jcifvk93hyi6e89xsw8xqvggl0vf5csbvtssh3v5a7ufxig953ek1477hbyiqkilx7yggvidygv2lhz9kjo748ar88argohdvly1x95nnjif9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s9q2vz)

name: Your America
subject: Mark Twain is now available on DVD
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30151%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F8T7LHUZRTHzWQ7MIq0%2bmg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30152%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2D%2fw0B72cEn%2f8PbJ%2flIo0A&sysid=1) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZQ37PauWZTlYclOeiNxk9w&sysid=1).
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M14MdLliy5lijm5K7us7Lw&sysid=1)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uj%2b8KJ8dpGjvyzD2DInhtA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories” **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30166%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GP%2bIftJgyWGqg2ktWA7%2fKg&sysid=1)
---

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=crqmSup756Zf1MNJQZFVfw&sysid=1)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695912%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m0dqFtbH1AZmMQ%2blsD%2fH%2bA&sysid=1) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vTnmokPz3KISzeKK1wqjvw&sysid=1)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: American Update
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2jWQ5VS0OeSP02lhuoiLbQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9upisKpFLEVsnFqZBWKv8A&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c695922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqK9jZzWyDFkgrqANay8xg&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Keep Congress Republican
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtq7DAYhJ9G7mx-_fK1cHE4iyGE3SybIqXQ1SssW0bSJq8fnEuf8mOG4WPezvwsnHfbfBGrGRcVeUw8rrzeRU5lesT30oagOQLWJbASkNNCj3pQrWgLM9IOBtZhPdDiPiojO9VaSpWUVFtkqtUD9A12Ta_6rinceOwAA4S-bilUvbTaMo3SMFRgOlKD8CbmajFmV2Gbo0kpmv0hvVNiq1RYCz_ec94TYf8ITgSnHJcqGhlCXkVcTHbbfPQITsJargibgrUmcqcJO1EYCLZH8I0Nwg-nh0TCTteX69P0egEGFGt-O_Pn_zf-a13EUe8fznuX2sN1XoXzX1L5j999BgAA__8m_3NE). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtq7DAYhJ9G7mx-_fK1cHE4iyGE3SybIqXQ1SssW0bSJq8fnEuf8mOG4WPezvwsnHfbfBGrGRcVeUw8rrzeRU5lesT30oagOQLWJbASkNNCj3pQrWgLM9IOBtZhPdDiPiojO9VaSpWUVFtkqtUD9A12Ta_6rinceOwAA4S-bilUvbTaMo3SMFRgOlKD8CbmajFmV2Gbo0kpmv0hvVNiq1RYCz_ec94TYf8ITgSnHJcqGhlCXkVcTHbbfPQITsJargibgrUmcqcJO1EYCLZH8I0Nwg-nh0TCTteX69P0egEGFGt-O_Pn_zf-a13EUe8fznuX2sN1XoXzX1L5j999BgAA__8m_3NE) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkLtq7DAYhJ9G7mx-_fK1cHE4iyGE3SybIqXQ1SssW0bSJq8fnEuf8mOG4WPezvwsnHfbfBGrGRcVeUw8rrzeRU5lesT30oagOQLWJbASkNNCj3pQrWgLM9IOBtZhPdDiPiojO9VaSpWUVFtkqtUD9A12Ta_6rinceOwAA4S-bilUvbTaMo3SMFRgOlKD8CbmajFmV2Gbo0kpmv0hvVNiq1RYCz_ec94TYf8ITgSnHJcqGhlCXkVcTHbbfPQITsJargibgrUmcqcJO1EYCLZH8I0Nwg-nh0TCTteX69P0egEGFGt-O_Pn_zf-a13EUe8fznuX2sN1XoXzX1L5j999BgAA__8m_3NE) on these survival food kits while you can.

| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkM1unDAURp_G7DzyD2BYsJiUYTahqqiULi3_XDOuMCDbJMrbV1SZfbZHV1fnfH9GOSq_-HX-qQJ0MciYpLZyVvEdPnEyD--cZISVmHBMmKSF7eqWiYYW0FFBWi5qwmnx6ETdOkpK7QyrnCJaiJLalrO64uBobQvfnX8IJ4y0ZcXpRQBrmlIoWhJNqRaoJBH2Qy_eqDWov1v0-fOyQi6W7pHznhC_IjYgNiQwR4TLh18j2IvZwskyvAP-EndbxEfCCVaVAbHBgqYN41AZ5bhWFeLDkYNM2xENIN6_9Hc83d4Qq08cwPojIN7fxi9iVNiVn1fE-_8RjFD50t_l7_uPq3x9ldPtTf664ul5nw3i_TTiZ3ERO7t_-GXxqT4756D8cooX-Tuj_wsAAP__aGKDSw)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. name: American Freedom Report
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oCUvLzcgbM_c7Vy5y6eD4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxYvsP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9BRlJfMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJe9eJlkUv-EFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oCUvLzcgbM_c7Vy5y6eD4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxYvsP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9BRlJfMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJe9eJlkUv-EFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oCUvLzcgbM_c7Vy5y6eD4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxYvsP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9BRlJfMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJe9eJlkUv-EFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.
