body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a37b17e14ee3a5eba95cb328d3bb929b9880cd473aa5256615cb7240677586efe96c375d86398dd2ed15459d69dfd3b09f52bb3431651bcf That’s a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign…Blossom. People often ask…how did I get that name? Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a “girl power” kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets. There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more “feminine,” but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets. Although the helicopter community doesn’t use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the “Blossom” stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story! It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me the importance of service. Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong….but that’s not service. As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community. While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service. Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. After I pulled off a historic victory in 2022 and helped flip the House from Democrat to Republican control, I’ve had a target on my back… Democrats have made me their #1 target because they know I won’t just go along with the party line. No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do…I’m going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some “master” in Washington, D.C. If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a37b17e14ee3a5eba95cb328d3bb929b9880cd473aa5256615cb7240677586efe96c375d86398dd2ed15459d69dfd3b09f52bb3431651bcf I’m asking you to send me some help today. Because I’m a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to defeat my Democrat opponent. Democrats are already spending BIG on ads and billboards attacking me, so it is critical our campaign has the resources to FIGHT back. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a37b17e14ee3a5eba95cb328d3bb929b9880cd473aa5256615cb7240677586efe96c375d86398dd2ed15459d69dfd3b09f52bb3431651bcf RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I’m coming from and why I need your help. Whether it’s $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C. It’s time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that’s what I promise to always do…are you with me, Peter? If you look to my left, you can see my call sign…Blossom. People often ask…how did I get that name? Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a “girl power” kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets. There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more “feminine,” but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets. Although the helicopter community doesn’t use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the “Blossom” stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story! It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me the importance of service. Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong….but that’s not service. As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community. While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service. Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. After I pulled off a historic victory in 2022 and helped flip the House from Democrat to Republican control, I’ve had a target on my back… Democrats have made me their #1 target because they know I won’t just go along with the party line. No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do…I’m going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some “master” in Washington, D.C. If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, I’m asking you to send me some help today. Because I’m a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to defeat my Democrat opponent. Democrats are already spending BIG on ads and billboards attacking me, so it is critical our campaign has the resources to FIGHT back. RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I’m coming from and why I need your help. Whether it’s $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C. It’s time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that’s what I promise to always do…are you with me, Peter? With the courage to fight, -Jen Democrats are working overtime to DEFEAT Navy Veteran Jen Kiggans! They know if they flip Jen’s seat, that they can retake the entire House Majority. We can’t let that happen! As a Navy veteran, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom, Jen is committed to servant leadership. But without YOUR support, she risks losing the ability to fight for you and our values! Donate now to defend Jen Kiggans and protect our GOP Majority. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkM2O2jAUhZ_G2RnZvokdFlkwDbAZqoqi6dLyzzVYigOynRn17asgup_tp3uPznf-nPTJxCnO158m4VBz1blo6_XV5E_8S4u7xRC0YKKlDCgTmjd-aJXwIBscuGJbUFvJWHMbTC-ENVap0HMhtx14GQJwbnxQaFXXxGHNYcAEZ20H_SZsle-skJ3sZduDJS0zE-ZaNvWGGR-LnaIzc0WTNu6emmm41fooBHZEHIg4FHRLxs1XnDP69WJlFT-RvuqHe6ZLoQVnU5GIg0fLewHYORPAmo7AYalJl_uSHRIY38YjPe8_iJArTujjkgiM-9OLOJMeJl5nAuNTRTCu38aj_n38sdPv7_q8_9C_dvRyvrweqiMwXs4X-t-8yYN_fMVpikUq0rJrMnF6ytVvrf8vAAD__wqXh8g)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My father knows a winner when he sees one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
My Father Knows a winner when he sees one.

| |
---
| | | My father knows a winner when he sees one.

His endorsement record is near perfect.

_**He 's placed his trust in thousands of conservative candidates up & down the ballot to hold the line against the radical left, defend the MAGA movement & defend YOU.**_

One of them that stands out the most to me is Monica De La Cruz.

Monica is an America First patriot & she isn't afraid to show it.

**She 's pro-life, pro-border security, pro-law enforcement, and 100% PRO TRUMP. **
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ej5cS9TQGJsOacjT19vawA~~/AARclAA~-xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---

---

In the 2022 midterms, she flipped a seat on our southern border from blue to red for the first time ever and humiliated Joe Biden & Nancy Pelosi.

But now the Democrats are out for revenge & will spend millions to steal this seat back from us simply because she stands strongly with my father & the MAGA movement.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Mark Twain is now available on DVD
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sVEBLgPc-aSRsTyCiBR28A~~/AARclAA~-WK4UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point Action
subject: How we're going to Chase the Vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU!

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30188%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T%2bnA8OIs2dM4qRCzdhy5BA&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend,
---
We're in the fight of our lives to save America, and it's a fight we can't win without YOU! Turning Point Action is leading the Right with CHASE THE VOTE, our innovative ballot-chasing strategy to ensure EVERY Conservative in a battleground state VOTES.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30189%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=De8Od0R4U9ItCUp4B0b5qg&sysid=1)
---
**[Friend, can I count on YOUR gift right now to help support this MASSIVE and GAME-CHANGING ballot-chasing initiative?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30180%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uKaB%2bfI8WkJeZSU1%2bl4SUw&sysid=1)** For every dollar you donate, you'll help Turning Point Action put MORE boots on the ground, knock on MORE doors, and turn out MORE voters in the must-win precincts and states in the 2024 Election.
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FtZMPUGoSH%2bncK78ttw0xg&sysid=1)
---
For years, the radical Left has beaten us in the ballot game. As recently as the 2022 Election, there was hope for even more Conservative victories ... but not enough ballots from Conservative voters were cast and delivered. That's why, despite conservative majorities in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin, we didn't secure the victories we needed. But we learned -- and now, with YOUR support, Turning Point Action is determined to make a difference and get out the vote to WIN BIG in 2024. [**Turning Point Action's CHASE THE VOTE Initiative can be a GAME-CHANGER for the Right, but only if I can count on grassroots patriots like YOU for support.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30182%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jS7uHVjf2VH7bPjKWtTCLg&sysid=1)
---
[Donate now and HELP WIN!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FtZMPUGoSH%2bncK78ttw0xg&sysid=1)
---
| | Imagine the impact of: • THOUSANDS of patriotic voters reached and registered, • HUNDREDS of THOUSANDS of voters getting to their polling locations or casting their ballots by mail, and • getting out the vote to WIN BIG for True Conservative Principles in Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, and beyond in 2024. **[Friend, your support can be the DECIDING FACTOR in how many voters that Turning Point Action is able to reach, register, and TURN OUT to vote in 2024 \-- please, make your gift right now to help.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30183%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IIrIdwbZq2prvCOF7TJUDg&sysid=1)** Thank you for standing with me and Turning Point Action. I hope you're proud of the work you're already accomplishing to help SAVE AMERICA from the radical Left, and I can't wait to see how much more we're able to do for America's future in the year to come.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder Turning Point Action
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Fire and Ice in the Forecast, Florida Ditches DEI, and the World's Fastest Drone
body:
Extreme weather in the Southwest and Western parts of the U.S. could intensify the Smokehouse Creek Fire in Texas and produce at least 10 feet of snow in California's Sierra Nevada region.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71urDAQQOGnsbtFZvyzduHiNug2myYrpUQDHsNEBq_A2ShvHyV1ulMd6Xu7jTfkwvvyghvFluuIc-MnjfoCFzCjkSlmIiAtKfZXFXRQffByjY7m4FXyyepg_TR5UtmbCa3PJmejJUdQYJRW0CvrjOoQr972pp8top_QCaMocatH9155byvl8lWfdHRz3WSJa2uPU-h_AgYBQyIsZ7dQw4_EtGOrW8dVwAD61Vl7dz8Z_mt3uwsY5BHT45NL4dNdhVHLhlx-v-0v5HcAAAD__xWdULo) | |
# Saturday, March 2, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1933, _King Kong _debuted in New York City. It's often ranked as the greatest horror film of all time and has spawned a [long history](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngQ0LDmLsgaGLt3TtaF3g7FyDIbKpq7591Xbt_km__rfrfEXOXNZX3Ci0pc4YG580WwUK3OxkCgsRkJUUjNejHbUZB3kPDq2NyfRj6m9eLxhJD9H5hVJ0AH6QHECD01aD0Zfe6Q7RDxfjTLwgDjfshdOUuNW9e69c2p2W_FVP2rtYN5nDvbXnIeyLgEnA9CcZc7fX1qi0umGrdPxgAdP6wYkETJizenBZ1aOWVW31ZDrUjuVBScAk95Cen5wzH70XTq8bcv7Ntf_evwMAAP___x1cSA) of spinoff films. ## Severe Weather in Texas and California
Extreme weather in the Southwest and West could intensify the Smokehouse Creek Fire in Texas and may produce 10 feet of snow in California's Sierra Nevada region. The Smokehouse Creek Fire, [Texas' largest wildfire on record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SozAQhJ9GZKKG0Q8QEFyizJdeSI3RYHQWiEKyWb_9Fhtv0p181d3V_27jjUIM2-MvrTyUOY00lfDmUUmUqEdd-WFmRlYVD00Lveqh6btqGWCe731nrfHG94zagDWtMtDdG-VZ9VUYEFCDAmzAWA01UduZRjeTIeruZIUG9qGko_6fwlYWnuMnvfmop7RWcVhK2bNQfwQ6ge48z_qVqSRPnwsQ6HJJx0eg2_jMl1EJaRPorlqBDtQlzQWu6clLemWW08H8lHM4WBb-oix32hbafGQZw5vla_dU-IprsQO0vQVoBbrqGPx-hhhDtq3Q8FgpxJ-h5bfXvgMAAP__y6Jrjg), is only 15% contained. It's killed two people and consumed more than 1 million acres of homes, businesses, and livestock. Light rain and snow have done little to slow the wildfire, and high winds are expected to fuel the flames. In California, expected powerful winds and [blizzard-like conditions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P4yAUAH-N3RHxaUNBcU26XHul9YBH8k4YLIwSbX79KltvOZpmNP9u2w2oUL3_hR39yG2DOOiJm2KSSb3pOfmMKFHN6MXKnXJcODs_vBQKrAl21QZMyqjAyRANLjrZJWCeyUsuNVdcCm4WzS8AqzVCi2gAbIBl0hwTjdYv_xvV8cBcvtoT-yW2fS7-McZxTurPJK-TvMJR8XV-1Af6oFhwktcIhXLrlYBVfEICdkCkTJGdo_WdhULvN_TEXtAr1Ttbs7VOBpelUVbboNcMwgQLQplgFjd3n44XlULnsk6a33eg8lM0ftvzHQAA___dqWYS) have forced the closure of ski resorts and Yosemite National Park. Heavy snow accumulations, tree damage, and power outages are also expected.
## University of Florida Removes DEI Staff
The University of Florida has [fired all employees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWBmKHgaGLt3TtaF3MkVx1NhbQUL991c6d_-XX93FbbkBM--MdNvQ1pgXWSi9cjNRS28V2wUdEjaZDP0zKGacGd-2e_u4sQJwmizg6d1dhMg4goBsDwGpsR14rbZVRelCX0aoeYLpeBjusF4DrHUZhFQaqKfefifb6xMhnemHu17R17J-1HkWYN6FnoefWWh_T946t_Hah5w0DgdDz104vzIXqKSOnTAFkpIxFArMMSBK3g9OJWOSatoMJ9hVlqVBRMrQu-3A0YqYyTsKqxwbEfwv1P4-fAAAA__8l-GTn) in its diversity, equity, and inclusion positions, in accordance with Florida state law. An official statement said that the university had "[closed its office](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd7ZgwcYUFH9DlzT_na60iFkne0eChYlR3v7k1NdMMxrNzPd1mk6eIj2uZ39HW5Y0-bnQjpNsoQU1qSbYBRFQNmiF5kYaLszY3GzQY4_hMqDRs4Awj8qr3hgYNF9m5KohCxwUlxwE7wfFO-_12Asl5t778eIHpjgGKil334ke5YZLfKUdczenexPtrZR1Y_IfA8fA1Vq750qHx8B9pHU6Y90YuM__DNzRxMBxeYhg4J4P2jFvVF7tElOm4NuFMm5tQGpryj-Yj7AW8n0K5Gh6Bq7JNqyVYqRt0Ezx691TfO8pf8H5DQAA__9YGmH5) of the chief diversity officer, eliminated DEI positions and administrative appointments, and halted DEI-focused contracts with outside vendors." Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis was a proponent of the law and [signed the legislation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7-OrSAQgPGnwQ4DA_4rKG5jd267pRll4MwGxQjR7Ntvduutv-LL7-O1vJATH_E_7uRqyAtulW9ajAQJdrGNd4EIyDTk9KAmMyk9jc3bGYsBQ-ignyiANwjBBtKrGrZ-G1do2IECq4wCrbreqhZxGDtt9dYhjiv2wiryXPPVfmY-6ptC-so3Xe2W9ya5d61nEeafgFnA_DxPW3E_MZw_XcAcUr7Yo4z5lp4KHpWLLByPIldOSVa8IlU-ovTEAubmcv58OCUu_SCsijty-n3Vv-DfAQAA__8jRVuJ) banning Florida colleges and universities from spending money on DEI initiatives last May. In a social media post Friday, [DeSantis wrote,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsUsGynCAQ_Bq8uQUDiB48pPJiTi-H5JCjhTjskkLZAGrt36fEJKd36oYeGpqZn-_ju3berfdvesE-2zBqk92OI6-hBjGKau4tIiCvsGeKdryjrGurR49taydlmUKmu4kzo4SxaORMOybUZCvXAwVBOQVGZSPoTWvVSiaYkVq3k26IoDi7HOLtV3BrfqD1r7BjvJmwVL5_5PxMhH8iMBAY8uFyvjQCw9ewfw_rG_7Qa3aJwJCyzttJmGp4IyWXSrYMqGx5R_gQ0Y4pGsLf8nEiSPkl24OAVJ_zYfTyvLYOxIzLhPNfJWNcivKR7VVyj6VAdJYy21AUaqJghOiws0xI1AwaybGBWfK2xX9XhrUcS2wk0JzP26In_O0KDfKMLc_gEobjOG537VZMu_Mery-QZ-YQX4WteKRCcN6Mzq6Yw3Dm2i7hbEUhlF_ACmyr2zEml191sLX1IbpZ19ZFTLX2vp7_y_h7O8Gtxm_JhbXG5enDC_HyV9BSJXhDqSrrKvbz83Deu9QoIuh90c6XxuaPpuxPAAAA__-TUMbT) "I'm glad that Florida was the first state to eliminate DEI and I hope more states follow suit."

clean_body: Extreme weather in the Southwest and Western parts of the U.S. could intensify the Smokehouse Creek Fire in Texas and produce at least 10 feet of snow in California's Sierra Nevada region. | | | | | | Saturday, March 2, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1933, King Kong debuted in New York City. It's often ranked as the greatest horror film of all time and has spawned a of spinoff films. () We've grown quite a bit lately (over 610,000!), and we want to welcome all our new subscribers. Thanks for coming aboard! If you have any ideas or suggestions about our newsletter, don't hesitate to hit the reply button. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . There's only one company that sells wireless-charging hearing aids for less than $100, and we're thrilled to have them sponsor our edition today. Check out ! | Severe Weather in Texas and California Extreme weather in the Southwest and West could intensify the Smokehouse Creek Fire in Texas and may produce 10 feet of snow in California's Sierra Nevada region. The Smokehouse Creek Fire, , is only 15% contained. It's killed two people and consumed more than 1 million acres of homes, businesses, and livestock. Light rain and snow have done little to slow the wildfire, and high winds are expected to fuel the flames. In California, expected powerful winds and have forced the closure of ski resorts and Yosemite National Park. Heavy snow accumulations, tree damage, and power outages are also expected. University of Florida Removes DEI Staff The University of Florida has in its diversity, equity, and inclusion positions, in accordance with Florida state law. An official statement said that the university had " of the chief diversity officer, eliminated DEI positions and administrative appointments, and halted DEI-focused contracts with outside vendors." Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis was a proponent of the law and banning Florida colleges and universities from spending money on DEI initiatives last May. In a social media post Friday, "I'm glad that Florida was the first state to eliminate DEI and I hope more states follow suit." Weekend Viewing Options New and returning shows have been slowly filtering into TV lineups as broadcasters recover from last year's entertainment strike. The Editor has been enjoying new episodes of "The Rookie," ABC and "Ghosts," CBS. Proving everything old is new again, "Shogun" this week. It's based on the same 1975 novel as the successful 1980 TV version starring Richard Chamberlain. It was also a big week for. Denis Villeneuve's "Dune: Part One" had its release on Hulu and Apple TV welcomed "Napoleon" by Ridley Scott and Joaquin Phoenix. Finally, a few suggestions from the Flyover staff: "" on Amazon Prime, "" on Peacock, and police comedy "" on Netflix. The judge said it wasn't discriminatory and could prevent "non-citizen voter fraud." () ➤ **A new poll indicated Rep. Adam Schiff is in a statistical tie with Republican candidate Steve Garvey in the race to fill California's vacant Senate seat. Garvey is polling at 27% and Schiff at 25%. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
I am not a career politician, but I think that’s good. If we want to take on Washington insiders, I need your help.

|

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6v7hekTlk4isetJjH8W47A5s1s3i2anQVoS0BUz6ll6gvbIdKdomla_Cv-tYnuLt2fQVdnh5ZZ1tCJfZPqh4-q-NL0mSnWyorFWVbYvdHANzUd4wr3W2LIcx0xEsX1cuOw8w38Xe4UdcMqrvKl6aLiPg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m running to flip Wisconsin **RED** because I have had it with business as usual in Washington. Career politicians and their radical Left-wing agenda are robbing future generations of the American Dream.

I’m running because I have had it with business as usual in Washington. Career politicians and their radical Left-wing agenda are robbing future generations of the American Dream.

I’ll be upfront with you. I’m NOT a career politician. I’m a proud husband, father, business owner, and fourth-generation Wisconsinite. I’m running to RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM. [**Will you join our fight?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6v9aNY4kXUvrBTkIypqpLBPp1YjtTvqZwJAAb8fRqFnz-qRugY3sp8p95cyGKD_6JtLnnRNp0zAOmFisCGfNTM8lGbt5hf4GsvaT_qs1P0DGJdXraq8jyXpf9l_3MzJUZ26XsHDEOJu9vu1raaGMlTwQ%3D%3D)

| [**JOIN ERIC >>>**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6vMBFAkUhuq7-rBDbKNl48la3bQeToFimPUfa0R1ne5duThSUGRj95Us8w84Ik36d6Gy6q-YSRBOwiGEpIpUUvFMf5siHOYLvKFyw1wzdm1nNGkmM7JlzXJurmmuTGzXm4_2ey5mixi5YiiCbz_YFtfg%3D%3D)
---

**My Democrat opponent, Tammy Baldwin, has been a career politician for 20 years and has voted with Biden over 95% of the time.** She’s supported Biden’s catastrophic open borders, letting drug cartels overwhelm our Southern Border and wreak havoc in communities across the country, and voted for Biden’s disastrous economic agenda that sent inflation skyrocketing.

_**Control of the Senate and the Presidency will come down to Wisconsin.**_ This will be the #1 battleground state for Republicans and Democrats. My opponent already has over $8,000,000 in the bank, with millions more pledged by Leftist special interest groups.

I haven’t spent 20 years building up a network of D.C. special interest groups to bail me out of a tough fight. [**I’m relying on the grassroots support from Conservatives like you to fuel our campaign to take back Wisconsin’s Senate seat and end the Democrats’ Majority.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6v2-QxaX03ooXWjtJbsXskUlj6FL2qacuokHLDWUhBRE0tgwst7P4-rEfRtpiphEWHBornPS2Jh8RSjRH21CRXhuCBcDUlTxj0iYK5H03DzOMSiqVGe2b34KtO7gAwrGVvWQlACnISEvzVvN-_Cm3V0A%3D%3D)

[**Will you join our fight to Restore the American Dream?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6vit6CWiRPfo80BV_Shorqgytlp-2oPyfRWlR3AlaXnurXRivWSJd1D5SMaDiPNjtdJT3uvQzRIUeJ1u-N_7p3CUik0BL14m3eO7B5ig9sFDmKdhEJ5Pq-2J37qBXq2nzvpe-WIkN7DLuw83rmRxa1sw%3D%3D)
[**JOIN ERIC >>**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50cc2ec91b654900af26d5f447a4db8d&_e=bVK6QIBiOzpJ4RDK3xJh3DtzzuphL08SoR-yP1YQ5-0eLyYb8AAUrCfSdF6tS_NeDIrRZQgVcapzJbuvRcbCrZC3Rpvbadi1hxxcoSwXSLow5pqGd16HejKtrKpSVYufXqa1afcQizu0l2PTKQ3Vl_IPOsY7IKPsw5A64NA1nCdK7SG7p9ZilhRJetg_3SjEFpyEl5Msd9j1hb6frodeqY319FTqYDjzNjgDVW89HxfRBiBK4GPvnxdcP_Dwzo6v1NQXQxfQBlWV9-eYS6pqWTFn46iV9rIKJnQLhAMHhb6TJF4R-mdgyt1kxkBTyv6Zz8sR4uOaLoxlAaWGzx4e7w-5NcsMrU4TZSBU0C3WkDNUyvFMJ_oBtFdjw3k0B5byU3zhO5Iu03YqW0-8NrTvxg%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec7f0ad97a914a10ac6b4303c4dfdddb&_e=hOv-KwMNHisN-3Zz-AOFcX6P-c0xR0H3nTWyF7tPubhGemCyi_niOSN3YqBIdTGZMBrU7tR82bU4WzVqjNA3yig9Hsr6vDD-YzRKQx4uJThfMvuWITCjgDXt1c1tLbkTndxbIeqy78lXSIjlEii-DBTkqqICtLAAI6fatmpR6-dBQptdkNVL13-cSFnKVQSV8y56fcVXBn58cK7jGJUg0k6alaxUeABOhHGT7YHTGlC4VCiY0JJu9xfcliQZ4AyCrWktrIS1OPV-NuGnN5EgyWu3ydNMLHtlrjxL8Bire9NEblro1J5abbgCBB43gtIm_s9wLMYIQDpYUgMkG2mBK67KIBCY5H4ziecCVD7N9fXXHOM0_s4XHGMV5SHcnhKCFuuY-ZbYBEBAXodZqRFg2I6hk0dDt22ErwGB-gzj60Z_hn0FmIj7DdA2bBZP1ZCV) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec7f0ad97a914a10ac6b4303c4dfdddb&_e=hOv-KwMNHisN-3Zz-AOFcX6P-c0xR0H3nTWyF7tPubhGemCyi_niOSN3YqBIdTGZMBrU7tR82bU4WzVqjNA3yig9Hsr6vDD-YzRKQx4uJThfMvuWITCjgDXt1c1tLbkTndxbIeqy78lXSIjlEii-DBTkqqICtLAAI6fatmpR6-dBQptdkNVL13-cSFnKVQSV8y56fcVXBn58cK7jGJUg0k6alaxUeABOhHGT7YHTGlC4VCiY0JJu9xfcliQZ4AyCrWktrIS1OPV-NuGnN5EgyWu3ydNMLHtlrjxL8Bire9MhWdtze4465T81OMAxM7aPZxDMxEmGFZIFee6OGupNoyrBV65icejt_k5UkXwA5x6Iwn_N6VJKGwp_BHmEr9_Ntz9y1GzQHpIjxDEYEgYaNvF3gEBw_ep4zzEAQ01jYDhFPrW1RGQmDsNIPhX7xZqY).

It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf6fb0c2057c4fd7a8d41499a35270e2&_e=H9DJ1ieyxNzn1YsmVVy1ihK9smInpdso8AMihYiKDSqfrZupXudeOlVjXYi7p1eO84mDglTRvaVT8xpWiiJcqlJ4v0Myt7q5pLXI6a_E4gN3JBGTpW3qwQiJV-j45dz8gU5Lyj4ug6zOAfMhzv1Jw2nH-LI_7fSV0Nq3HmNa7oZs01Nw6T0BcQvLsGqOAF2e3KjBy0c8GC0gyyr4pgEGaZMs2UDS-f-AkdqlcI_yRq9ZfbaaqhMkrctiX61flEk14_lTdy1dGUPBCR4Xf1TJNx04BaUgLfzni8wOL0SGwDNz9NB1yJVGYACx_UAxeBZgcGwjOt5Z9hCk69O3ijStPBaJCpR7jEJeHJC0R3P5fZnV29BJNxJHg65SNEB4l8sXEJyhBTh_RnWyzjpdhrnViUX492x_DVthsgX7G0R1W8R2LU6ahhdPbP6G-RJzCSTI) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf6fb0c2057c4fd7a8d41499a35270e2&_e=H9DJ1ieyxNzn1YsmVVy1ihK9smInpdso8AMihYiKDSqfrZupXudeOlVjXYi7p1eO84mDglTRvaVT8xpWiiJcqlJ4v0Myt7q5pLXI6a_E4gN3JBGTpW3qwQiJV-j45dz8gU5Lyj4ug6zOAfMhzv1Jw2nH-LI_7fSV0Nq3HmNa7oZs01Nw6T0BcQvLsGqOAF2e3KjBy0c8GC0gyyr4pgEGaZMs2UDS-f-AkdqlcI_yRq9ZfbaaqhMkrctiX61flEk14_lTdy1dGUPBCR4Xf1TJNx04BaUgLfzni8wOL0SGwDPqVO-Q2hPfWlnWwYaHhQEVrZ0IDmsYK1sCWnuJyQqiAxjGUlsN1k2fv82sgeTcWtYMOGnT8e6-UgNVFOof7DCFYcz1samKM15LG0OIkQerVfDMmAZhB7I1prQQ2aK1yelwlZBkLe_5iBYypzulDKyL).

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I need your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T765ad1e3-96bf-43ab-8ad9-a57046b8d6a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb679a80-5a10-4940-b26e-1489be8b7a20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, Let me put the bottom line upfront: I am running for Governor, and I need your support! Now, let me tell you why: Years ago, I swore my first oath to our Constitution. I enthusiastically embarked upon a journey and a career of public service — first in law enforcement and then at CIA. I worked at home and abroad to keep our country safe and protect the country I love. When my husband Adam and I moved our three daughters home to Virginia – just miles from where we had grown up – I thought my days of public service had come to a close. But after the 2016 election, our country was at a crossroads, and I envisioned what it could be if we flipped Virginia’s 7th District and made clear that the people of our district deserved stronger representation. I worked hard, we built an extraordinary team driven by purpose and principle, and in 2018, our district elected a Democrat – me – for the first time since 1968. I have served proudly through some extraordinarily consequential moments in our history, and I have endeavored to do right by my constituents every day. I am proud of the work I have done, the laws I have passed, and the difference I have made. And now, our Commonwealth is at another crossroads – do we continue moving backward with attacks on our rights, our kids’ education, and our communities’ sense of security — or do we move forward on a path of progress? Virginia’s elections showed that Virginians want to move forward, but we need a new Governor to be driving that progress. I am running for Governor, because I know what I will bring to the job – a deep and abiding love for our Commonwealth, a relentless work ethic, and a focus on bringing people together to solve the real challenges facing Virginians. [It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now and add your name to our growing list of supporters to endorse my campaign for Governor? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf9b71e4-dd3d-452b-92ee-920fdb30ceb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| Thank you, Abigail
---

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/V32UKDZfR4D4Adhw1tEM-w)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our ‘Back the Blue Petition’ and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/-takNvglUtgKWKpZZaNezA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/zAL3MaZ_JRc64MidEQWBrw)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ _defund the police_.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/kji2VIwqp_LArUQj1AcUSw)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/KNz0kCFQ7ZRIUw1Or0gSAg)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/eLjnFWMFG2Tqp1EvLcIzGw)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force._
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/RYFMhOk2NY6O5pNiH5xQ7g)
---
_The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation._
---
**[If you ‘Back the Blue’ — and believe that we must support local heroes — please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/bh0FIwGFR4enLR49D6hXnA)** While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/3dyXHHSVwCZWMDESjpEvZA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDcwMTEifQ/HllujNhBcN8Yagn-xz-irg)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDYyLTQyZjUwNzY3OWY3ODQzZDNiNmVjZWM1OGE0MWQyNjkyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/FFXdttcSMWo8t2DD42TNvA) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ defund the police.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force. The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation. While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Faith and Liberty News

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Mark Twain is now available on DVD
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0f86fca10424ecdbb2a31f005b606fe&_e=9rntabZKoI5LL657Vv0PKQQv9NIGa5F8sT7Rs3vONMVmjRSFH3BBhJA7FXJI3TrF2zwVsk0CDNn9fRURnEFI5gTecYUIlEuExjW1dEjosW7Y18Q7xqZ02DTG03hAH2FwDxFJWqVd007cfRvOUzxKTsY4hSzX0AjY6tI2mfUYOODXwQoFzNVc2xjCitTbVY8vRg58g1EQN-6kkktG1A-07l-4vM69eQWFjTD-_Bt_vC9YJbY4EFhZEFTeuEyWLw31ILKxDZhsLWB1M748ouFECfPYXX3b5khutVAs4BYfUuE9u9XA30OuAdabaqhB_ypfeFiC6lZ5MNOZhUOw8BMMLB6yeMunECFeMc9-lYb3ma4BS3Wk7DiLtquwP-9fSMEooIpRuvnRymJry4TZX-i2txErSNwwX6OTBEsXOw6n7uQ2u6-pkzR0R9dmhs-HOwQP)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0f86fca10424ecdbb2a31f005b606fe&_e=9rntabZKoI5LL657Vv0PKQQv9NIGa5F8sT7Rs3vONMVmjRSFH3BBhJA7FXJI3TrF2zwVsk0CDNn9fRURnEFI5gTecYUIlEuExjW1dEjosW7Y18Q7xqZ02DTG03hAH2FwDxFJWqVd007cfRvOUzxKTsY4hSzX0AjY6tI2mfUYOODXwQoFzNVc2xjCitTbVY8vRg58g1EQN-6kkktG1A-07l-4vM69eQWFjTD-_Bt_vC9YJbY4EFhZEFTeuEyWLw31ILKxDZhsLWB1M748ouFECfPYXX3b5khutVAs4BYfUuGgyHRfUNEMs3Tv-Qj9TomP0oQEIXZ-rmmnCTuuuTVbSdY9g_XnICwcNdaFRidtXOrmdEQvOuniH4ATJeAgLG7EyvxOOmJCe2jQlO0pb3k1XAk45HJ_GHd2ZMmzwauZAYJjDAF72UQw6w6EXwW1diHZ) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0f86fca10424ecdbb2a31f005b606fe&_e=9rntabZKoI5LL657Vv0PKQQv9NIGa5F8sT7Rs3vONMVmjRSFH3BBhJA7FXJI3TrF2zwVsk0CDNn9fRURnEFI5gTecYUIlEuExjW1dEjosW7Y18Q7xqZ02DTG03hAH2FwDxFJWqVd007cfRvOUzxKTsY4hSzX0AjY6tI2mfUYOODXwQoFzNVc2xjCitTbVY8vRg58g1EQN-6kkktG1A-07l-4vM69eQWFjTD-_Bt_vC9YJbY4EFhZEFTeuEyWLw31ILKxDZhsLWB1M748ouFECfPYXX3b5khutVAs4BYfUuE4qowbtdusnR6z3YWq0IzvKdQDFR8QTILRFttPYiuun4EWMIdJaZ1FFFzmxcL1RwpseSSVOKhiC2IobO8UMR01Z880t5Ej6Z1EDES_AvtzFijky8pEmDHH__w3L6KjestcUzXu-nNdEymBd_zc_B-y).

name: Patti Reilly
subject: The anti-police mob is putting my son in jail
body:
I know you and I have never met. But I’m praying that you’ll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

Dear Friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GW_FtzdyjoxVK3qX0mfzZg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi85NmMxM2ViYy1iNTc1LTQ1NTYtOTg5Ni1iNTBmMTA5MWVlZTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMzAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oqva424MAjAybkGqKXlA0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saWNlZGVmZW5zZS5vcmcvVwNzcGNCCmXihRHjZbLI98dSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mWH7muplyQLToyxnTkvH_g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQudXNjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXR3b3JrLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZeKFEeNlssj3x1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lsTBHCm-wCp-NMLGwvkY8A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxafQP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZW5ldHdvcmsuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpl4oUR42WyyPfHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

subject: My father knows a winner when he sees one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
My Father Knows a winner when he sees one.

| |
---
| | | My father knows a winner when he sees one.

His endorsement record is near perfect.

_**He 's placed his trust in thousands of conservative candidates up & down the ballot to hold the line against the radical left, defend the MAGA movement & defend YOU.**_

One of them that stands out the most to me is Monica De La Cruz.

Monica is an America First patriot & she isn't afraid to show it.

**She 's pro-life, pro-border security, pro-law enforcement, and 100% PRO TRUMP. **
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fp7x7j690LOZwQrQiRnO9A~~/AARclAA~-ZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---

---

In the 2022 midterms, she flipped a seat on our southern border from blue to red for the first time ever and humiliated Joe Biden & Nancy Pelosi.

But now the Democrats are out for revenge & will spend millions to steal this seat back from us simply because she stands strongly with my father & the MAGA movement.

body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f943d58c1e6b462785f78146f4ffd72a&_e=uWO1Uc4VItsZK1l-RErw2avMNLijeLJ1x7KSKkjIFFWBZQ4oCCHrDdqVW5nyet1ULOmDVS27nJniKGJDgg2hJswgTg_rBiekVXdtUKe1O8dxFqAhxS8i0MqqtBXNb3d0fKc7RozzmMqqpqwZP9fsi7mxNB8mEuHCTXl4VaKw-G0a5Gi9WaqgDRewWKwF16VKX7MmIXhtUeTHP4koWDCWdsR9i_zm1jnug0svVoxPNGlsb9nXpSl29p6M-yK0T1kpa_ZR5xn_PGJdC2gJc08xKmQI_eAf44vDw0aGPWUn07yddqiWGWAYBEu6hw-LFkGVww0euE6xeUYocg4C94R5TIp3rkqq5t95ZpJnJeJ79IXdJKfoFjamq2zAlCbsc5Eo1FPpNMDQl2C7xonEQGgTvU3UQN1x_QhBHseti_Jsg4AMCE3_8OaNkV48hJFuXRAZCmXE0IqD2JFcZOoBLWoP7g%3D%3D)

Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. _That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f943d58c1e6b462785f78146f4ffd72a&_e=uWO1Uc4VItsZK1l-RErw2avMNLijeLJ1x7KSKkjIFFWBZQ4oCCHrDdqVW5nyet1ULOmDVS27nJniKGJDgg2hJswgTg_rBiekVXdtUKe1O8dxFqAhxS8i0MqqtBXNb3d0fKc7RozzmMqqpqwZP9fsi7mxNB8mEuHCTXl4VaKw-G0a5Gi9WaqgDRewWKwF16VKX7MmIXhtUeTHP4koWDCWdsR9i_zm1jnug0svVoxPNGlsb9nXpSl29p6M-yK0T1kpa_ZR5xn_PGJdC2gJc08xKmQI_eAf44vDw0aGPWUn07wai8DQAvmNhU5-j3CIUl9n4DzZ9jLLFTNJPqnucS3HB3ty4jfl5DHZgNIJv65a0feaGLgB9ZnPbnJvEOGLMEKPNHJPB4rdcEZQofHxo1sG7Gc6XcyCnbmmsow63a9YO6I4u4I528vKpKKistm8ElxSKp90VeyOQRjIF5XbFqfmKw%3D%3D) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f943d58c1e6b462785f78146f4ffd72a&_e=uWO1Uc4VItsZK1l-RErw2avMNLijeLJ1x7KSKkjIFFWBZQ4oCCHrDdqVW5nyet1ULOmDVS27nJniKGJDgg2hJswgTg_rBiekVXdtUKe1O8dxFqAhxS8i0MqqtBXNb3d0fKc7RozzmMqqpqwZP9fsi7mxNB8mEuHCTXl4VaKw-G0a5Gi9WaqgDRewWKwF16VKX7MmIXhtUeTHP4koWDCWdsR9i_zm1jnug0svVoxPNGlsb9nXpSl29p6M-yK0T1kpa_ZR5xn_PGJdC2gJc08xKmQI_eAf44vDw0aGPWUn07ytdNOp2PcQlkSqsFMvskLOR7btkK__G1HKomabrS1z3amEzz4Rc0oLjfkWt3fkmYGmjLjqMWGqWIhGf68zOUDQ722GgQ7hALq8HKe9PdBt61G1Bo5TNnvqbTAGOLkehV8MaGaBbXsW0jHvgfherkArkqaQtGTOL7wkzd-nBV_3_A%3D%3D)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... body:

| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/0978d41f76b0012b3947229f28c3afba/400ecb11ba0a57d0c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Friend, Primary Election Day in Texas is on Tuesday, March 5th, just a few days away! If you haven’t voted yet, March 5th is the last day you can vote in the primary election. I’m on the ballot in Texas’s 22nd district. And I URGE you to get out and vote for me and other principled conservatives who will take the fight to the radical left. **[**You can confirm your polling place using this secure link >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/0978d41f76b0012b3947229f28c3afba/3046f333bc9bf0cbc3d6b838967d376c/35193)** I also encourage you to reach out to your family and friends and ask them to get out and vote. Or, better yet, bring them to the polls with you if possible! In this do-or-die election year, we need EVERY conservative Texan to GET ACTIVE and help defeat the crooks who are running our country. Your voice matters – and I need your help to SAVE AMERICA. **Please take a second to let me know you’re on board and plan to vote this upcoming Tuesday:**
---
[**PLEDGE TO VOTE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/0978d41f76b0012b3947229f28c3afba/46e15f4d89f130cac3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Thank you for fighting by my side in this battle. It means more to me than you will ever know! -Troy E. Nehls

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571785?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Mississippi could be on the cusp of real change. Maybe. **

A number of truly excellent bills on education reform now sit before the state legislature. We find out this coming week if our lawmakers will get to vote on any of them.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=90f7375401&e=5703353baa)
---
_What are the chances of real change? Douglas Carswell on Supertalk_
| For years, any bills that looked as though they might deliver meaningful education freedom got killed off in committee.

**Will do-nothing inertia prevail again? Or are our overwhelmingly conservative lawmakers going to actually deliver mainstream conservative education policy?**

This time there may just be enough momentum to see real change.

**Sixty of Mississippi’s top business leaders have just come out in support of the****Mississippi Student Freedom Act.** They signed a letter calling for change similar to what Arkansas has just introduced. If business leaders say we need change, I am hopeful that our lawmakers will listen.

**Mississippi is now surrounded by states embracing education reform.** Arkansas has already passed a version of HB1449 now before the Mississippi state legislature. **In his state of the state address, Governor Bill Lee of Tennessee championed an almost identical system of Education Freedom Scholarships.** Alabama and Louisiana are poised to follow.
---
|
---
_Principled support for authentic school choice: what leadership looks like_
| **I am not sure that school choice can be killed off quietly anymore.** (See the fate of various anti-school choice Republicans in Texas and Tennessee for details.)

Perhaps the most compelling case for change comes from the facts. **The system we have today just isn’t that good at turning education tax dollars into excellent schooling for every child.**

A report from the Reason Foundation this week shows per student spending is at a record high in Mississippi. Between 2002 and 2020, the amount spent per student in this state each year rose from $8,878 to $10,774. That is an increase of over a fifth, at a time when the number of students fell by over 5 percent.

**More money. Fewer students. Surely that meant more money for the classroom?**

Tragically, no. While the number of teachers rose over that time by a mere 1 percent, there was a five times faster increase in administrators. Worse, teacher pay over that period actually fell.

**Last week, the big news from Mississippi’s Republican-controlled House was that they passed Medicaid expansion. Let’s hope that the House will support conservative education policies.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1fd84f3555&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. I love Mississippi - which is why I named my podcast “I love Mississippi”.** Here is our most downloaded episode over the past month: [MISSISSIPPI JOINS THE SOUTHERN SUCCESS STORY](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9d3f2bcf01&e=5703353baa)
