subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58c8529c8c0c4b29a8ed3318468ee40d&_e=9qgVocTv90svk6sY9sFdbV0Kmu7La4oMiV_0PMt82-oldMy4SDbc3HqD26qUY21L7Mi1ZZu8BrBmVw8ZUFsZv-8E-f0MLrWkrRkRLj78BPC7YOCfvHw5K2HBFc8qnNbXTcMwCg1nId2fiIAz1_xeoevpxeJd2yfC86P2hFLmCVFyefQGoI1TwdNEw78FBgBYfusX6HJ8uu1LC4wg7Dv_b4RgMmxGiOv1xWy49S8webC5bls1RCYx96eIYiNDIx6kKsGELrSgXXjw9wpECrEXDOW6gu9Mky2HHbTB8qLXpgR4BVHUZiQN3ct6AZEv5KxlfyUWUzSZACJHfbQQLCzkWIIT1WR_OgDBJVt3zlbZkClq5ZviBmfLd1w7Z1VmIM2_bWGgDk5r0y1OiSSeDs8OHBN48I_NhcJ2x4O1BYedUjAyRJQfQ0Xz10tjA9GQckVnPUALwVURU1wWoq4n4Xe2ww%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58c8529c8c0c4b29a8ed3318468ee40d&_e=9qgVocTv90svk6sY9sFdbV0Kmu7La4oMiV_0PMt82-oldMy4SDbc3HqD26qUY21L7Mi1ZZu8BrBmVw8ZUFsZv-8E-f0MLrWkrRkRLj78BPC7YOCfvHw5K2HBFc8qnNbXTcMwCg1nId2fiIAz1_xeoevpxeJd2yfC86P2hFLmCVFyefQGoI1TwdNEw78FBgBYfusX6HJ8uu1LC4wg7Dv_b4RgMmxGiOv1xWy49S8webC5bls1RCYx96eIYiNDIx6kKsGELrSgXXjw9wpECrEXDOW6gu9Mky2HHbTB8qLXpgQM_dsDlyVRM07xkfyRBKWB288kK-1F-Y_df5UEnihk-ygxiPk8sygT3WMvsGgrzTaQGQMhHpjvmrSL9jh8gSPRjf0Bhdd8WxBbEg4mtt5yP6lY4V2UvWkKEEMS3l3dEqFvx_Vx5Y6vye6f_9YT-Nh-YupDyZBby96RxIsYiL7amQ%3D%3D)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58c8529c8c0c4b29a8ed3318468ee40d&_e=9qgVocTv90svk6sY9sFdbV0Kmu7La4oMiV_0PMt82-oldMy4SDbc3HqD26qUY21L7Mi1ZZu8BrBmVw8ZUFsZv-8E-f0MLrWkrRkRLj78BPC7YOCfvHw5K2HBFc8qnNbXTcMwCg1nId2fiIAz1_xeoevpxeJd2yfC86P2hFLmCVFyefQGoI1TwdNEw78FBgBYfusX6HJ8uu1LC4wg7Dv_b4RgMmxGiOv1xWy49S8webC5bls1RCYx96eIYiNDIx6kKsGELrSgXXjw9wpECrEXDOW6gu9Mky2HHbTB8qLXpgQ8ehlYn6uiOSq_pJ2lpPew4qXzJ3rU1axnJm94LwspKmjlgu2FkHk7_i3KjI0Yapp5jopU1UbiyiGwvf382D4T6bx-Dm2SLSiKCrWELdx2VEfhWILth-iANsPTNHB0RygceNshLEL-4Pcpa00smIvPEn-o8Ty4Q1IpUW3Y6L7bUg%3D%3D)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Jim Daly, Focus on the Family
subject: Saving mothers and babies from abortion
body:
Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound.

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound. ** Thanks to the support of pro-life Americans just like you, Focus on the Family’s _Option Ultrasound_ _Program_ has saved more than half a million babies in the past two decades. [**You can save a mother and her baby from abortion with your gift of $60 today. Please help us make ultrasounds possible for abortion-vulnerable women.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
[DONATE NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. But with free ultrasounds made possible through _Option Ultrasound_ , mothers have the opportunity to hear the beat of their baby’s heart. **When a mother sees her baby sucking its tiny thumb or wriggling on an ultrasound, she won’t be deceived by the abortionists’ claims that babies are “blobs of tissue” in the womb.** [**Your support will equip life-affirming pregnancy centers across the country with ultrasound machines, resources, and nurses’ sonography training so abortion-vulnerable mothers can meet their babies... and be moved to choose life.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Studies show that women who have abortions are more likely to suffer from depression, anxiety, PTSD, and substance abuse, as compared to those who give birth. Carrie — a young woman who chose abortion — shared, “Legalized abortion has created a culture where you feel like abortion is the only choice. That’s not empowerment for women. That’s bondage.” After ending the life of her baby, Carrie says she was “foundering in relationships and medicating (her) emotional pain with alcohol.” She was tormented by the fact that she had paid someone to end her child’s life. [**While nothing will bring Carrie’s baby back, you can prevent another mother from making the same heartbreaking decision with your gift of $60 today. Every $60 we raise will save an additional life thanks to the power of an ultrasound.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Thanks to generous donors, we also run My Choice Network — an online resource that connects expectant moms with pregnancy medical centers. Since the network launched in 2020, more than 250,000 appointments have been made at life-saving centers. You can also help us increase our presence in high-risk areas and train physicians and nurses in abortion pill reversal — trainings that have saved more than 3,000 lives in less than four years. **[**Please help with your immediate gift of $60 or more today and save the life of a baby today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**
---
[DONATE NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Thank you for your support!
---
---
Jim Daly President, Focus on the Family P.S. **[Give now to join our campaign this month and save mothers and babies from the tragedy of abortion!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Re9Sxy_N2NX3VEOE6mCNSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxbwWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZm9jdXNvbnRoZWZhbWlseS5jb20vZG9uLWNybS1meTI0LWFlLXNvaGw_cmVmY2Q9MjAyNTIwNVcDc3BjQgpl4sUf42WifjlOUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Focus on the Family 8605 Explorer Dr. Colorado Springs, CO 80920 1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459)

Restore Our Nation

Jim Daly President, Focus on the Family P.S. ~~ Focus on the Family 8605 Explorer Dr. Colorado Springs, CO 80920 1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459) | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_gziJpfKFPxj6JgSMvYF9A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxcN4P0RkaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDMwMlcDc3BjQgpl4uIf42WicMO3UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_gziJpfKFPxj6JgSMvYF9A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxcN4P0RkaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDMwMlcDc3BjQgpl4uIf42WicMO3UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_gziJpfKFPxj6JgSMvYF9A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxcN4P0RkaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjAzMDEyNF9STV9DQl8yMDI0MDMwMlcDc3BjQgpl4uIf42WicMO3UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bf1c30b11ab4150a5714e62c5cf88ce&_e=9gpkSJzAzNW_nbrnoCw64WrrARjLx8q2OI7reBw_Lsn7u4K9sBusMbz2H1b7zx95D7a9fqdSzQI6wUGFmPSULDpNQ6xOo7PzoGIxNL18CztUwl8_qVGkRdSmQ6r-OOx4xUY0eMFp6EfDdava6p_4IdvcLLiD2Vp0KSzy1qtKJ26aTBKN2yC9HMVCBPIobmcDKy4SB2itd70qkqqZAZjabFtsCwlXgWYMljz910gxkN7kMmYfsT3T3RHm5yxj6fqZ3YnPSyad8QjWuESpVtpERg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bf1c30b11ab4150a5714e62c5cf88ce&_e=9gpkSJzAzNW_nbrnoCw64WrrARjLx8q2OI7reBw_Lsn7u4K9sBusMbz2H1b7zx95D7a9fqdSzQI6wUGFmPSULDpNQ6xOo7PzoGIxNL18CztUwl8_qVGkRdSmQ6r-OOx4Sf68epiwAVSn7asax3caMiEelBFdYw3RJ0-U0EMGNuDUdVBbcR9iq_8d9T3He0KFS-YUgLJN4feBxcMrQqSHnpuWzC0ExRaL0OV3G1XzN9uRzu-9fhsRI4jChQLavckhwtwk6orOTqD4ojcNPFk0cQ%3D%3D)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bf1c30b11ab4150a5714e62c5cf88ce&_e=9gpkSJzAzNW_nbrnoCw64WrrARjLx8q2OI7reBw_Lsn7u4K9sBusMbz2H1b7zx95D7a9fqdSzQI6wUGFmPSULDpNQ6xOo7PzoGIxNL18CztUwl8_qVGkRdSmQ6r-OOx46zCWPv5zHQbQgf5ydDcNMw4y463v3s1fubdvZBCPxHIm3r9RpfTlmfqIFEs-6b_zrKUI6icOdk3zkHostMZP9xmGpAa0Gkifrnw4eMpwUXLlpVQCxlm9m_1LhefXYD6Jx1IPcnz7qJQLUZ85TFITvg%3D%3D)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bf1c30b11ab4150a5714e62c5cf88ce&_e=9gpkSJzAzNW_nbrnoCw64WrrARjLx8q2OI7reBw_Lsn7u4K9sBusMbz2H1b7zx95D7a9fqdSzQI6wUGFmPSULDpNQ6xOo7PzoGIxNL18CztUwl8_qVGkRdSmQ6r-OOx4ryIp7ex8a-3tG4ojFszLnHoVCwXEWW1YRCGmMXjTiMKH8NTtrFz5_1w9Rgly2yG4Nzz9E7OPX2t0EoIO0BumZVf31-ERb1mZj-ySZc12MuNzYaIyZ8s62A604gZLNQostH3BSoo1EPIbN3Wr1vv3sQ%3D%3D)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bf1c30b11ab4150a5714e62c5cf88ce&_e=9gpkSJzAzNW_nbrnoCw64WrrARjLx8q2OI7reBw_Lsn7u4K9sBusMbz2H1b7zx95D7a9fqdSzQI6wUGFmPSULDpNQ6xOo7PzoGIxNL18CztUwl8_qVGkRdSmQ6r-OOx4GOpV6f9y1No3M6q5nQeJ72DGZzTUWR_7ifpIlRzBYsOXsnaAkLk2a2rpy4KOglyqVkHfmN2IY0TqXbVAbrDR5dNx0LXZNU51srT9ad-AjgjbLyECxh_a_CFdp_4XtY1-GyRSyRoK00UeDsHJevsl2g%3D%3D)
---

body:
As promised, here are the results from our first-ever Vice Presidential Poll.

|
---
| | | **[As promised, here are the results from our first-ever Vice Presidential Poll.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_poll_3_2_24_rs_nd3&n=1)
**

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_poll_3_2_24_rs_nd3&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Last week, thousands of you participated in our 2024 Flash Poll.
We asked you to tell us what you wanted in a Vice Presidential pick – and you responded in a BIG WAY with almost 14,000 votes.
As promised, here are the results from our first-ever Vice Presidential Poll – winning choices highlighted in yellow below:
Character
A) Committed to Telling the Truth - 48%
B) Willing to Put Country Ahead of Personal Interests - 28%
C) Courage to Make the Tough Decisions - 11%
D) Listens to Multiple Viewpoints - 12%
E) Other - 1%
Issues
A) End Foreign Wars - 22%
B) Secure the Border - 23%
C) Fight Censorship - 11%
D) Hold Government Accountable - 31%
E) Balance the budget - 9%
F) Other - 4%
Qualifications
A) Political Experience - 5%
B) Successful outside of Politics - 15%
C) Maintain his/her composure - 6%
D) Work with both Political Parties - 28%
E) Advocate for Unity - 25%
F) Passionate for Children’s Health - 16%
G) Other - 1%
What is the most important to you?
A) Character - 72%
B) Issues - 23%
C) Qualifications - 4%
D) Other - 1%
It's clear from these results that _character and a commitment to honesty_ are paramount to our supporters, closely followed by addressing critical issues such as _border security and government accountability_.
As we progress, we'll keep these insights in mind as we strive to represent your voices and values in our mission to build a better future for all Americans.
Your input shapes our strategy and guides our decisions, and we're grateful for your continued engagement.
But we need your support to keep our momentum going and continue to fight for the values you've expressed in this poll. [Can you contribute today to help us push forward our mission of representing the people's voice and values?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_poll_3_2_24_rs_nd3&n=3)
[Donate Now >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_poll_3_2_24_rs_nd3&n=4)
Stay tuned for more opportunities to share your thoughts and shape the direction of our movement.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_poll_3_2_24_rs_nd3&n=5)

Your input shapes our strategy and guides our decisions, and we're grateful for your continued engagement. But we need your support to keep our momentum going and continue to fight for the values you've expressed in this poll. Stay tuned for more opportunities to share your thoughts and shape the direction of our movement. Thank you for your unwavering support. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWyuu4aiNp

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWyuu4aiNp

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: FEC Deadline Month (explained)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)

Friend --
It's March, so that means we're right around the corner from our important Federal Election Commission deadline: At the end of this month, we’ll have an "end-of-quarter" deadline, closing our “Q1,” which is the first quarter of the election year.
Let me quickly explain what this actually means.
Each year, candidates running for federal office face four quarterly deadlines: March 31st, June 30th, September 30th, and December 31st. After these deadlines pass, so in this case, coming up on March 31st, we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised, and from how many individual contributions.
These quarterly reports are pored over by political folks and the press as an indicator of the strength of a campaign. Have lots of early support from a large number of individual supporters? Your campaign appears on track. Not meeting internal goals and only raising from a few folks? Not a great start to the election year.
But for a campaign like mine, this deadline is particularly important because I’m not taking any money from corporate PACs to fund this campaign.
It’s a pledge I made in my very first campaign for elected office in 2018, and it’s one I’ve stuck to. That’s because I never wanted anyone to wonder if I voted a certain way because of donations a corporate PAC made. But it makes donations from individuals that much more important.
I’m therefore working hard to ensure the FEC report we file after March 31st shows the strength of our grassroots supporters. And that strength comes from people like you donating to emails like these.
[**So please, will you consider making your first contribution to my Senate campaign today?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=2&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-mar24.radpj1&amount=3&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=21&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-mar24.tT69PV&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=22&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-mar24.bHdrFB&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=23&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-mar24.Zz-2ft&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=24&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-mar24.eLk0oo&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=25&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-mar24.radpj1&refcode=em240302-1-700&t=26&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER)**
---
****
Thank you for your support – I couldn’t do this without you!
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1188%2E135344%2EVC4lER).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A day we won’t forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
We need strong defenders of our democracy in office. That’s me and Harry Dunn | |

I’ve been attacked, insulted and threatened by MAGA Republicans for my work to defend our democracy and hold Trump accountable – and so has my friend Harry Dunn.

[**_Now, with just a few days until my primary election for the U.S. Senate race in California, I’m hoping you will split $10 or any amount between my campaign and Harry Dunn’s campaign. Now more than ever, we need strong defenders of our democracy in office._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80140843/458503717/1069493458?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.02_B1_Schiff-Split_T1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY4OTM2MjUtOWRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yq8D5efkQcy555jh4FhOpXKFWT2s72Sey6bGFKIXNKk=) | [RUSH $10 NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80140848/458503726/1069493458?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.02_B1_Schiff-Split_T1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY4OTM2MjUtOWRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yq8D5efkQcy555jh4FhOpXKFWT2s72Sey6bGFKIXNKk=)
---
Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on our democracy as January 6, 2021.

I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday. Because I was there, on the House floor, when insurrectionists broke into the building and stormed the place.

The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol, breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves.

The sight of Capitol police officers, like Harry, running toward danger, protecting everyone inside, regardless of their party or politics. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, grabbing masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the halls of Congress.

You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely.

**Team, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did.**

After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today.

_Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties._

Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, and fellow Republican presidential candidates vowing to pardon him and try to erase history.

I worked to hold Trump and the MAGA leaders that enabled him accountable on the January 6 Select Committee of Congress. That’s where I worked with Harry, who was one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists and testified in front of our committee despite the trauma and threats that haunted him.

**It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will.**

We need leaders in Congress who will defend our democracy. Protect our rule of law. Hold those who desecrate our institutions accountable.

[**_That’s what Harry and I will do — but we need your help to make it to the House and the Senate. Will you please split a contribution of $10 to our campaigns today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80140854/458503731/1069493458?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.02_B1_Schiff-Split_T1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY4OTM2MjUtOWRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yq8D5efkQcy555jh4FhOpXKFWT2s72Sey6bGFKIXNKk=)

clean_body: We need strong defenders of our democracy in office. That’s me and Harry Dunn | | = = Team, this is Adam Schiff. I’ve been attacked, insulted and threatened by MAGA Republicans for my work to defend our democracy and hold Trump accountable – and so has my friend Harry Dunn. = | = Few days in our country’s history have made as big of an impact on our democracy as January 6, 2021. I remember the January 6th attack on the Capitol like it was yesterday. Because I was there, on the House floor, when insurrectionists broke into the building and stormed the place. The sounds of yelling. Of insurrectionists storming the Capitol, breaking doors and windows to get in. Of the whispers between members of Congress deciding how to protect ourselves. The sight of Capitol police officers, like Harry, running toward danger, protecting everyone inside, regardless of their party or politics. Of my colleagues crouched on the floor, grabbing masks to protect themselves from tear gas. Of thousands of protestors assaulting Capitol Police and desecrating the halls of Congress. You could sense the fear and the urgency. And the anger over what this mob was doing to overturn a free and fair election. And then, finally, once the fighting was over and we had fulfilled our duty to certify the election, the recognition that our democracy had survived, but barely. Team, I will remember that day for a long time. But I will also remember what my GOP colleagues in Congress did. After the rioting and the mayhem, a majority of Republican members still voted to overturn the election. Still. 147 members of Congress — many of whom are still in office today. Insurrectionists, too. Albeit in suits and ties. Since that day, we have seen nothing but continued threats to our Constitution and our democracy — by way of election deniers running for office, members of Congress continuing to support Donald Trump, and fellow Republican presidential candidates vowing to pardon him and try to erase history. I worked to hold Trump and the MAGA leaders that enabled him accountable on the January 6 Select Committee of Congress. That’s where I worked with Harry, who was one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists and testified in front of our committee despite the trauma and threats that haunted him. It’s going to take hard work by everyone to move this country forward and finally relegate Trump to the dustbin of history. But we will. We need leaders in Congress who will defend our democracy. Protect our rule of law. Hold those who desecrate our institutions accountable. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for all your support during this pivotal time in our history. — Adam = = | = = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

Friend, My state Representative Paul Holvey has served as a steadfast champion for our climate, working families, and the people of Eugene since 2004. _TBH, Paul was a Green New Dealer since before it was cool._ Working in the Oregon House of Representatives, I've seen Paul’s leadership up close, and it has been a master class in progressive politics and the art of legislating. I am proud to call him my legislator, neighbor, a mentor, and friend. I congratulate Paul on a well deserved retirement to enjoy with Terrie and their family. And I am grateful to Paul for his two decades of service. **Today I am proud to step forward as a Democratic candidate for House District 08, to continue to carry Eugene's progressive values forward in Salem.** _With only 10 days to go before the filing deadline for the May 21 election, we will be working through the weekend to get our campaign off to a strong start._ We will accept no funding from the fossil fuel industry, big Pharma, or other corporate PACs. That's why I am counting on you to**make a contribution right now.**

body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08a51ebe-053f-4028-85f3-ad523a00724c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter – I’ve worked in politics for half a century, so believe me when I tell you: **Democrats are in BIG trouble.** The 2024 Senate map is the toughest one I’ve ever seen. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies will use every trick up their sleeves to snatch back power.**** **The GOP is coming at us with full force – and with experts saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, they’re zeroing in on Jacky Rosen as a TOP target for defeat. Now, brand new polling shows the Nevada Senate race in a statistical dead heat!!! It’s not looking good, Peter.** [**Jacky needs to raise another $3,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP attacks and fuel her campaign forward – but the ONLY way she can get there is with your immediate grassroots support. So PLEASE, will you split a $20 donation between her campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe3ba647-e5d0-40f4-a361-3bc0482ee5c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Democrats won in Nevada by less than 1% last year, making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Now that they have a second chance at winning in Nevada, Republicans aren’t going to leave anything up to chance – and they’re already pulling out all of the stops to flip this seat. **If Jacky loses in Nevada, McConnell and his far-right posse will take back the majority and enact their dangerous, out-of-touch agenda. We CANNOT let this happen.** In my expert opinion, we CAN win this race and keep control of the Senate – but that starts with raising the resources, today, to prepare for the tough fight ahead. [**So please, Peter, I’m asking you one more time before the midnight deadline: Will you chip in as much as you can spare to Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action now to help her win in Nevada and defend our majority?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0f8dcb3-115d-42d7-9833-c01b99b6168d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **** Thank you for being part of this incredible team. I’ve seen many grassroots campaigns in my lifetime, and I know this one has what it takes to win. James Carville

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04ba7d1c-70b1-46ce-8342-e4ae65a647a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team DLCC
subject: Question for You:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Abortion rights will only get worse if more Republicans take power this fall. We must capitalize on every opportunity to elect Democrats who will strengthen reproductive freedoms. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**_Did you ever imagine living in a world where the generation before you had more freedoms?_** Neither did we. But that’s exactly what’s happening right before our eyes. The reality is: We’re living in a post-_Roe_ United States, and abortion rights will only get worse if more Republicans take power this fall. We must capitalize on every opportunity to elect Democrats who will strengthen reproductive freedoms.**We’re counting on you to give our party the support it needs in this pivotal moment.** [Rush $7 to elect state Democrats who will fight back against the GOP’s far-right agenda and protect abortion access nationwide. The fight starts with you. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_97YiXbqIrSSzziB6IrVfRwCct7Xpx80s-ajAWFwbsSVfNzu3g-x7UtJnN5GSYN6G8zGbz0_bUcxSNZ1gaW2kLJM3HvWCEaDwfeWLROSwi2ZbaMf0Tx9FYpT1tU8ZSXfdPY7wi5HG_W2uaJFWkZuOx2lUe8FCfWlaALBr6lOTZf-R3wpRln3_2bc6SzfYTsGzrn_YLkevscSvT6ExeyDWvspF6dOi10yOrl_BcY18ySef3yUwYcNMbcoC1FcXkhM9N2wTFHu8dvYRKhZdb8V47dDiy4ODZ6vC1ONh_JLUWIFko-JraYSjqrxk-ZY_3fk7vR4Lm8qmkz7dztlIVM851CZ0SVrx4w4EDiuIQ4ZS4HczaaDfmR_t1yHk9BGQy4htx2QxtfhH4LZ1N5vDvkkBAP0ev0fyoX0C6v_L9-eK6blwMVWz7Amj9lmoelE9W4uL2nJka1x7XgpoFP7E3gX0tm4sWT7KSkaMOddO7RL4a4LlFYvvRoVt5CuSACgFG4BNF0Gfu-2PcbG9kVPkoDMXMxd740Z9MtDd9gtkl1XxcBA/44b/kvFjwxsbS0ibgOJvU-0R1Q/h0/h001.yP-K4Q8DelxUZ0ZxzNK5Xs-MlZksnD2Y4HWTDJdfl7Q) Right now, state Republicans are attacking abortion rights without restraint –**proposing 15-day abortion bans, attempting to create a database of people seeking abortion care,_and_ introducing legislation that would allow homicide charges against those who obtain an abortion.** It’s despicable, and the _only way_ to prevent more of these disgusting attacks on our fundamental freedom is to elect Democrats who will stand up to Republicans’ dangerous crusade against reproductive rights. clean_body: Abortion rights will only get worse if more Republicans take power this fall. We must capitalize on every opportunity to elect Democrats who will strengthen reproductive freedoms. | | | | | ---|--- Did you ever imagine living in a world where the generation before you had more freedoms? Neither did we. But that’s exactly what’s happening right before our eyes. The reality is: We’re living in a post-Roe United States, and abortion rights will only get worse if more Republicans take power this fall. We must capitalize on every opportunity to elect Democrats who will strengthen reproductive freedoms.We’re counting on you to give our party the support it needs in this pivotal moment. Right now, state Republicans are attacking abortion rights without restraint –proposing 15-day abortion bans, attempting to create a database of people seeking abortion care,and introducing legislation that would allow homicide charges against those who obtain an abortion. It’s despicable, and the only way to prevent more of these disgusting attacks on our fundamental freedom is to elect Democrats who will stand up to Republicans’ dangerous crusade against reproductive rights. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t do this without you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. subject: A bold vision for MD-2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
Bringing the government closer to the people has always been a top priority

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80141488/458505274/1585381510?refcode=BLU_EM_JOC_Welcome-Series_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljNDA3ZGMtOWRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y3g6G663rHQrztaM7n6ABfpQGsyjqAlkFz9C6X093nw=)

| When I ran to become Baltimore County Executive, I laid out a bold vision for what building a better Baltimore County looked like. In just a few years, we’ve delivered on that promise in a big way.

Since taking office in 2018, I've helped create an open and connected government, provided record funds for our schools, established Baltimore County as a sustainable energy leader, and so much more.

**Bringing the government closer to the people has always been a top priority** ; together, we've created an enduring culture of transparency and accountability.

But I know we can't stop there. We need leaders in Washington with bold and innovative plans to build a brighter future where our families and children can thrive for generations to come. [_**I’m running for Congress to continue building on the progress we’ve made and get Washington back to working for the people. Will you join me as I embark on this next chapter by adding your name to my list of grassroots supporters today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80141490/458505276/1969093755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljNDA3ZGMtOWRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y3g6G663rHQrztaM7n6ABfpQGsyjqAlkFz9C6X093nw=&emci=0ab83ce6-dfd7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=39c407dc-9dd8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6967550)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Three things you may not know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38477%2E3422442%2EE2h-zH)
Derek, i**t’s Jane Fonda, and today I’m asking for you to support Katie Porter with a donation of $25, or whatever makes sense to you: Here’s a link!**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-1?refcode=em20240302-38477&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38477_3422442_E2h-zH&akid=38477%2E3422442%2EE2h-zH)
Katie is running to represent California in the U.S. Senate, and her election is just 3 days away! You might know Katie as the woman who uses a whiteboard to take corporate CEOs, lobbyists, and government officials to task, but here are a few things you might not know:
1. Katie’s questioning of a Trump Administration official in the earliest days of the pandemic is the reason we had free COVID testing. Her work has also resulted in **real crackdowns on Big Oil and Big Pharma** , and she is leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading.
2. Katie is one of the **only single moms of school aged kids** in Congress, and would be the first in the Senate.
3. Katie is the only candidate in this race who has **never taken a dime from corporate PACs** , and she supports banning them altogether.

Derek, Katie Porter is now running in her toughest race yet. **Her opponent and dark money super PACs have spent nearly $30 million against her** , and polls show her in a dead heat for second place. Second place matters here, because the first and second place finishers advance from the March 5 primary to the November general election.
Is there anything you can give before March 5th to help her win this important race?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-1?refcode=em20240302-38477&refcode2=38477_3422442_E2h-zH&akid=38477%2E3422442%2EE2h-zH)
Jane Fonda

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240302-38477&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38477_3422442_E2h-zH&akid=38477%2E3422442%2EE2h-zH)**

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
First-time candidates face a lot of tough challenges. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80142904/458509810/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZTVmOS05ZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KbqJSy7-pdHiNskN7WtkAoEoSmToQ0jSMN-QJgJnA4=)
---
I just wanted to pass along a note of thanks. This grassroots team is so strong, and I am proud that **close to 4,000** supporters have chipped in already so far this cycle. This team has the energy we need to stand up to any attacks from the extreme-right and continue on our progress for families across IL-13. March is Women’s History Month, and I’m part of the fewer than 4% of legislators historically that are women. Women running for office, especially for the first time, face even more obstacles and challenges than their male counterparts (I can personally attest to that!). But thanks to this grassroots team, in 2022 we ran together and **won,** and since then, as the first Democratic woman to represent this District, I’ve worked hard to serve as the advocate that Central and Southern Illinois deserves. Every visit, every conversation, and every response to our team’s surveys fuel my work in Washington — I want to make sure the everyday issues that are impacting working families stay at the top of my priorities. Thanks for your support — by building a solid foundation of grassroots support, we can continue standing up for the underserved and underrepresented communities across Southern and Central Illinois. — Nikki Budzinski (IL-13) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80142908/458509811/888116784?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZTVmOS05ZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KbqJSy7-pdHiNskN7WtkAoEoSmToQ0jSMN-QJgJnA4=) | [MAKE YOUR MARCH CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80142909/458509815/888116784?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmZTVmOS05ZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KbqJSy7-pdHiNskN7WtkAoEoSmToQ0jSMN-QJgJnA4=)

Thanks for your support — by building a solid foundation of grassroots support, we can continue standing up for the underserved and underrepresented communities across Southern and Central Illinois. — Nikki Budzinski (IL-13) = | = | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80143014/458510091/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_20240302_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZjIyYTIyLTlmZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HKsPOCsiRhfS1P3RyrJNn5fE8_H2IT5hx1VnqbC2IMY=)
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:

Considering everything that’s happened means we must tell the country our story, and we need to keep fighting no matter what. We’ve come too far to give up now.

Meeting these fundraising deadlines is crucial to a winning campaign, and this upcoming goal is no different. I’m offering you an opportunity to make a difference in the most important Senate race of 2024.

body:
| | Hi Peter — Brian again. [**I'm writing this email to ask you to chip in to help my team in the final stretch ahead of the election on March 5.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146174/458519521/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=) But first, I want to share another memorable event from my time at the Air Force Academy. It is there my journey of service began. One summer, I spent three weeks at Hahn AFB, Germany on a mandatory cadet program. There I had my first flight in a fighter jet – the F-16 Fighting Falcon! I certainly had no doubts about serving, but if I did, they vanished shortly after takeoff. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146175/458519522/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=) _That's NOT me (I’m the one taking the picture)!_
**Growing up, I watched my father don his Air Force uniform each day, and felt a sense of pride knowing he was serving something greater than himself.** The legacy of military service runs deep within my family — I am the descendant of a long line of veterans dating back to the Civil War. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146176/458519523/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146177/458519524/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=)
---|---
_Me and my father_
I grew up knowing that people, like my father, took an oath to support and defend the Constitution, even though it came with great sacrifice. I followed in my father’s footsteps to serve, earned a congressional appointment to the United States Air Force Academy, and became a first-generation college graduate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146178/458519525/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=)
_#selfie_
**Military service is where I internalized the principles of integrity, excellence, and service before self.** It is where I learned to lead and to take action in service of the greater good.

I've served my country in uniform, my community in the trauma bay, and now, I'm running to serve in Congress. During this crucial time before Super Tuesday, I hope I can count on your support.

**[Our primary is just three days away and we need all hands on deck to win. My team is working overtime to reach as many voters as possible – and we desperately need your help to cross the finish line. Chip in $5, or whatever you can to help us.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80146179/458519526/1248488860?refcode=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240301_gotv2_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e64a7a0c-a2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY0YTdhMGMtYTJkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VRk-xXJUuWmVtJnyio9_AKz_rRfmsebwkUrOaBNU1C0=)**

body:
Not the DC Establishment

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7461749f4cb0494d84a73ad5017f0db6&_e=4LyOickzqfj17C2LL3110DKGvnoGsUUzwBF8uAq94bSTtC-1OrzIQuXJE0VlAK3YNvEK67tyLbIFsyfyR0aWFtlknH6vFkPV3rpTk0PZmaItoN6oRBSIBHzYWxsUn7AG1WVkDwMrWbTqhcqU0U0sPu81mjKxaLQjkKwAeAQrduGF6wAgJ8O8kUag81j0pj7lfmY2cSCsamtz8OxuyTSucMbXlsOTw52IrzNuJjza0UnQ0iP0qOWj6bE00JnCD0httBjyXMzo5IWtd_Rt1CXyY1vW5W0TGonqLcaveew7ThMMbH3yVzPyxLTOIM7IcnqtHR8mDk2NoyCCgSLnzr6XCXWgXBDolO9t-u9I8tqp2ZpRV9dg3-O3Z-PSgUyDu8zlyMMngJWiDEsoPm922oiEzgekUhvlUIk1gFJSdA8gS31oG5eiA15IBSFi5Kp0dIt_WxWOae7Q_GLgOSEsEcLPNQh-XNDubC0-E9bXnLrz7Bo1zGlLiRoGzWp9kCU6RTLOEd0uBeuzwmZ6SKiNV43ddw%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

If Washington was a popularity contest judged by the D.C. Establishment, we'd be coming in dead last.

My husband, Mike Johnson, certainly has the respect of his colleagues in Congress. But when it comes to the special interest groups and D.C. insiders, we're not exactly at the top of their invite lists.

Mike didn't come to Washington for the perks. **[He's in Washington to get the job done.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7461749f4cb0494d84a73ad5017f0db6&_e=4LyOickzqfj17C2LL3110DKGvnoGsUUzwBF8uAq94bSTtC-1OrzIQuXJE0VlAK3YNvEK67tyLbIFsyfyR0aWFtlknH6vFkPV3rpTk0PZmaItoN6oRBSIBHzYWxsUn7AG1WVkDwMrWbTqhcqU0U0sPu81mjKxaLQjkKwAeAQrduGF6wAgJ8O8kUag81j0pj7lfmY2cSCsamtz8OxuyTSucMbXlsOTw52IrzNuJjza0UnQ0iP0qOWj6bE00JnCD0httBjyXMzo5IWtd_Rt1CXyY1vW5W0TGonqLcaveew7ThMMbH3yVzPyxLTOIM7IcnqtHR8mDk2NoyCCgSLnzr6XCXWgXBDolO9t-u9I8tqp2ZpRV9dg3-O3Z-PSgUyDu8zlSvVVM6tQF8xViKSq5wADr0EPAK4ATTV64rC3wIiJ2k4LrBH-tKkuLvEYgtyX8XbaCYkABshEzQb-GLdKhYKPVrXn9FF1tSmV3AlCxuGa-3D0521kg49Xi-X8nR6HZjkG4TB4a2DsSFjKdAwH6475sg%3D%3D "He’s in Washington to get the job done. ")**

And because of that, it's safe to say a fair amount of judgment is casted upon us.

But Mike does not let that bother him -- as he says, what we do is for an audience of one; God is our judge.

The reason we even got into this is for our children. Mike and I want to make sure that the nation that they inherit is one that they can be proud of.

**[Mike is fighting to preserve the greatest nation that's ever been-- the freest, most powerful, most successful, most benevolent country in history. But he can't do it alone.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7461749f4cb0494d84a73ad5017f0db6&_e=4LyOickzqfj17C2LL3110DKGvnoGsUUzwBF8uAq94bSTtC-1OrzIQuXJE0VlAK3YNvEK67tyLbIFsyfyR0aWFtlknH6vFkPV3rpTk0PZmaItoN6oRBSIBHzYWxsUn7AG1WVkDwMrWbTqhcqU0U0sPu81mjKxaLQjkKwAeAQrduGF6wAgJ8O8kUag81j0pj7lfmY2cSCsamtz8OxuyTSucMbXlsOTw52IrzNuJjza0UnQ0iP0qOWj6bE00JnCD0httBjyXMzo5IWtd_Rt1CXyY1vW5W0TGonqLcaveew7ThMMbH3yVzPyxLTOIM7IcnqtHR8mDk2NoyCCgSLnzr6XCXWgXBDolO9t-u9I8tqp2ZpRV9dg3-O3Z-PSgUyDu8zl1raH2NtlVMbEZzawEHiv3jeOrXOlvNwyumT3j5XFRxx2vbPsp5O-i0r4CymNnq_EZ2-2WOGmmhNaLqKjjjat86s5Q915nLGrkgrJPMO-UjYSrTCq8rNrT-5QMuNvvIQi5AYT5uheC9_SkbaO1mkURw%3D%3D "Mike is fighting to preserve the greatest nation that's ever been — the freest, most powerful, most successful, most benevolent country in history. But he can’t do it alone. ")**

Through a lot of prayer and circumstance, Mike and I knew that he was the best man to serve as Speaker of the House, so we decided to pursue the gavel. I say "we" because Mike and I are partners in everything that we do.

We view life as a team sport.

And Mike sees his time in politics the same way, only it is not just he and I standing together. To be successful, we need our fellow proud Americans like yourself to stand beside us as well.

That is why Mike asked me to reach out to you today -- **[to join us, and take a stand.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7461749f4cb0494d84a73ad5017f0db6&_e=4LyOickzqfj17C2LL3110DKGvnoGsUUzwBF8uAq94bSTtC-1OrzIQuXJE0VlAK3YNvEK67tyLbIFsyfyR0aWFtlknH6vFkPV3rpTk0PZmaItoN6oRBSIBHzYWxsUn7AG1WVkDwMrWbTqhcqU0U0sPu81mjKxaLQjkKwAeAQrduGF6wAgJ8O8kUag81j0pj7lfmY2cSCsamtz8OxuyTSucMbXlsOTw52IrzNuJjza0UnQ0iP0qOWj6bE00JnCD0httBjyXMzo5IWtd_Rt1CXyY1vW5W0TGonqLcaveew7ThMMbH3yVzPyxLTOIM7IcnqtHR8mDk2NoyCCgSLnzr6XCXWgXBDolO9t-u9I8tqp2ZpRV9dg3-O3Z-PSgUyDu8zlNuX2OuFQkOltx5TtmQDVm-_jtrb_rQre7dGJQaRmxG3-9qpfUFo-mGdPJSPkYea24EKZsZhcfMQtSFs4tjDgS9KL2DKSQtpLB2RVWMctDmRi8GxVGmysGGjAx1NcQ6ybJ4vnpL6e4fvWHAhilJkM8g%3D%3D "to join us, and take a stand.")** And I hope you will!

---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7461749f4cb0494d84a73ad5017f0db6&_e=4LyOickzqfj17C2LL3110DKGvnoGsUUzwBF8uAq94bSTtC-1OrzIQuXJE0VlAK3YNvEK67tyLbIFsyfyR0aWFtlknH6vFkPV3rpTk0PZmaItoN6oRBSIBHzYWxsUn7AG1WVkDwMrWbTqhcqU0U0sPu81mjKxaLQjkKwAeAQrduGF6wAgJ8O8kUag81j0pj7lfmY2cSCsamtz8OxuyTSucMbXlsOTw52IrzNuJjza0UnQ0iP0qOWj6bE00JnCD0httBjyXMzo5IWtd_Rt1CXyY1vW5W0TGonqLcaveew7ThMMbH3yVzPyxLTOIM7IcnqtHR8mDk2NoyCCgSLnzr6XCXWgXBDolO9t-u9I8tqp2ZpRV9dg3-O3Z-PSgUyDu8zlPLxDWtVbWPdmoFyzywmhpmqXi64GD4El_2pj2khwSTj8O2jvMz44mg2TQ3ccStWq5opr0tndrN4D_sSI-96FhXcznuNrhv4wKrzV2NoAzPEC1H_Dk21vWGUQfDktjmWS3hDxPjAMD-gnOlesNyf9Dg%3D%3D)
---

Thank you,

Kelly Johnson

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
Thousands Are Speaking Up for Religious Freedom. Will You? | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=132472fbafa146aa9aaa5a76bc2437f0&_t=dKM-Fa03QSFl4UisMgL_of64FfY-23NaqqOppWmuZK1xu4HSYhNQP1r5nidkFxAcqmUo3XbhDd6NB48Xp60qJ17D8UacHVPvZQcLkYPtOFU%3D)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=132472fbafa146aa9aaa5a76bc2437f0&_e=T7t2HUP831T5yGgPnk5mHYlSW6d49dNa6gjICSxNoG_7Q5uz9RJd_UNdEVnOLxbFNYCkkmcVqW6lTrdPerz5ZwiDG1FXwNkW-2Lt2J_781I3zR0w9YXyWupxR9ld7B-YYC_znlb8qjTI-Y5_fOjTrMfwmabRrlec2tl3Rh4zC_H7EzFTxyL3q9PAU2yRNZt_j_f2ccllAH32MjDTOXFgDhFz_DLBdQK-lttOFXgRrBELUju5--3Eook2P-QepgibTVn8-Xq_4GYrHTNOWZG8eYD9QSe43s1MxeX45cOBBioBG3yTYLKl7E44ifsvJhoKYNKnDw-NuSE7_AoPXluhac3kTFgqAMe7jZIuCa9EYA-dhUpjDwk60zvd-ANOBoOU0TyfqRFDE9S21ZQBMc6vKvstoDgnmslVoD5jvnYqjL4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=132472fbafa146aa9aaa5a76bc2437f0&_e=T7t2HUP831T5yGgPnk5mHYlSW6d49dNa6gjICSxNoG_7Q5uz9RJd_UNdEVnOLxbFNYCkkmcVqW6lTrdPerz5ZwiDG1FXwNkW-2Lt2J_781I3zR0w9YXyWupxR9ld7B-YYC_znlb8qjTI-Y5_fOjTrMfwmabRrlec2tl3Rh4zC_H7EzFTxyL3q9PAU2yRNZt_j_f2ccllAH32MjDTOXFgDhFz_DLBdQK-lttOFXgRrBELUju5--3Eook2P-QepgibCbnYSBUXEvaYKySV5sxcDUYcDBX9esfz5Vy_7JcVAibRuG0GFGapwN9xIaWQ9TOIpnzch7YnMkdWkB3zByTEnmvC1_TWTAxHrDlDEd-JO6vZIij5KXjGI1yzNxca6KtfIDRP7vOXTNx9GWvCMOUIS8fWkbDU1Tz6zm8uoaqY8D4%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=132472fbafa146aa9aaa5a76bc2437f0&_e=T7t2HUP831T5yGgPnk5mHYlSW6d49dNa6gjICSxNoG_7Q5uz9RJd_UNdEVnOLxbFNYCkkmcVqW6lTrdPerz5ZwiDG1FXwNkW-2Lt2J_781I3zR0w9YXyWupxR9ld7B-YYC_znlb8qjTI-Y5_fOjTrMfwmabRrlec2tl3Rh4zC_H7EzFTxyL3q9PAU2yRNZt_j_f2ccllAH32MjDTOXFgDhFz_DLBdQK-lttOFXgRrBELUju5--3Eook2P-QepgibcB15pcpDC-Y13hXqY57d3uj0djcBAYFD6nnIrQQzCdTmFCBitzRx-gONJ39-J6Xp0LmWmxv22UaEGo7tmGx3iMPAEBplq5wEDBo7ib4vAPrgC_qg8jbCXxHF_e3-YmHruHv0HulsDomX-5DPpE9FTwOdItY_-t9KfFTC8100kjo%3D)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=132472fbafa146aa9aaa5a76bc2437f0&_t=dKM-Fa03QSFl4UisMgL_of64FfY-23NaqqOppWmuZK1xu4HSYhNQP1r5nidkFxAcqmUo3XbhDd6NB48Xp60qJ17D8UacHVPvZQcLkYPtOFU%3D).

Hi friend - it’s former Attorney General Eric Holder. In a minute, I’m going to ask you for a [small donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80148729/458525960/38783913?refcode=em-3.2.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjRkOTE4NS1hNWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dbnwA0BfvpOwPVii70xe78OuFHR9HVKnIIUuPkGxY8=), but first, let me explain why I’m reaching out.

Our democracy is under attack from MAGA extremists who continue to spread lies about the 2020 election.

Across the nation, Republicans who denied the results of the last election are seeking higher office so they can influence the next one. Some are even vying to become Secretary of State, the top election official in many states.

If any of these election deniers win, they’d oversee election laws and make decisions about when, where, and how folks vote. They could even decide if they would certify the results of the future elections in their state.

**If we want to defend our democracy, we must preserve access to the ballot box and defeat anti-democracy candidates.**

My friends at The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) are leading the effort to elect candidates who will follow the rule of law, expand voting rights, and protect our democracy - but they need your help more than ever.

[That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation of any amount to DASS so we can defend our democracy and the sacred right to vote. clean_body: | = Hi friend - it’s former Attorney General Eric Holder. In a minute, I’m going to ask you for a =, but first, let me explain why I’m reaching out. Our democracy is under attack from MAGA extremists who continue to spread lies about the 2020 election. Across the nation, Republicans who denied the results of the last election are seeking higher office so they can influence the next one. Some are even vying to become Secretary of State, the top election official in many states. If any of these election deniers win, they’d oversee election laws and make decisions about when, where, and how folks vote. They could even decide if they would certify the results of the future elections in their state. If we want to defend our democracy, we must preserve access to the ballot box and defeat anti-democracy candidates. My friends at The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) are leading the effort to elect candidates who will follow the rule of law, expand voting rights, and protect our democracy - but they need your help more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Eric H. _U.S. Army Captain John James_
I served our country for eight years in the US Army as an Apache helicopter pilot. I led two Apache platoons in combat operations in the Iraq War. I wouldn't trade my service in the Army for anything, Friend. It's there that I learned true leadership and the price of freedom. **Truly, it was an honor to serve my country, Friend.**

And now, I'm serving my country again. But this time, I'm fighting for your freedoms here at home. I decided to run for Congress in 2022 because I truly believe our nation needs veteran leadership.

**After a hard-fought race, my Team and I won by LESS THAN 0.5%.** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic veteran and father of three; the Left can't stand me because I'm an unapologetic conservative!

My colleague and Retired Navy SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, knows my situation because he's in a very similar one himself. He narrowly flipped a seat Democrats had held for 26 years, so you'd better believe the Left is coming for his head this year too!

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

name: SAVE WOMEN'S SPORTS
subject: We must stop this “transgender” NONSENSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
\*\*🚨 Join the Fight to SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS! 🚨\*\*

\*\*SHOW YOUR SUPPORT\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.979.1.2efa2053bd24933df6d6a4cf52336b8e )

Friend,

It’s hard to believe there is any controversy to this. But a whole lot of people in our country have completely lost it – the woke mind virus is real.

Let me be perfectly clear: \*\*Biological boys and men should NEVER be allowed to compete against girls and women in sports.\*\*

_I’m proud to be leading the charge to __STOP this ridiculous and asinine nonsense__ for good!_

As a former college football coach, who also coached young women in basketball early in my career, I know a thing or two about competition and fair play.

Allowing biological males to compete against biological females is unfair and as we’ve all seen it is completely unsafe – this attack on young women has robbed so many of opportunity and resulted in a number of serious injuries.

As a member of the U.S. Senate, I will not relent until we \*\*SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS\*\*.

\*\*_I’m writing to ask you to step up and stand with me in this fight >>> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.980.1.c13682f1f77dc8bdb33cce92c21a5572 )_ \*\*

\*\*PITCH IN TO HELP\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.981.1.40bc052ec0edf9c0181f10d3ceb53ca3 )

Last year, I introduced the \*\*Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act\*\* to prohibit school athletic programs from allowing “transgender” females – these are biological males – from participating in programs that are for girls or women. It has been passed in the House but blocked in the Senate by woke-left Democrats.

And several weeks ago, I introduced the \*\*Women in Olympic and Amateur Sports Act\*\* to ban “transgender” females from participating in athletic event intended for females.

Dozens of biological males have taken home women’s championship titles in recent years. It is beyond absurd.

\*\*This is MENTAL ILLNESS being forced on our society –\*\*\*\* we cannot allow it to continue \*\*\*\*!\*\*

Take a stand to fuel our fight in the U.S. Senate. It’s vital that we rally the American people behind us to ramp up the pressure and get these bills across the finish line.

\*\*I’m grateful for any support you can send – every contribution is a HUGE help! ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.982.1.c2642e8311758debabefa3e90ed9edfb )\*\*

Thank you,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.983.1.f6513c304caad6578e41c0d835a5b34a )

Coach Tuberville

United States Senator – Alabama

\*\*HELP SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2061350.984.1.01609ff5c847afad12bcdf6de25585dc )

Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.

Unsubscribe instantly from these emails by clicking here ( https://go.madmimi.com/opt_out?pact=2061350-179829842-14744622743-a57f5930d20a9ebd818af6e3edda5a310a8744ba ).

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: this campaign is a love letter to Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I can still remember the first time that I came to Florida.
| | |
---
Friend, this message is a bit on the longer side, but I hope you'll take the time to read it. **[You see, in a lot of ways, this campaign is a love letter to Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80152245/458532959/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk882-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNmRmNTYtYThkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0vuaquaDAQtDdpGRHIN8ntzQN5H0cJmfIstg6EAQ9k=)**
I can still remember the first time that I came to Florida. I was working on my Masters degree and had just gotten the news that my beloved father had been killed by a criminal with a gun in Ecuador, where I was born. As I grappled with my grief, I found myself missing Ecuador more than I had in years. I missed its warmth, lush greenery, and close-knit communities that I grew up with. My older sister, Monica, knew our family was struggling, so she convinced me to visit her in Miami, where she had recently moved.
When I stepped outside of the airport, it was like stepping into another world. **It was warm, wonderfully humid, bustling with lively, diverse communities, lush, and all so, so beautifully green.** We spent the next few days visiting all of Monica's favorite places in her new city — the spots with the most beautiful views and the best cafes to get a _cafecito_. The people we met were even warmer than the weather. Everyone was welcoming, friendly, and proud to call this state their home.
I boarded my plane back to my home with a heavy heart but a new resolve. **As soon as I was able, I sold my car and moved across the country to make a new home in Miami.**(My mom, always my closest confidant, wasn't far behind.)
Since moving here all those years ago, I've had the privilege to build a beautiful life in the Sunshine State. **I fell in love here, found the community I had longed for, raised a family of my own, and dedicated my career to serving this state.** I've helped protect the Everglades, expanded access to health care, worked for Florida International University, and became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress, right here in Florida.
I've spent my life serving this state and getting to know the communities who call it home. But my opponent, Rick Scott, has spent his career scamming Floridians, lying to voters, and making himself richer. **He wants you to think that Florida families agree with his extreme, hateful agenda._But I can promise you, friend, that couldn't be further from the truth._**
Listen, my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state — and more importantly, because of what it will mean for my fellow Floridians. Rick Scott wants to sow division and undo decades of meaningful progress. He wants to destroy reproductive rights, gun safety laws, and vital public services, like Medicare and Social Security, that support millions of his constituents, including my own mother.

Florida is ready for a change — I hear it from voters every day as I travel around all 67 counties. I know this November, Floridians will choose unity, progress, and kindness over Rick Scott's extremist agenda.

But the truth is, we're up against a mega-millionaire who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time. If we're going to break through Rick Scott's lies, build unstoppable grassroots momentum, and win this critical race, I'll need your help.

**[Please, will you donate $5 (or whatever you can spare today) to help me defeat Rick Scott and give our home the leadership that we deserve? This _will_ be the year that we flip Florida blue, but only if grassroots activists like _you_ believe in my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80152246/458532960/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk882-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNmRmNTYtYThkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0vuaquaDAQtDdpGRHIN8ntzQN5H0cJmfIstg6EAQ9k=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80152248/458532961/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk882-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNmRmNTYtYThkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0vuaquaDAQtDdpGRHIN8ntzQN5H0cJmfIstg6EAQ9k=)
