| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80152249/458532963/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk882-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNmRmNTYtYThkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0vuaquaDAQtDdpGRHIN8ntzQN5H0cJmfIstg6EAQ9k=)

| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80152251/458532965/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk882-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNmRmNTYtYThkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0vuaquaDAQtDdpGRHIN8ntzQN5H0cJmfIstg6EAQ9k=)

Thank you for taking the time to read this and fight for a better future for Florida.

With gratitude,

Debbie

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: From Danville to Burbank
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5833%2E5257348%2EmIfHX1 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — My
story is a California story.

How a young boy in Alamo/Danville, who became a U.S. Forest Service
Seasonal Firefighter, then an Assistant U.S. Attorney, a State Senator,
and a member of Congress, could go on to run for the United States Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=5833%2E5257348%2EmIfHX1 ]A gif of Adam as from a young boy, a U.S. Forest Service Seasonal
Firefighter, as Assistant U.S. Attorney, a State Senator, and a member of
Congress, and now running for the United States Senate.

It is also a story about delivering for Californians.

Securing funding for more affordable housing.

Taking on corporate polluters.

Lowering health care costs and expanding access.

Defending our democracy and the sanctity of our elections.

These are the things I’ve done, and the fights I will continue to take on
in the United States Senate on behalf of all Californians.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: ☀️Starting your Saturday off with some good news 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This past week, we won our ghost gun case against the ATF!
#

We have some good news to share, team:
This past week, we won our ghost gun case against the ATF!
While the ATF took an important step last year to stem the flow of untraceable ghost guns, gaps exist within the current rule, which allowed ghost gun companies to continue to sell parts to make highly dangerous ghost guns, such as AR-15s. This is a major threat to public safety, and so GIFFORDS Law Center filed a lawsuit to address these lethal loopholes.
**Earlier this week, a California court ruled in our favor, stating that ATF must treat AR ghost gun parts as firearms.**
Our win in this case is a huge step forward for the gun safety movement. Ghost guns—and all of their parts—are a major threat to public safety. When ghost guns are built at home from parts purchased online, it becomes far too easy for untraceable firearms to end up in the wrong hands.
We are proud of our work to keep our communities safe from ghost guns, and we couldn’t have done it without you. Thank you so much for being with us in every step of our fight to end gun violence.
\- Team GIFFORDS
* * *

**👋 Hey there, before you go...**

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to [**contribute to GIFFORDS today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240302-1-30&t=1&akid=7712%2E3935704%2Em0EGJg)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-mar24.dT6Aks&refcode=em240302-1-30&t=2&akid=7712%2E3935704%2Em0EGJg)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar24.bWeAf2&refcode=em240302-1-30&t=3&akid=7712%2E3935704%2Em0EGJg)**
---
****

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=7712%2E3935704%2Em0EGJg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Right now, Donald Trump is _ahead_ of President Biden in the polls, and he and Mitch McConnell are raking in **_millions_** from dark-money megadonors.
**With the GOP rallying around Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists, President Biden and Vice President Harris need to know if Democrats like you still support their vision of progress for our country.**

Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Something to share with our most dedicated supporters

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=42a514c684014aa7bca62ede628f7d2b&_e=MzGux_JJLmZVO6wv9974cNQu5UWedhbdKrA8j4RbxpTX51PkkCPZAolNpP5ebtq8jVXJJRGpbIykFcZC5jG9ZEt0w_6y4Rp-tky2wyMQhAx_uFVMUFEo08jjtt7Q-fAyDxN5u6BNyO7i3mxqiuMhGavguxDVPbhyPdOlI6nnwipxdVEUqtz3LrwBQ1cAlf5HjoIJIjVolDcejL9RVxS_--gY21bDk4IqWUqEiAuloTY4SBvkVo3u994bkrwPLiKNO7vprCQjekoYIEcUmYKBX9jqo0nXzj4ZuRRH-ym88sdPyTLW7UT8NhY6joC-yUGtw8fIhFGlSHnsosXGM5LY7AgwqQ0ylqWG8ofVzMAi7vQaZPIqHotxEGGBeUvYQqKYwFiD-DFcmAXt8g4HOBGsUg%3D%3D)

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let the Supreme Court halt Trump's trial while they slow-walk his appeal
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Tell the Supreme Court to let Trump trial proceed while they’re deciding his appeal](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17de214a-8ea5-41f0-8cea-07c4bf3acfae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e765680-9f1b-44c7-b485-67925258a829/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | As you may have seen in our [earlier action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T873ab23a-832d-46a4-b311-371990f8f8e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the Supreme Court has agreed to hear Trump's absurd "total immunity" appeal. And it won't even start until April 22nd, with the trial now on hold until that appeal is finished. [**The Supreme Court should remove that hold and let the trial proceed immediately. Tell them to do it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5161b280-d280-436c-a7d5-2a743a30242b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There is no reason why the trial should halt, just because the Supreme Court is taking its sweet time to get to work. The trial can and should go forward immediately, beginning with the usual pretrial motions. There's no way it will finish before April, and probably a few months more, so we will have a ruling from the Supreme Court before the trial concludes, and can act accordingly. But we won't have wasted precious time doing nothing in the meantime. Yes, the Supreme Court should never have taken the appeal. But if they're going to do it, they should let the trial proceed, so we all can have a verdict on Trump's guilt before the election. [**Add your name, and tell the Supreme Court to remove the hold and let the trial proceed immediately.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta12325fd-d213-4439-916a-ea737b287d2d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0030419d-d9d5-496e-a865-e4556352260f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Want to do something else? **[Tell Elon Musk to stop giving a platform to hate](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac699775-4361-4520-8465-dbf18bf718c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**)
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82fc8e5f-7a04-4065-a2d3-42501dacc4cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T303e5aa1-945e-4eb3-b3c7-e1fe52fbf0be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadd5eadd-599f-4ca4-bb4c-670fee3aa956/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc7a5963-cabe-4d19-a408-fd142a2c4604/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Bob Casey
subject: This is who I’m fighting for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)
Peter, in a moment, I’m going to share why I’m running for re-election, but first I am asking:
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to build a winning campaign capable of taking on my billionaire-backed opponent?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?refcode=em20240302-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)**
Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be.
It’s where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family.
It’s also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)
I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family, too.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)
Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I’m proud of the fights we’ve won together.
I’m running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women’s rights, and workers’ rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)
The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another “yes” vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the Senate. **That’s why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat me and flip this seat.**
This is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Nation, and we have to be ready to fight back against millions upon millions in outside spending if we’re going to win.
**[With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, your support is more important than ever. So what do you say? Will you pitch in $2.50 or $5 today to keep PA and the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-1&refcode2=2181_552475_qk8L68&akid=2181%2E552475%2Eqk8L68)**

clean_body: Peter, in a moment, I’m going to share why I’m running for re-election, but first I am asking: Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be. It’s where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family. It’s also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families. I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family, too. Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I’m proud of the fights we’ve won together. I’m running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women’s rights, and workers’ rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities. The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. I wish I could leave at that, but there’s more. We have an even bigger deadline coming at the end of the quarter. clean_body: I believe in this team. Together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish. | = After every single campaign fundraising deadline, I have to take a moment to appreciate how this team shows up. Thank you for being part of the grassroots team that powers this campaign. Because of you and your fellow supporters, our coalition of Delawareans in every corner of the state grows bigger and stronger every day! I wish I could leave at that, but there’s more. We have an even bigger deadline coming at the end of the quarter. In a few weeks, we’ll face the first FEC reporting deadline of the election year — and all eyes will be on our campaign’s report to measure our strength. In a few days I’m returning to session in Dover, working hard to deliver on affordable health care and other top priorities for working Delawareans. While I focus on that critical work, I’m counting on your support to take our campaign’s momentum to a new level. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = I believe in this team. Together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish. With gratitude, Sarah = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware McBride for Delaware P.O. Box 1904 Wilmington, DE 19899 United States Emails like this are important to stay in touch with supporters and raise crucial funds. If you no longer want to receive these emails from us, please . # Week 8 Session Update from Senator Hunley
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAzMDIuOTExNjMzMDEifQ.Z1FigbiubLqFaB4ILysFZoUE6b-vla_ZIdY3JQZM-Hw/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
---
What a week for our community! As I celebrate our victories, my mind is brought to all the wonderful ways in which our village continues to grow. I am so thankful that you chose me as your elected official. I couldn't do this without you.
|
## NAACP stops by the statehouse
| [](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvZG93bnRvd24tZWNvbm9taWMtZW5oYW5jZW1lbnQtZGlzdHJpY3QtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC13aXRoLWFtZW5kbWVudC1mb3ItYXBhcnRtZW50cyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAzMDIuOTExNjMzMDEifQ.HH-HLS-Dy_WAY-eeJDkP1Mz2qYfxaGuub1puuy8AYvI/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
---
When Black folks lead we build coalitions, we build consensus, and we shake up stagnant systems.

I am honored that the NAACP invited me to speak at their annual legislative day. Thank you for the truth that you continue to speak to power.
* * *
---
## [Indiana Election Commission rules that campaign funds should pay for childcare expenditures](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xKimUyXTMGKGGI3eZ2p7NpqdRZTg0wqVfqgmnw4IXLA/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmluZHlzdGFyLmNvbS9zdG9yeS9uZXdzL2xvY2FsLzIwMjQvMDIvMTgvMjAyNC1uYmEtYWxsLXN0YXItd2Vla2VuZC1pbmRpYW5hcG9saXMtaW5kaWFuYS1waG90by10aW1lbGluZS83MjY1Mjg2ODAwNy8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMzAyLjkxMTYzMzAxIn0.et0YkRw89DBQETLajxfwAcB_4eAN94xakLWhyRetJdY/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
---
I am so proud & pleased with what Representative Garcia Wilburn, and I were able to accomplish with this week's ruling from the Election Commission. Now Hoosier parents won't be asked to choose between childcare and running for office. Our village grows stronger!
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMDcvc2VuYXRlLWVkdWNhdGlvbi1iaWxscy1vbi1odW1hbi1zZXh1YWxpdHktY3Vyc2l2ZS1tb3ZlLXRvLWhvdXNlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAzMDIuOTExNjMzMDEifQ.szxEQjLXGV3WMG41xSxuqEgN3rw51hvoSB4wZhB6830/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)[Elections bill receives high spirited opposition in committee](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..K0mfma5jS38WJoHi7Ul60JHU_nEMobCIGHgAidMno40/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
Indiana elections are safe. We've heard it time-and-time-again from elections clerks and committees. So what issue is HB 1264 trying to solve? Is it solving an issue, or fueling a fear? In 2022, voter turnout in Indiana was the worst of any state in the US. The legislature needs to make voting more accessible, not a chore. I will continue to fight for accessible elections for every Hoosier.
[Chaplain bill amended into House bill](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMjgvcm91bmR1cC1zZW5hdGUtcmVwdWJsaWNhbnMtYXBwcm92ZS1nYXJ5LWxhd3N1aXQtZW5kZXItb3Zlci1kZW1vY3JhdC1vdXRyYWdlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAzMDIuOTExNjMzMDEifQ.ImAJDTsO_ChlZ5gSHPpgwBvGpj8g4mz5Unshkmw6N5w/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
On Tuesday, the majority amended the potent and controversial SB 50 into HB 1137. I have spoken out against SB 50 in the past, and I spoke out against it in the Education Committee.
[SB 52 killed in the House](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTMsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvYmlsbC1lZmZlY3RpdmVseS1raWxsaW5nLWluZGlhbmFwb2xpcy1ibHVlLWxpbmUtZ2V0cy1oZWFyaW5nLWluLWhvdXNlLWNvbW1pdHRlZSIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAzMDIuOTExNjMzMDEifQ.PQffWPNp-weiHRmyfWX3ilAn12r1wwQcPikBqm6SErM/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l)
SB 52, the bill that threatened IndyGo's Blue Line, has been held for this session. Read more [here](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTQsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbWlycm9yaW5keS5vcmcvaW5kaWFuYXBvbGlzLWluZHlnby1ibHVlLWxpbmUtc2F2ZWQtc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwtNTItdG9kZC1odXN0b24tYWFyb24tZnJlZW1hbi8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMzAyLjkxMTYzMzAxIn0.zMX_gKyHsXe2OI2I5mg0-gpkkOhfzjLP2et7zym-EQQ/s/2950175210/br/238123207493-l).

I couldn't do this without you. | NAACP stops by the statehouse | When Black folks lead we build coalitions, we build consensus, and we shake up stagnant systems. I am honored that the NAACP invited me to speak at their annual legislative day. Thank you for the truth that you continue to speak to power. I am so proud & pleased with what Representative Garcia Wilburn, and I were able to accomplish with this week's ruling from the Election Commission. Now Hoosier parents won't be asked to choose between childcare and running for office. Our village grows stronger! STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE Indiana elections are safe. We've heard it time-and-time-again from elections clerks and committees. So what issue is HB 1264 trying to solve? Is it solving an issue, or fueling a fear? In 2022, voter turnout in Indiana was the worst of any state in the US. The legislature needs to make voting more accessible, not a chore. I will continue to fight for accessible elections for every Hoosier. On Tuesday, the majority amended the potent and controversial SB 50 into HB 1137. I have spoken out against SB 50 in the past, and I spoke out against it in the Education Committee. SB 52, the bill that threatened IndyGo's Blue Line, has been held for this session. Read more . | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my state government resource guide, "Hunley Community Resource Guide". | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications Office Shenetha.Shepherd@iga.in.gov Kyle.Casteel@iga.in.gov Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- SUBSCRIBER SERVICES: | | | *

body:
Peter, I’m sooo hyped! MadSoul Fest is TODAY!!!!

But before I head out to the festival, I had to reach out one more time to thank you.

Because of people like you who stay engaged and believe in our youth-powered movement, we’re changing the way to organize and reach young people. No one is doing it like us, and I can’t thank you enough for being a part of this team.

**Because of you, we’re going to register THOUSANDS of young, first-time voters and inspire the next generation to get involved in our movement for change.**

But the organizing doesn’t end after MadSoul. My team is organizing across Florida _year-round_ , and we can’t keep out-organizing the fascists who want us on the sidelines without your support.

[**_So before MadSoul starts, can you chip in $15 to keep powering my campaign’s youth organizing? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Uf0fH7mfxW7pHUwI21LyZg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnxdL5P0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9NYWRzb3VsTE9XX2VuJmFtb3VudD0xNSZjZG1jPTJkNXVtU3JxOEpJQ2RQWDlVUkprZ1lZc1BsdCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZDV1bVNycThKSUNkUFg5VVJKa2dZWXNQbHQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmQ1dW1TcnE4SklDZFBYOVVSSmtnWVlzUGx0VwNzcGNCCmXi-U3jZcezMetSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

subject: Will you join Social Security Works in supporting Lucas Kunce today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Lucas will fight like hell to protect the benefits working people across our country earned.
#
Peter — Social Security Works was one of the first national organizations to endorse Lucas Kunce because they know he’ll fight like hell to protect the benefits working people across our country earned. **Before we tell you more,[will you join them in supporting Lucas by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240302_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4956%2E614464%2EvEkoG1)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240302_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4956%2E614464%2EvEkoG1)**
**This week, Josh Hawley signaled his support for Rick Scott as the new Senate GOP leader — despite his efforts to destroy Social Security and Medicare.** It’s no big surprise, considering the fact that Hawley has never actually stood up for Missouri’s seniors and workers during his time in the U.S. Senate.
He’s voted against bills to protect these critical benefits at nearly every opportunity. And he’s thrown his support behind politicians like Blake Masters, who supported privatizing Social Security and told voters “we’ve got to cut the knot at some point.”
**Missouri’s seniors and workers deserve to have someone in the U.S. Senate who they can trust to fight for every penny they’re owed** , not a pampered phony like Josh Hawley who doesn’t know a thing about what it’s like to struggle.
**That’s why Social Security Works endorsed Lucas Kunce.** They know Lucas will fight to protect the promise of Social Security for every worker who earned it — and they know he won’t let any corrupt politician get in his way.
**[So if you’re ready for a real warrior for working people to stand up for Social Security and Medicare in the U.S. Senate, please join Social Security Works by adding your personal endorsement of Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240302_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4956%2E614464%2EvEkoG1)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240302_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=4956%2E614464%2EvEkoG1)**
We couldn’t do this without you, Peter.
Team Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240302-4956-footer&t=5&refcode2=4956_614464_vEkoG1&akid=4956%2E614464%2EvEkoG1)**

body:
| | | I can’t believe it - **our end-of-month deadline has been __EXTENDED__ for 24 hours!

**I’m not going to lie, I was incredibly worried when we didn’t meet our goal.

_But with this new opportunity, we have a second chance that comes around once in a lifetime._

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: a game of inches
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)

| | Peter, I feel like it’s important that instead of hearing this from a member of my staff, you hear it directly from me: We came up _juuuust_ short of our February fundraising goal. I’m still feeling optimistic though, because we didn’t miss our mark by a lot — but a race this close is a game of inches, so it’s critical to our success that we don’t let this take the wind out of our sails as we head towards our first FEC filing deadline of 2024 at the end of March. **A strong start to this month would get us right back in the swing of things, and nothing could get us back on track faster than a couple of big fundraising days. So here’s what I’m asking:**[**Would you please consider making a quick grassroots donation to help us get back in a groove?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=12&amount=25&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa) | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=13&amount=25&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=14&amount=35&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
**The reality is that my opponents don’t have the grassroots support we do, but what they do have is personal wealth.****And a lot of it.**
_In fact, one of my opponents has already spent_** _tens of millions of dollars of his own money_** _on ads to boost his campaign._
But this grassroots team has been breaking fundraising records left and right ever since we first launched, and winning this race is going to require that we maintain that pace.
Hitting fundraising goals allows us to hire and train more staff, ramp up outreach, and puts us in prime position the closer we get to Election Day. _The flipside is that falling short means missing out on critical opportunities to connect with voters._
**Our campaign is built on small-dollar donations, not million-dollar checks.**[**Can you please chip in just $25 right away so we can get back to breaking records, crushing fundraising goals, and setting the stage to WIN this competitive race?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=15&amount=25&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Chip in $50](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Chip in $100](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Chip in $200](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Chip in $250](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=10&amount=35&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)
---
Thank you for always having my back, Peter.
—Angela Alsobrooks
[](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12439?t=11&amount=25&akid=1140%2E52803%2ES0dHQa)

body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1TgzAQhn_NciuzbGIChxxaO_Ggox7rcQnBRonQQMvgr3eK1et-PO8zL8ehC-1iQO-A6BiaEYhAbIHo9DbHdP6Ijw-by-FVb07qOd5dt3QPRNMy-P_TGyX3kUN3nep91hjRNigzbwqNlahUiTI7Gley88Kp0ley1E3dSKy0K32rVVvXzFkwhCRRIBWKlKScWdZYCoW1FFgwg8Q1J-foU3BcjNPMKfV9zF0fs84cp2kYVzELZOfU519n1_nz-Pvm-ghkb8pA9gJk7Td9HqZWLHsQdm1B7Jf4sgtPeiuyZJphDl0XRqVB4vsf5icAAP__FLxg9g)

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjkFvozAQhX_NcAONZxwDBw7ZRUSrlaoc21NkbJy4wYUYJ1H-fUXU9tDjvPdp3qfDPHr3aKD8A0QnbxcgAt4C0eXtHuL1Pfzf5bfXfZlf1EvYrC39BaL0mIcf9OtLMQTtxzUt28w27CzKbGhEiTXXqkKZnZrSiI0YalsZa1ERlj2b3tXC9YhYOZn5hpAkMpJQpCQVWsseK1bYS0ahNUh87hQ6DNEbLZZ01zFOUyjMFLKxOaU0L0-xDqiTc4pnxrUD6szozRm4S_HmLXArmLgCUtvuX7ueWG-AlHbusFz7NagY82-hfAukrikcjA6z9scP4Ha_3-W_oCw2dr77cfSLKkHi8WlrpvAZAAD__6cxaJk) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjkFvozAQhX_NcAONZxwDBw7ZRUSrlaoc21NkbJy4wYUYJ1H-fUXU9tDjvPdp3qfDPHr3aKD8A0QnbxcgAt4C0eXtHuL1Pfzf5bfXfZlf1EvYrC39BaL0mIcf9OtLMQTtxzUt28w27CzKbGhEiTXXqkKZnZrSiI0YalsZa1ERlj2b3tXC9YhYOZn5hpAkMpJQpCQVWsseK1bYS0ahNUh87hQ6DNEbLZZ01zFOUyjMFLKxOaU0L0-xDqiTc4pnxrUD6szozRm4S_HmLXArmLgCUtvuX7ueWG-AlHbusFz7NagY82-hfAukrikcjA6z9scP4Ha_3-W_oCw2dr77cfSLKkHi8WlrpvAZAAD__6cxaJk) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. | | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_Yp7KF3-qPUdykx0So46mg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxeTAP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJUU-Nlo-XvP1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_Yp7KF3-qPUdykx0So46mg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxeTAP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJUU-Nlo-XvP1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_Yp7KF3-qPUdykx0So46mg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxeTAP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJUU-Nlo-XvP1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_Yp7KF3-qPUdykx0So46mg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnxeTAP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMDJXA3NwY0IKZeJUU-Nlo-XvP1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, ~ Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. ~ With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | ~ | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. ~ ~ | | ~ | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~

Friends – As we celebrate Women's History Month, let us celebrate the courageous women who have blazed a path for future generations. This month, it's not enough to remember prominent women throughout history. We must recommit to the fight for equal pay, affordable child care, and reproductive rights. And here in Florida, activists are working to secure abortion access across the state by putting Amendment 4 on the ballot. I've been proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with many strong women in these fights. But, in order to succeed in our mission, we'll need collective action – and that starts with our grassroots team. MAGA Republicans are planning a nationwide abortion ban, and they'd be one step closer to it if they keep their House Majority or, even worse, grow it. That’s why I have seven opponents running against me to flip this seat and stall any progress in Congress. [**Can you contribute $25 or more to help our campaign enshrine reproductive rights, fight for affordable child care, and demand equal pay? name: Shining a light on 21 years of harm
subject: Cynthia at United We Dream Action
body:
Yesterday marked the 21st anniversary of the hateful agency. | | | ******21 years of ICE** ******We’re shining a light on 21 years of harm inflicted against our communities by DHS and ICE. Help United We Dream Action build a future free from agencies created to harm our communities by donating $21 for ICE’s 21st anniversary.** | | [DONATE $21](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrR5aP5pezEkufmRBJziia8bQmrae3vqZNvSzBVgLpLVdIsAQ2kGte5j-iIJUGH6BIK6-mFLpZ5rDA1MMza_sEsfCEHcXnItlOxCsaOEbMrk5JUbnD0e4Vcu3JfjQ5FIkqVCX1auiqz2IxJ-R4zMK4TRf2uMck7p1ewJY77ILp2TtDM7VgImXMAr6CHibuSt0d41poyauIrjOSMcm0MY93vRVzplTSV8oHfBJ6h8j8gsqR_3Ntv_brQ1crMDIIZSoNCQ-DH77WsMN3m_AosIUP796RmH6rICf2Us89QP2wXAYfh_NmpnxjbyKtkssFgf0VqS25j-Qlr6Yq2UiLqMBjVbRq9eUwdet7_sF4gqqpkmGdFgmei9LykPYWqr5ny5z8/44b/PG31W0h7QIGtzHyqN1Gnuw/h0/h001.WUxjoyWQLolmx5nxZroYfMQK80uDwzBOSeDWYMuUuKw)
---
****
Peter,
In the past 21 years, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), an agency created to weaponize cruel and unjust anti-immigrant policy, has inflicted irreparable damage on our communities — through family separation, cruel detentions, and deportation.
We’re using the 21st anniversary to highlight ICE’s history of cruelty, emphasize our demands, and renew our fight to defund the agency:
* **Congress** : We call on Congress to not only stop their push to increase funding for ICE and CBP but to allocate that money to a bill investing in immigrant communities.

* **President Biden** : We’re calling on President Biden to shut down these over-policed immigration detention centers infected with casual racism in every corner.

**21 years of ICE is 21 years too many.** Peter, the truth is, if we want these demands met, we need support from grassroots contributions. Your contribution aids us in the fight to put pressure on our elected officials to close down ICE detention facilities and defund the agency’s abuses.
**Will you chip in $21 in protest of the 21st anniversary of the founding of ICE? We’ll need resources to amplify our message and ensure our demands are met.**
****

clean_body: Yesterday marked the 21st anniversary of the hateful agency. | | | ****21 years of ICE ****We’re shining a light on 21 years of harm inflicted against our communities by DHS and ICE. Help United We Dream Action build a future free from agencies created to harm our communities by donating $21 for ICE’s 21st anniversary. | | ** Peter, In the past 21 years, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), an agency created to weaponize cruel and unjust anti-immigrant policy, has inflicted irreparable damage on our communities — through family separation, cruel detentions, and deportation. We’re using the 21st anniversary to highlight ICE’s history of cruelty, emphasize our demands, and renew our fight to defund the agency: Congress : We call on Congress to not only stop their push to increase funding for ICE and CBP but to allocate that money to a bill investing in immigrant communities. President Biden : We’re calling on President Biden to shut down these over-policed immigration detention centers infected with casual racism in every corner. 21 years of ICE is 21 years too many. Peter, the truth is, if we want these demands met, we need support from grassroots contributions. Your contribution aids us in the fight to put pressure on our elected officials to close down ICE detention facilities and defund the agency’s abuses. Will you chip in $21 in protest of the 21st anniversary of the founding of ICE? We’ll need resources to amplify our message and ensure our demands are met. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your solidarity on this painful anniversary for many of us, Cynthia, United We Dream Action

I know if we dig deep, we can close the gap and start March on strong footing

Listen, this isn’t the news I want to be sharing. But I want to be honest about where we’re at and what it’s going to take to win. Nearly every pollster and political pundit is calling our race a “toss-up” and key in determining which party will hold the House majority.

If we’re going to build a campaign that is capable of defeating my oil and gas lobbyist opponent, Mike Lawler, we need to hit every fundraising goal now through November.

[**If you’re able, I’d be grateful if you could chip in $5, or whatever makes sense for you, to get our fundraising back on track. Your support will help ensure we have the best chance at defeating Mike Lawler, flipping NY-17 blue, and retaking our House majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80160810/458556980/-460793036?refcode=em24_240302_EOMTY_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240302_EOMTY_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=92a8f018-b2d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmE4ZjAxOC1iMmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xfut6qByO7DC2Qo91djMcI8tV4V6Tznj0DANUli9z4M=)

Friend, Detroit Action is a critical ally, rooted in community, fighting for housing and economic justice while providing direct services to low-income residents in our shared struggle for equity. This member-led organization is a leader on the _Rent is Too Damn High_ campaign, which is building power among renters and unhoused people across the state of Michigan. Detroit Action is also part of our nationwide ceasefire movement, speaking out for our shared humanity and against oppression everywhere. As they wrote in a statement of solidarity: Palestinians “face the daily threat of state violence—a similar fate that Black and Brown Americans face in Detroit and other cities that have become over-policed and under-resourced.” A multigenerational group of Black and brown, low and no-income, homeless and housing-insecure Michiganders, Detroit Action is challenging the root cause of poverty and racism. They’re demanding inclusion and investment for all marginalized communities that have been left behind. [**Will you make a donation to Detroit Action Education Fund, a Black-led organization that is building working class power and empowering residents “to become victors instead of victims against the system”?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqIBmhs6xUpCUokPSN0lgqUB0DarvyJfHW6IgiVxshW0fYPnxCN_kQ0S-KVL6myq0_APXspa4LXVeATM9ew5uGVqKfLYWf5b-GSrDTEZlloeKwqIWiv85-7gkUbWRgROy75BNIEPfJC9wzB-TQRd9xJiIKXAmQCHbzh_jqIYXO0LbOD-Jrb6c5KAdbGNSbHrxV0WzaaZLjGUfY6TcMpWPBuUXsmse4fXwN_BjxmS9gCJKAbYbNNk6cVDcdUQHXI5qP_NHmyWopJ0iR_CwCpU_s3xGJla2dpCf9kA9LK3VaNa-3XA8PWyszPU0lzlmtGUA3QSH2qbya3qU6mOZ2O2pYf-yAcZXvR1CGw38umpsvqOng/44b/PAmOK7uKQPqh5JwM8RQYGw/h1/h001.MfL4wsuIFN7ZdGptPgOkpCYRPLebaodphS5qshixftg) | [DONATE TO DETROIT ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJMygnURBN0IpH4Ic_KXdDzDQkUMYNV0q8f4tTmEWjQqImNwQz9rKXTdc6GrpC48A9Bfh2VP9N5VmtUwGNNXKm0z8RHzQs7sTs_CxJka8GzB64kMT1C7j7zDbnYAp0aa_eKAkxbMf2BbZQIWjenuJ9n0_jw8x8UkGAqn5T4Em0GYRM27u6BUmTNsX_Ckc-PyerbeO1-XWOs4-NqgBfizrnRKu2ZnilOgBJNHQVp6iy_Mt4_8SbUndDh0tbkVPE5KqkbYbFjxYHZzrVsYln7YpE0dlop4C29iC8lUb4Kwv4ddasrVESLATTJeOGy4cE1AZm09lv1RI2DwyW4dyxXbP5ZqJL23TZm6W7fE8VFa5Nt0Bpy3y4ObjtZY2LgOfo6MdUe4__0XRnedHC7QewoDgBOg/44b/PAmOK7uKQPqh5JwM8RQYGw/h2/h001.x6VfAmXSuKu3iUkVFy12Sjp6uXPknZsaTDj5xgl-88U)

With a focus on leadership and development, Detroit Action is empowering young people through trainings, voter registration, and civic engagement, fostering a commitment to public service in the next generation of Detroiters.
Their leadership development and trainings focus on storytelling and lived experiences―centering the experiences of people of color to shape policy and power cultural organizing.
While focused on Michigan communities, **Detroit Action is challenging systems that harm all of us, and creating a just world where everyone has housing, healthcare, quality education, and a liveable environment**.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_t=EiyQrdjE249ErEQe6Nwjfh13-StlF4wY7Q01Az04Y2wcL0m3xkW2JfX2FmHoj-HaSMG9-rHoC4rfBKbWY-5u9bjiQ5gbSmppsdWBzMf3Zak%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_e=C1mtx_O4WeL-lJnUep6VewdJLJyDan3Gxo7rOky3Huy61PUmzwXl4unfQA97pHdWjoD4R9nSeRkmWgcS2ImcGkAKXFV0QpNPHt7gpT1ukH76-1O7KqmkQlI-opWUx4juW7qH_2Xkko7UMy4W0HZKUroZJiwIKvL3xm6JwfW7da0IOS6et9QzQk0sLcmYTaG2b4t5LSQNtlDannP3JWa21sq-WwHMdqf5OagxUOhgoyJXA0wVjDHldbF7xEDEdVA2IfML4QAu5xBiFHNAo3AOWKsMZxqYj0cBrYmURvIL2AW0HjH6q54dth71YOWtpC9QjqPMpJlqDz8kgSITyOwIdDHnYbe-jahI6iKjRV3TBio6TVQkkX7-UbvzWFWHoXAfwdAikKVww-izQMr36rtCpaEBIDxqknuDA2Uq-TkeKXDnNX_DIat_XfRnQnSp7khL)

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_e=C1mtx_O4WeL-lJnUep6VewdJLJyDan3Gxo7rOky3Huy61PUmzwXl4unfQA97pHdWjoD4R9nSeRkmWgcS2ImcGkAKXFV0QpNPHt7gpT1ukH76-1O7KqmkQlI-opWUx4juW7qH_2Xkko7UMy4W0HZKUroZJiwIKvL3xm6JwfW7da0IOS6et9QzQk0sLcmYTaG2b4t5LSQNtlDannP3JWa21sq-WwHMdqf5OagxUOhgoyJXA0wVjDHldbF7xEDEdVA2IfML4QAu5xBiFHNAo3AOWP41lxRQqklo59CMRcll8v8XPvmKC9HgomiIm_FmESRiEs7nG3Jotn2gzDjtdYv2F_WUYHCbegna8PCSV-BsCK_xyotxECkoFeuWbwAAbzES6n4ggeT2IKE7GCLY9-HwkgC7ezDA8goM-nu9m1SzP5bx_ap97x3UPF4ebRu3J7ao)

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_e=C1mtx_O4WeL-lJnUep6VewdJLJyDan3Gxo7rOky3Huy61PUmzwXl4unfQA97pHdWjoD4R9nSeRkmWgcS2ImcGkAKXFV0QpNPHt7gpT1ukH76-1O7KqmkQlI-opWUx4juW7qH_2Xkko7UMy4W0HZKUroZJiwIKvL3xm6JwfW7da0IOS6et9QzQk0sLcmYTaG2b4t5LSQNtlDannP3JWa21sq-WwHMdqf5OagxUOhgoyJXA0wVjDHldbF7xEDEdVA2IfML4QAu5xBiFHNAo3AOWKXlF3owEBCBy4C2Va1fm8_Bxu1uLTz1xrpoDGkdENtoxTiK10yCTicC8kYL3eLtJUoVSbH_xKWmmv5jRziBAw2jIXJbHBE-SDJJc6oRuiWjRtVLlgpMKMVsFHU7R0IO9TWvsrPbMQ-I6lvjKo3imdhugv3ov4VcI90CQKR5qda2)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

**Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_e=C1mtx_O4WeL-lJnUep6VewdJLJyDan3Gxo7rOky3Huy61PUmzwXl4unfQA97pHdWjoD4R9nSeRkmWgcS2ImcGkAKXFV0QpNPHt7gpT1ukH76-1O7KqmkQlI-opWUx4juW7qH_2Xkko7UMy4W0HZKUroZJiwIKvL3xm6JwfW7da0IOS6et9QzQk0sLcmYTaG2b4t5LSQNtlDannP3JWa21sq-WwHMdqf5OagxUOhgoyJXA0wVjDHldbF7xEDEdVA2IfML4QAu5xBiFHNAo3AOWBT3qOtJ13cSw7YzBdRM_mLiI1OrBf7XlfXFNg2tN8KqObTRmx7gIzm1FiZBuTaDjhUv-XVRS9vlaDBxMOrCblk1oUBFZpiIDlD-nhY5doDtcsWvqgdn_OwdTRo_lrvrCdumlmxrgACbhSXhLke6ujmEUTUNZSRVPgWl8hcnmUiS)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_t=EiyQrdjE249ErEQe6Nwjfh13-StlF4wY7Q01Az04Y2wcL0m3xkW2JfX2FmHoj-HaSMG9-rHoC4rfBKbWY-5u9RFsay6RGBJl8kk7tXMy4gbeOGaP4NmeoW9N5Iztc8271y3EkDuSOZh9fedLjHgWa-aXlwar_m49D6jfPLy6EnI%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=3ba7405e7d01439182c99fe7cb9cb15a&_t=EiyQrdjE249ErEQe6Nwjfh13-StlF4wY7Q01Az04Y2wcL0m3xkW2JfX2FmHoj-HaSMG9-rHoC4rfBKbWY-5u9bjiQ5gbSmppsdWBzMf3Zak%3D).
---

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

clean_body: | | | ** You tell’em I’m comin’ and progress is comin’ with me! Howdy folks, y’all know we need to change Congress. Our do-nothing representatives have forgotten why they were sent there - to work, not to play games and protect their self interests. We need a new marshal - Derek Marshall. He will fight for comprehensive immigration solutions, affordable housing, real affordable universal healthcare, and better union jobs instead of playing party politics with our democracy. Derek’s opponent Jay Obernolte voted NO on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that brought $3 billion in new funds, a high speed rail system, and 35,000 new jobs to our district! **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Rep. Obernolte said we need a secure Southern border, but now he has reversed course at Trump’s behest and he’s refusing to take action to fix it. He voted against democracy when he voted against certifying the 2020 election, reproductive freedom, and LGBTQIA+ equality. Our communities, our country, and our democracy are being damaged by elected leaders who are willing to stall progress to protect Trump and the MAGA agenda. Whether you are a business owner, a union member, or someone who wants a brighter future for the generations to come, Derek will fight for a better quality of life for his constituents! **** ****See you at the polls, partner. -Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Join The Heritage Foundation
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWAtKjPiNB

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWAtKjPiNB

Dear
Fellow Conservative,

I hope
this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to
welcome new members in 2024, and we would be honored if you
joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions
in Washington and across the country.

As
someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government,
and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your
help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the
direction of our country.

I would
like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation
today by clicking on this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

Once you
become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive
members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research
reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will
help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to
undermine American values.

Thank you
for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope
to welcome you to our community soon.

Best
regards,

Alexander
Hyatt

Membership Programs
The
Heritage Foundation

P.S. When
you activate your membership, you will also receive a
personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy
update emails. Join us today by clicking on this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate/

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

subject: YOU'RE INVITE: ANDREA HUNLEY'S BIRTHDAY PARTY!
body:
Join me for my birthday party + fundraiser on Friday 3/15. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d7861a6ea4d8/youre-invite-andrea-hunleys-birthday-party?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| | **YOU'RE INVITED! ** I want you to come help me celebrate my 40th birthday. I'd love to ring in a new decade with some great music and food, surrounded by people who are passionate about making our city and state a better place.

**WHEN:** Friday, March 15 from 6-9pm
**WHERE:** The Stutz- 1060 N. Capitol Ave
---
|
---
| | **LOGISTICS** **The more the merrier, invite friends and neighbors. All ages are welcome.**

**Parking:** Take the Red Line (convenient stop at Capitol & 9th). Parking is available on the street, or in the lot on the corner of 11th & Capitol.

**Best Entrance:** Enter off of Capitol Ave at the pedestrian alley near Grounded Plant and Floral Co (1060 N. Capitol Ave, Suite 4-101).

**Attire:** Come as you are. I'll be wearing my dancing shoes.

**Food & Drink Details: **We will have a variety of appetizers and beverages.

**Music:** The one and only DJ MetroGnome will be in the house!

**RSVP:** Reply to info@andreahunley.com and let us know you're coming.
**Donations:** We'll send you a link to donate before the party. Donations by check can be made payable to Andrea Hunley for Indy. Suggested donation amounts: $40, $400, $1984.

[**$1,547,516**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80166149/458574212/1698357921?refcode=20240302_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_rs&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMxMzc3ZC1iYWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Ii6VZXYBo4lzDqHhjoLmU6l4A7lcalMHJ18Wupybo=) That’s how much Don Bacon has in his campaign war chest thanks to corporate PACs and special interest donors. [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80166157/458574234/1698357921?refcode=20240302_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_rs&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMxMzc3ZC1iYWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Ii6VZXYBo4lzDqHhjoLmU6l4A7lcalMHJ18Wupybo=) That’s how much I’m asking you to donate today to help me defeat Don Bacon in November, put Nebraskans first in Washington, and fight for an economy that works for everyone. [**_I know $5 might not seem like much against all of Bacon’s corporate PAC money from fancy fundraisers thrown by outside Republicans. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Dear Friend, **[Please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help me win...](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e1cc11b18a0140dfa3647b6ba2e2b2c3&_e=JW9gOG4fwanuf2Z9hKIzhaLX-hQMxD_gwpOV4oIHy_VlKdT8BfuXth67Z56XyTMqVsHVckUX9QaAkCSuUt2i9eZhHi2hVmMkZlx_E3H4wR2ohCOY2hEpx0jEVj5XbFZ33_jXyuBTqmm_JmeOOns_oPTcmyQH2vQPNOel1NtWVizsiDklLnRaVY1oKcRnbxslKdRsr3g8brSb38v-hzKcgaVnW6V5YD2LCsxXotV2R_Z8Q8Yw7MNPdZ2vah-EbMlpbnDXxyLrmYBkXn8DZgSI0STnCtZz2qO0d1yOnG5DUN2s82zj97MXds_QXZoKri0NATXv_dVa8UPFqJ54eNH_Z_dElDzfusSna64p04Ld6csBGX14n4EYqHENrCJjU8NOvG8rU3AC_qKl2BG_jtZCwA%3D%3D)** ...a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992... ...a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades... ...and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future. I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e1cc11b18a0140dfa3647b6ba2e2b2c3&_e=JW9gOG4fwanuf2Z9hKIzhaLX-hQMxD_gwpOV4oIHy_VlKdT8BfuXth67Z56XyTMqVsHVckUX9QaAkCSuUt2i9eZhHi2hVmMkZlx_E3H4wR2ohCOY2hEpx0jEVj5XbFZ33_jXyuBTqmm_JmeOOns_oPTcmyQH2vQPNOel1NtWVizsiDklLnRaVY1oKcRnbxslKdRsr3g8brSb38v-hzKcgaVnW6V5YD2LCsxXotV2R_aH-ZsUTX7qs8GEmlR-I9atTq-6g7yvitEPOTn34QR95vqA6UPhVTrwLfdIBS7ei4-m5bPLg1PwcMCrUe7kS_v9solZt4kKoGsLji-YkqrX29z4Hg8WSHBQ0cZo20ei0BCgalIEj-D44Z9mFY_y4Dhwok9jWtx8eIIdUU3c16ascg%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e1cc11b18a0140dfa3647b6ba2e2b2c3&_e=JW9gOG4fwanuf2Z9hKIzhaLX-hQMxD_gwpOV4oIHy_VlKdT8BfuXth67Z56XyTMqVsHVckUX9QaAkCSuUt2i9eZhHi2hVmMkZlx_E3H4wR2ohCOY2hEpx0jEVj5XbFZ33_jXyuBTqmm_JmeOOns_oPTcmyQH2vQPNOel1NtWVizsiDklLnRaVY1oKcRnbxslKdRsr3g8brSb38v-hzKcgaVnW6V5YD2LCsxXotV2R_aSUK1yZoXFnVXZNUMCW4qLrRHNQSUcXChyriRzX-fYE7DiznRVbttTjgpeuVmWtG1M7ay3X08g7_QpVv10QJMWFNMVh1LbbQKGiilqjj5ASqOOvMaTUHPtK1_LX_0worYdGSZOusvGR2yls5002XfMYAhbtcWBkVLwMHf0vgf1Kg%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

name: COURIER
subject: The dangerous rise of the Sinclair Broadcast Group
body:
For years now, the right-wing media empire has been responsible for the shuttering of local newsrooms nationwide.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80167591/458576125/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDdmNGU3NGEtYmNkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8GnOHrMRcHsmTb7WSHSoeU7OgVbiluE0sc_9FlVxMJo=&emci=904de16f-30d7-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=47f4e74a-bcd8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Earlier this year, _The Baltimore Sun_ — the largest daily newspaper in Maryland — was purchased by the Sinclair Broadcast Group, the right-wing media empire that’s been taking over local media outlets for the last decade.
In case you don’t know, _The Baltimore Sun_ is one of the highest-quality newspapers in the country. In 2020, they won the Pulitzer Prize for local reporting.
Despite this fact, Sinclair’s ownership of _The Sun_ is off to a disturbing start:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80167592/458576126/-593472309?refcode=20240302-EM-BaltimoreSun2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDdmNGU3NGEtYmNkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8GnOHrMRcHsmTb7WSHSoeU7OgVbiluE0sc_9FlVxMJo=)
As local newsrooms close or get gobbled up by the right-wing Sinclair, more and more communities are being left without reliable local news coverage, leaving “news deserts” where communities are susceptible to right-wing disinformation.
[**At COURIER, we’re fighting back by building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in the country. We call ourselves Democracy’s newsroom – can you chip in today to power our work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80167593/458576127/-593472309?refcode=20240302-EM-BaltimoreSun2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDdmNGU3NGEtYmNkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8GnOHrMRcHsmTb7WSHSoeU7OgVbiluE0sc_9FlVxMJo=)
Just last year, Sinclair made news by ceasing most or all local news broadcasts at 10 of its stations in different cities and states across the country.
As multiple news teams were laid off, they were replaced by Sinclair’s national weekday program, _The National Desk_ — **which has a lengthy history of platforming right-wing misinformation. **
Unsurprisingly, _The National Desk_ is no substitute for real local news. The program devotes the overwhelming majority of its programming to national news stories and has aired and repeated right-wing misinformation and conspiracy theories on everything from the January 6th insurrection to immigration and much more.
But that’s not all, Peter. Sinclair has even used the program to propagate antisemitic stereotypes and conspiracy theories.
_**Needless to say, none of this is good for our democracy. **_
With one of the most consequential elections in our lifetime approaching, the need for accessible, factual news to cut through right-wing BS has never been more critical.
And it’s become increasingly clear that the mainstream media aren’t up for the task.
That’s why COURIER was founded to be the antidote to right-wing misinformation. Our mission of providing local, factual news restores trust in journalism, a key institution of any healthy democracy.
But if we’re going to remain at the forefront of exposing dangerous propaganda from right-wing media empires like the Sinclair Broadcast Group, it’s essential that our newsrooms have the resources they need to continue providing their communities with high-quality journalism.
[**So, can you pitch in $10 today to support COURIER’s honest journalism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80167594/458576128/-593472309?refcode=20240302-EM-BaltimoreSun2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDdmNGU3NGEtYmNkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8GnOHrMRcHsmTb7WSHSoeU7OgVbiluE0sc_9FlVxMJo=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: |
