body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8d98a193e6&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

On Monday, I attended a morning briefing with the mining industry to start the week. Arizonans rely on minerals and other rock products each day. From building homes to schools to building and maintaining our roads and bridges it is imperative to keep this industry buzzing. The link between aggregates and a thriving economy are also closely correlated. For every $1 of aggregate sales products nearly $4 of sales in other industries is produced. **Did you know each American uses about 10 tons of aggregates each year? ** Think of everything you do daily. Aggregates are the second most utilized product in the world behind crude petroleum.

The Senate Republican caucus met with former Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker and some of his counterparts with Arizona State University’s Center for American Institutions to learn about a new study released called: [The Study of American History in Our Universities](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=407bce5d3e&e=a7ab36849c). As you may know, Donald Critchlow, Director of the Center for American Institutions has been at the tip of the spear highlighting the need for more civics education in our schools. This report examines what content is included in today’s American history college courses. As you can imagine, a lot of DEI has been added to this coursework while removing the reading and study of our Founding documents and replacing it with the study of incarceration and inequality.

Due to an impending long floor session, Senate Committee on Finance and Commerce was canceled for a second week in a row to handle the massive amount of Senate bills left to pass to send over to the House. Next week’s agenda has over 20 bills listed on its [agenda](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1c34b40309&e=a7ab36849c) so we are going to be sure to continue to do the people’s work.

On Tuesday early in the afternoon, I took a quick break from the action in the State Senate to give a brief legislative update to a group of senior citizens living at a local senior living center. Currently, there are a few bills that have been introduced that would impact senior citizens, including
* Senate Bill 1148- this bill would provide a one-time $250 tax rebate per qualified individual over the age of 65 during FY 2022.
* Senate Bill 1598- this bill would appropriate $5 million from the state general fund in FY 25 to AHCCS to provide up to three months of institutional services and home and community-based services to individuals who have not been determined eligible for coverage under the Arizona Long Term Care System.
* Senate Bill 1335- this bill would appropriate $1 million in FY 25 from the state general fund to the Department of Economic Security for the Older Individuals Who are Blind program to help persons who are blind or visually impaired achieve their goals for independent living.
* House Bill 2505- this bill would create conditions that would require entrance fees to be returned to a person who is vacating a senior living facility.
* House Bill 2444- this bill would require a health insurer to accept tangible checks as a form of acceptable payment and establishes reporting requirements for health care provider grievances.
* House Bill 2653- this bill establishes requirements for electronic monitoring devices and incident reporting for assisted living facilities. This bill also makes Arizona Department of Health Services employee’s mandatory reporters of abuse, neglect, or exploitation of a vulnerable adult.
* House Bill 2587- this bill would require the Arizona Department of Health Services when determining the amount of a civil penalty to consider whether the health care institution and staff are following the vulnerable adult reporting requirements.
* House Bill 2764- this bill would require the Director of Arizona Department of Health Services to establish a certification process for assisted living facilities and nursing care institutions wishing to provide enhanced memory care services.

I also took the opportunity to reference the [Senior Citizens Voter Bill of Rights](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4f576789b8&e=a7ab36849c). It’s important to protect the integrity of all ballots young and old. Senior citizens may face more hurdles to voting than other voting populations due to mobility issues or lack of transportation.

It is also worth noting the American Constitutional Rights Union has dedicated a voter fraud hotline for senior citizens. If you or a loved one would like to report voter fraud, please call 1-888-820-VOTE. Let’s be sure seniors can continue to have trust and confidence in the integrity of their ballots.

A big shout out and thank you to one of my **most** fantastic volunteers, Caroline, for helping me set up this important introduction! I look forward to returning soon to answer their questions, but I had to rush back to the Capitol to continue voting on legislation. Thank you to the Senate President for affording me special dispensation to spend some time in my district during a busy day at the Senate.

On Wednesday morning, two of my bills were assigned to House committee agendas for a hearing, including [Senate Bill 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e640548d3&e=a7ab36849c) passing unanimously out of committee and [Senate Bill 1370](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4ad0a9a584&e=a7ab36849c) passing with a majority of the vote. Later, the Senate was in Committee of the Whole for a while debating issues ranging from water to taxes. A few of my bills are garnering some attention. A local constituent who had asked me to sponsor a bill to prohibit reunification camps in Arizona some received news coverage and [ink](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8f592da427&e=a7ab36849c).

On Thursday afternoon, considering Friday’s March for Life rally at the Capitol, I read a pro-life proclamation on the floor of the State Senate. It isn’t the first time I have dedicated some of my time on the floor to [talk](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=56ff3cc364&e=a7ab36849c) about the unborn and it won’t be the last. On Friday morning, I attended the annual pro-life rally down at the Capitol with thousands of other like-minded individuals who march to protect the lives of the most vulnerable. It was an honor to stand with my Republican colleagues [on stage](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ad0453c7af&e=a7ab36849c) as Representative Bliss read the same proclamation I had read on Thursday afternoon.

**Do you want to attend the RNC Convention in Milwaukee?**

Do you want to be a State and/or National Delegate to the Arizona Convention or RNC Convention? If you are a registered Republican in Arizona and would like to potentially become an Arizona state delegate on April 27th to represent Arizona at the [RNC convention](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0ba8c630de&e=a7ab36849c) in Wisconsin this summer, please be sure to let the [AZGOP](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4a3984fb53&e=a7ab36849c) know by 11:59 pm on March 15 by emailing Nancy Cottle, the Nominations Chair at [Nominations2024@azgop.com](mailto:Nominations2024@azgop.com) with your intent to fun for both the State Convention and National Convention.

**Special Message from the GOP**

If you’re interested in partaking in Arizona’s Poll Observer Training, here is their upcoming schedule:

Mar 8th 6pm
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZApc-uqrzwjG9JvAL8kXG2Y6ekVjxESTzXV](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bf88173241&e=a7ab36849c)

Mar 13th 1pm
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZAqd-GtqTMrHtMvMWo39RKqJiNj4zfAPQX1](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=230f61ebfd&e=a7ab36849c)

Mar 18th 7pm
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZMvduirrjwpEtKt9etxuFLIKRoVXLhK5gJp](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f1bb9a8069&e=a7ab36849c)

**Presidential Preference Election**

If you are a registered voter on the Active Early Voting List, be sure to mail your mail-in ballot. If you vote in person, please be sure to find the nearest [voting location](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3e0d7977c8&e=a7ab36849c) and vote.

I hope you find these weekly updates useful. I try to pack a powerful punch into one update so I am not bogging down your inboxes.

Take care,
Shawnna
---
| **P.S.**

In order to compete, we need to raise a lot of funds to propel our campaign. Can you help chip in today to ensure we maintain a Republican Majority come November 2024?
---
| [Help a Republican Win in 2024](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e90d170b0&e=a7ab36849c "Help a Republican Win in 2024")
---
| **P.S.S.**

The GOP primary was moved up a week and so was the deadline to submit our signatures. If you live in Legislative District 2, please sign my online nomination petition today.

| [Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ee8aa865b8&e=a7ab36849c "Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition ")

body:
Thank you
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240302-3579-footer&t=1&akid=3579%2E420207%2EHly3NW)
Thank you, Peter.
Whether you chipped in, signed petitions, or even just opened and read an email like this — your support of this campaign is deeply appreciated.
We’re incredibly grateful for all that we’ve accomplished _._ From building out our voter outreach efforts to fortifying our organizing resources, we’ve made great progress — _but our work together is just getting started._
_T_ _housands of you_ chipped in all throughout the month to ensure that Pramila had the resources to fight for our values amidst Republicans and their caucus of chaos in Congress.
**March is set to be a key influential financial marker of this campaign.** And we know AIPAC and their GOP megadonors have Pramila on their progressive target list.
**Our momentum, our movement’s continued growth, and Pramila’s time in Congress entirely depends on how hard we work for it****, Peter.**[**If you stand with us, please help kick off our March fundraising with a donation of any amount.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240302.A36sSr&refcode=em20240302-3579&t=2&akid=3579%2E420207%2EHly3NW)

We can’t wait to see what more we can accomplish with you on our side.
Together,
Team Pramila

| | Friends, Thank you so much for your generous support over the last few days. On Wednesday, our campaign launched a flash fundraising goal of $5,000 to help us meet our February budget goals. I am proud to tell you that we reached – and surpassed – this goal in just 48 hours! **We are starting out March on a strong footing, and that’s all thanks to you and so many others like you who believe in the campaign we’re building. ** We’re less than three months away from the primary election, so we’ve been ramping up our efforts in a major way. We’re meeting with voters across the state, discussing how we’re going to lead with honesty and integrity in the Secretary of State’s office. Here are a couple photos from our recent events – meeting with teachers in Eugene and welcoming former Ohio Democratic Party Chair and author David Pepper to Portland!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80168159/458577121/327344370?refcode=20240301&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjFlOGE3Yi1iZGQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r5j7-4pvUzNBHLDa1dCNo69Ntnxauos546n4jc6QG7Q=)

Friend, Most politicians rely on consultants and D.C. insiders to guide their agendas — but not me.

In fact, when I’m on the ballot in Michigan’s Senate election, it’ll be everyday Americans like **YOU** who decide whether or not I go to Washington.

So with that being said, I’d like to ask for a little help in determining what I should talk about on the campaign trail. Marsha Blackburn is one of America’s LEAST POPULAR Senators. _That’s what happens when you ignore your state and your constituents for years._ Since she was elected to the Senate, she’s even refused to face Tennesseans at town halls. body:
They shouldn’t be stressed out about chaos in the U.S. Senate. So, we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents instead of scoring political points.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80169278/458580154/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzExYTdlOC1iZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3BSLiKrcuSA7jH9Sr9A3aNiT9rvg6tKvExnQ4gsef8=&emci=ce9675e2-bed8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=9c11a7e8-bed8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=7731215)

| | Working families have enough on their plates. They shouldn't be stressed out about chaos in the U.S. Senate. So, we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents instead of scoring political points. Pennsylvania needs a workhorse in the Senate, not a show horse. My friend, Senator Bob Casey, has always been a workhorse, and he gets results because he knows where he can make a difference. Take a look at this bill he introduced to make it easier for people to participate in our democracy. **Sen. Casey just introduced legislation to make it easier for people with disabilities to vote and run for office.** This would ensure that people with disabilities are no longer disproportionately excluded from American democracy – and that's a win for everyone. Control of the Senate is on the line, and we cannot afford to sit back and let attack ads go unanswered. Unlike his multimillionaire opponent, who can write big checks to his own campaign, Bob needs the momentum of our grassroots team to finish first. [**This could be the most expensive Senate race in the country, so will you split a donation between Bob's campaign and The Blue Wave Project right now to keep PA blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80169279/458580155/-1921836943?refcode=2024-03-02-casey&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9c11a7e8-bed8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzExYTdlOC1iZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3BSLiKrcuSA7jH9Sr9A3aNiT9rvg6tKvExnQ4gsef8=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80169282/458580156/-1921836943?refcode=2024-03-02-casey&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9c11a7e8-bed8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzExYTdlOC1iZWQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3BSLiKrcuSA7jH9Sr9A3aNiT9rvg6tKvExnQ4gsef8=) Here's why Bob needs your grassroots support today. **A super PAC funded by right-wing billionaire Charles Koch and other GOP dark money mega-donors is days away from launching a $1 million ad buy against Bob Casey – the first major ad buy of the election cycle.** What happens in Pennsylvania will determine who becomes Senate Majority Leader and who will sit in the Oval Office, so it's no surprise that GOP attacks are starting earlier than ever – and we know they won't let up. Mitch McConnell and his billionaire backers are going to put everything they can behind their hand-picked candidate, David McCormick. They've got a war chest with Bob's name on it, and they'll use it to attack Bob, flip this seat, and flip the Senate. clean_body: They shouldn’t be stressed out about chaos in the U.S. Senate. So, we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents instead of scoring political points. | | | | Working families have enough on their plates. They shouldn't be stressed out about chaos in the U.S. Senate. So, we need to elect people who take the job seriously and focus on the issues that matter most to their constituents instead of scoring political points. Pennsylvania needs a workhorse in the Senate, not a show horse. My friend, Senator Bob Casey, has always been a workhorse, and he gets results because he knows where he can make a difference. Take a look at this bill he introduced to make it easier for people to participate in our democracy. Sen. Casey just introduced legislation to make it easier for people with disabilities to vote and run for office. This would ensure that people with disabilities are no longer disproportionately excluded from American democracy – and that's a win for everyone. Control of the Senate is on the line, and we cannot afford to sit back and let attack ads go unanswered. Unlike his multimillionaire opponent, who can write big checks to his own campaign, Bob needs the momentum of our grassroots team to finish first. = = Here's why Bob needs your grassroots support today. A super PAC funded by right-wing billionaire Charles Koch and other GOP dark money mega-donors is days away from launching a $1 million ad buy against Bob Casey – the first major ad buy of the election cycle. What happens in Pennsylvania will determine who becomes Senate Majority Leader and who will sit in the Oval Office, so it's no surprise that GOP attacks are starting earlier than ever – and we know they won't let up. Mitch McConnell and his billionaire backers are going to put everything they can behind their hand-picked candidate, David McCormick. They've got a war chest with Bob's name on it, and they'll use it to attack Bob, flip this seat, and flip the Senate. With the Senate majority hinging on Pennsylvania, Bob needs the resources to fight back. It could be the difference between a red Senate – and a blue Senate. = Onward! clean_body: Join the fight from anywhere >>>>>> | The countdown is on! California’s March 5th Primary Election is only 3 days away, and the urgent need for bold climate action has never been greater. As we approach election day, the best way that you can help put our climate champions over the finish line is by helping them contact as many voters as possible to remind them to cast their ballots before polls close. That’s where you come in: We’re rallying a national team of volunteers to help Get Out The Vote in the last stretch. Whether you live in one of our key districts, or across the country, you can help make phone calls to voters from the comfort of your own home. Our candidates have virtual volunteer phone banks every day from now until the Tuesday Primary, starting TONIGHT: | TONIGHT: Saturday, March 2nd at 6:00 pm PT Phone bank for Alex Mohajer for CA State Senate | Sunday, March 3rd anytime 9:00 am-5:30 pm PT Phone bank for Brian Calderón Tabatabai Monday, March 4th at 5:00 pm PT Phone bank for Sade Elhawary for CA State Assembly Tuesday, March 5th from 1:00-7:00 pm PT Phone bank for Christy Holstege (with the CA Dems)! Every phone call you make during one of these phone banks could make the difference in electing a climate champion to office. Even if you’ve never phone banked before, the event organizers will prepare you with all of the resources and information you need to be successful! Just choose an action from the list above that best fits your schedule. Together, we can make a real difference. -Jane Fonda Climate PAC Organizing Team P.S. All California voters: Don’t forget to vote on or before Tuesday! For more information on how to vote, visit | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Peter,

Last year, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication. While the U.S. Supreme Court issued a stay that has preserved access to mifepristone until it reaches a formal decision, we’re now _weeks away_ from oral arguments being presented.

**The ultra-conservative court will begin hearing arguments on mifepristone's FDA status on March 26 — nearly two years after they issued their decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and destroyed the right to choose nationwide.__**

Make no mistake, Peter, this is _exactly_ what Republicans were hoping would happen when they packed the Supreme Court with dangerous anti-choice justices. Despite overwhelming research affirming mifepristone's safety, millions of Americans' access to reproductive care now lies in the hands of an unelected court with no medical expertise.

****We're running a nationwide poll to gauge what this community thinks about the Supreme Court and this landmark case — _and we want to hear from you, Peter_. Represent Pennsylvania by taking our short survey now >>****
****Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)?****

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Ramping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
As we head into the general election next week, we need to ramp up our programming.
#
Since launching our new voter registration program in December, we’ve gotten THOUSANDS of our volunteers trained and certified as Volunteer Deputy Registrars (VDRs) so that they can help register Texas voters.
In order to build a program the size of Texas, we’re holding three VDR trainings every single week. We’re also running digital ads and holding organizing drives across the state to recruit more volunteers to join this effort.
In a state with 254 counties and over 3 million eligible but unregistered Democrats to reach, this kind of volunteer recruitment requires a lot of resources — which is why we’re reaching out to supporters like you to ask for your help.
**According to our records, you’ve never donated to Powered by People — but there’s never been a better time to make your first contribution.** Once the primaries end next week, the general election will be in full swing, and we’ll need to quickly ramp up our programming.
[**Will you chip in your very first $3 donation to Powered by People today to help us continue to grow our work ahead of the 2024 elections?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240302.iPZiOj&refcode=ema20240302-239493&t=21&akid=239493%2E444211%2EwjUIgd)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240302.iPZiOj&refcode=ema20240302-239493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=239493%2E444211%2EwjUIgd)**
Thank you for hearing us out. We know you have a lot on your plate, so we’re deeply grateful when you take the time to read about and support our work. Chipping in a few dollars today may not feel like much, but together, all of our individual efforts will add up to help us win these critical upcoming elections.
More soon,
Kate Roberts
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240302-239493-footer&t=41&refcode2=239493_444211_wjUIgd&akid=239493%2E444211%2EwjUIgd)**

Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia challenged the rights of another nearly 100,000 voters.

[**_Peter, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. Here’s what Congresswoman Eshoo said about Zoe:

**_Return Zoe Lofgren’s expertise to Congress_**
_I_ _am proud to serve with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren, the chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation and one of the most respected members of Congress. She is an expert on immigration law, science policy and a former chair of the House Ethics Committee.

I’m disgusted by Charlene Nijmeh’s campaign that is centered on disinformation — including the recent distribution of flyers with pictures of Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi and House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries with the candidate, clearly meant to mislead voters. Both Pelosi and Jeffries endorse Zoe Lofgren.

Disinformation destroys democracy. Voters must stand with truth and vote to reelect Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren._

Team, we couldn't agree more.

Ahead of California’s primary next week, attacks against Zoe are at an all-time high. Even long-time Trump ally Roger Stone has chimed in, urging voters to support Zoe’s primary opponent.

With disinformation flooding this race, Zoe needs our support more than ever.

_**[Zoe is under attack as never before and needs our urgent help. Will you make a donation of any amount to help Zoe fight back against disinformation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80173365/458586590/1766860545?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_ZL_20240302_FR_EshooLetter_0_3MO_ZoeLofgren_NA_NA_EshooLetter2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhNjE0MS1jNGQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Got_GXDrtCrdRHasY6GUNSSZ2LXHgZo_KtLB5DAgVvM=)**_

Thanks,

Team Zoe

|

name: Pauley Perrette
subject: We need Adam’s experience in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5725%2E5257348%2EZVqASb)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5725%2E5257348%2EZVqASb)
Hey!
Pauley Perrette here.
You might know me from many things
including playing forensic scientist Abby Sciuto
on the show _NCIS_ for over a decade,
but today I am writing to you as a voter.
I am writing to you as a voter
who is proud to call Adam Schiff my friend.
Adam Schiff and I met years ago
because we are both very dedicated
to working in the nonprofit world.
At the time, we were fighting hard
for LGBT rights and marriage equality for all.
We have very similar values
and became very good friends.
And now he has been my congressman for years.
He has been seen fighting all kinds of good fights
and has proven himself to be someone
who really stands up for democracy
and stands up for America.
In my own personal life,
he has certainly proven himself as a friend
and as someone who really listens and cares.
When I needed someone
to listen to me about our lack of effective stalking laws,
he was the only one who listened.
He met with myself and several other stalking victims
several times.
Domestic violence, sexual assault,
threats to women’s safety and well being...
all of these things.
He listened.
He cared.

When my Alabama father,
a very strong and outspoken Republican,
needed someone to listen to him
about ideas he had for improving
the illiteracy rates, poverty levels and quality of life
in Coosa County, Alabama, where I grew up,
Adam Schiff was the one who invited my father
to meet with him in his office
in Washington, DC
and listened and cared about
everything he had to say.
We need Adam Schiff as our senator.
We need Adam Schiff speaking up for us.
We need an Adam Schiff listening to us.
We need Adam Schiff because he cares.

**[Please join me in supporting Adam Schiff.
You can donate to his campaign for the
United States Senate today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5725%2E5257348%2EZVqASb)**
We need to use everything we have,
Our voices,
Our donations,
Our desire to make this country the best it can be.
We need Adam Schiff
who really will fight for us
who really is a good person
who really is a good friend
and will be our next great
American Senator.
Thank you so much,
Pauley Perrette
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5725%2E5257348%2EZVqASb)

clean_body: | Hey! Pauley Perrette here. You might know me from many things including playing forensic scientist Abby Sciuto on the show NCIS for over a decade, but today I am writing to you as a voter. I am writing to you as a voter who is proud to call Adam Schiff my friend. Adam Schiff and I met years ago because we are both very dedicated to working in the nonprofit world. At the time, we were fighting hard for LGBT rights and marriage equality for all. We have very similar values and became very good friends. And now he has been my congressman for years. He has been seen fighting all kinds of good fights and has proven himself to be someone who really stands up for democracy and stands up for America. In my own personal life, he has certainly proven himself as a friend and as someone who really listens and cares. When I needed someone to listen to me about our lack of effective stalking laws, he was the only one who listened. He met with myself and several other stalking victims several times. Domestic violence, sexual assault, threats to women’s safety and well being... all of these things. He listened. He cared. When my Alabama father, a very strong and outspoken Republican, needed someone to listen to him about ideas he had for improving the illiteracy rates, poverty levels and quality of life in Coosa County, Alabama, where I grew up, Adam Schiff was the one who invited my father to meet with him in his office in Washington, DC and listened and cared about everything he had to say. We need Adam Schiff as our senator. We need Adam Schiff speaking up for us. We need an Adam Schiff listening to us. We need Adam Schiff because he cares. We need to use everything we have, Our voices, Our donations, Our desire to make this country the best it can be. We need Adam Schiff who really will fight for us who really is a good person who really is a good friend and will be our next great American Senator. Thank you so much, Pauley Perrette 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: $25 so we never go back to how you felt when Trump was elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | |
---
Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember as we head into Super Tuesday. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected President in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to give us an extra push heading into Super Tuesday? clean_body: Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember as we head into Super Tuesday. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected President in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Biden-Harris

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: They didn't count on this!
body:
There is no way we would be at this moment without you. |
---
| | This is it, Peter. Election Day will be here in just three days.

We're on the edge of an incredible victory that will shock the political world.

**But I want you to know: there is NO WAY we would be at this moment without YOU.**

How did we get here? The GOP power brokers with the deep pockets endorsed my opponent a year ago! They didn't want a primary!

_But they made a strategic error: they didn't count on grassroots voters like you and me paying attention to this race._

They didn't count on everyday patriots who are sick and tired of career politicians rising up to reject Washington business-as-usual. They didn't count on voters wanting to nominate an America First conservative who can actually take the fight to the Democrats and WIN in November.

**I'm not running for Congress to preserve the status quo. I'm running to break it.**

[**Our campaign isn't funded by deep pockets in Washington. It's entirely powered by grassroots like you from Day One. If you're standing with me in these final hours, please rush in a $25 donation TODAY to help us win every last vote we can.**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=5b1084543c&e=86e91e802d)

Our country can be saved if we elect the right kind of leaders who will fight to save her. America is worth fighting for.

I'm so glad you're with us,

Max Ukropina
---

Greetings from the campaign trail, Peter!
As one of my most active supporters, I wanted to share my first campaign newsletter with you before anyone else with what's been going on. Check out some highlights that have fueled me and my campaign over the past few months. I just love meeting so many people from every corner of Alaska, hearing your dreams, suggestions and advice. Thanks for all you do,

clean_body: | | | | | Greetings from the campaign trail, Peter! As one of my most active supporters, I wanted to share my first campaign newsletter with you before anyone else with what's been going on. Check out some highlights that have fueled me and my campaign over the past few months. I just love meeting so many people from every corner of Alaska, hearing your dreams, suggestions and advice. Thanks for all you do, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | Our campaign has picked up the support of several influential national and state leaders in addition to all of the amazing grassroots support from Alaskans! ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC | | | | | | | At the all new you'll be able to learn about my campaign and ways you can help our growing movement. | You're the first to know that we've launched a ! Grab yourself (or that special conservative on your shopping list) an item or two. This is a great way to wear your Alaska and American pride on your sleeve...or on your mug! Our "I Heart Alaska" line is the perfect gift or maybe let everyone know who you're voting for. | The Alaska Republican Party is helping to keep Mary Peltola honest about her record in Washington, D.C. and here in Alaska! Check out their insights and investigative prowess as they dig up the truth about our absentee Congresswoman so that we can shine a light for voters across Alaska. Check out LOTS more here: | Thanks for reading the first edition of the Dahlstrom Dispatch! Your continued support means the world. If you can chip in a few dollars, your generosity will go a long way. Here are some other ways you can help us build a formidable campaign against Mary Peltola and the Democrat machine: | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

“A career-long problem solver, businesswoman, and working mom of four, **Janelle Bynum is exactly the kind of leader and fighter that Oregon’s 5th Congressional District deserves.** I’m proud to support her in this fight for our families and Oregon’s future.”

clean_body: Hi there, how are you? I’m Robert, and I want to tell you about how I came to be messaging you. | = | = Hi there, how are you? I’m Robert, and I want to tell you about how I came to be messaging you. See, last January, the California Democratic Party sent you an email asking for donations to hire a full-time organizer in one of the most competitive regions of the state. They were direct and honest, saying: If we hit this goal, we hire an organizer. If we miss this goal, we can’t do it. Well, thanks to supporters like you, we got the needed budget and hired an organizer — me! That’s right, I’m the full-time organizer who is making phone calls, text messages, and knocking on doors right now to ensure that Democrats win up and down the ballot next Tuesday in our critical primary. Your donations have a real impact, team. When we send you a message, it’s not a cheap gimmick or scare tactic. You are helping build a movement that will flip key U.S. House districts from red to blue and take back our House Majority in 2024. Democrats only need to flip FOUR seats to fire Speaker Mike Johnson, and there are EIGHT ultra-competitive Republican seats right here in California. = = = = = = Thanks for reading and for the amazing opportunity. \- Robert Coachella Valley Regional Organizer | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. # **[Biden& Trump Visit Border](http://trk.libertyledger._g)**
---
President Biden visited the southern border on Thursday. But in a split screen symbolic of the political moment, former President Donald Trump also made an appearance in a different Texas border town. While President Biden visited Brownsville, Texas to meet with border patrol agents, law enforcement officials, and local leaders, President Trump was in Eagle ..
**Read More**
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTIyMTM2In0/IEptWVULHZuaIHI5JgIgeg)

White House Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre faced tough questions from reporters on Wednesday as she tried to downplay concerns about President Joe Biden’s cognitive ability. Just hours after the president returned from his annual physical, Jean-Pierre was forced to defend the decision not to include a cognitive test in the checkup. When asked about the ..

---
The Sunshine State is once again getting caught up in some pretty shady business dealings. Governor Gavin Newsom is facing backlash after an explosive report revealed a scandal. The governor allegedly gave a “special carveout” in a piece of legislation that directly benefited one of his largest donors, billionaire Greg Flynn. According to Bloomberg News, ..

# **[Albuquerque Schools Sued Over Sword Duel](http://trk.libertyledger.-yAL-GQ)**
---
A New Mexico high school teacher has been accused of staging a sword fight in class that resulted in a student receiving severe injuries. Loviata Mitchell, a former chemistry teacher at Volcano Vista High School in Albuquerque, allegedly brought katana and rapier-style swords to class and had students square off against each other. According to ..
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-yAL-GQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Hunter Biden Testifies Before Congress](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
After years of denying his involvement in a shady business deal with a Chinese energy firm, Hunter Biden has finally come clean. During his six-hour deposition with the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability, he admitted that his father, President Joe Biden, was in fact referred to as “the big guy” in a damning email ..
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Judge Makes Big Ruling In Illinois](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A liberal state judge in Illinois has ordered that former President Donald Trump be removed from the state’s presidential ballot in 2024. Judge Tracie R. Porter, clearly driven by her hatred for Trump, argued that he should be removed from the ballot because he supposedly engaged in insurrection during the January 6 riots at the ..

Friend,

Thank you for another incredible month! Team Tamie is exceeding all of our goals and is on track to beat Jim Jordan this year, all thanks to your help and support.**

This is the year that Ohio turns blue** —from reelecting Senator Sherrod Brown to defeating Jim Jordan and electing Tamie to Congress: Ohio voters are ready to fight back against Trump’s MAGA revenge tour.**_

But Tamie is also fighting for the good of the entire country to remove Jim Jordan from power._** That is why we need constant grassroots support to put Jordan on the ropes and win this election in November.**

Can you help us flip Ohio blue and make sure that Jim Jordan pays the price for his abuse of power?** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTQ3MjEyMDU0NDkxMzEwNDMsXCJyXCI6MTE0NzIxMjM2NjI1MzkzNTM4fSIsInMiOiI3MDc1MDRhMTQwYzRiMDEzIn0)

Peter,

With just three days until Election Day, I’m going to ask you to chip in a **[critical $3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80175586/458593182/1033648996?refcode=em-3.2.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE0MWMxZmItYzhkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3bLb8zCkyp1H_mdTsWMFr1_YoHRzJToRpIdbqsfz_VM=)** to bolster our final push. But first, I hope you read my story.

**It was never my plan to run for Congress.** I didn’t have aspirations for public office, and I am not a career politician. But when CA-47 became an open seat, I realized how important it was to step up and protect our community – as I’ve done my entire career.

You see, I’ve been fighting for Orange County for as long as I can remember. I was born and raised here, and after law school came home to serve – from providing thousands of hours of _pro bono_ legal work to founding and leading a women-led nonprofit based on values and ethics after the election in 2016.

We have watched in horror as extremists have destroyed our fundamental rights and stripped women of their own reproductive health decisions. My #1 priority in Congress will be to protect women and their reproductive rights, no matter what.

I’m running because we need new leaders who are focused on the big challenges we’re facing as a country and here in Orange County, and we can’t let CA-47 fall to extremism.

In this race, we’re faced with a choice – **we can let CA-47 fall to extremism and unethical leadership, or we can keep this seat blue and win the House majority.**

**[There’s so much on the line, and I’m grateful for your support through it all. You may think there’s not much else we can do at this point – but I need your help to keep our ads on the air, sway undecided voters, and finish strong. Friend,

The headline above is from a recent _Newsweek_ article. You may have seen Ted’s email on the latest numbers last week.

In January, a poll showed Ted up by two points over Colin Allred. Earlier this month, another poll showed that lead cut down to just one point.

\*\*Now, a new poll is out showing it is a\*\*\*\* TIED RACE \*\*\*\*for our Texas U.S. Senate seat.\*\*

Your support has never been more important, and we have our February grassroots fundraising deadline coming up fast at midnight this Thursday. \*\*We could very well LOSE THIS NOVEMBER if we don’t rally conservatives NOW to fight back against the left.\*\*

\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*Will you step up today to help us ramp up our efforts? >>>\*\*\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2105412.994.1.7ec529703bbe1947f938ac016fb99a9c ) \*\*\*\*

-
We will no longer have Ted fighting for us in the U.S. Senate;

-
We could see the Democrats expand the Chuck Schumer majority;

- \*\*And if we lose the White House and U.S. House too, there will be no stopping the Democrats from forcing their Big Government agenda on ALL of us!\*\*

\*\*Show Ted you have his back and fuel our fight to KEEP TEXAS RED this November! ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=2105412.996.1.3f0ce5e65245f6938ee9aad6d59c5ed1 )\*\*\*\* \*\*

body:

News just broke that a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC is reserving nearly $83M of TV airtime in Ohio ALONE to attack my record and flip this seat red.

[Donate to help us continue building the momentum we need to flip California's Third, then read their full endorsement below:](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/010GhVOmc7t48rOd-IiJTw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnxgNyP0SEaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL0pNQ0EtMDMtRW1haWwtTWFyY2gyMDI0LUZSLU1hcmNoPyZyZWZjb2RlPUU3MzIxLTIwMjQwMzAxLVNhY0JlZVJlYWRPdXQtU0wtRW5kb3JzZW1lbnRPcmcmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmXihH7jZYnDP1lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)** [****](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/nJDag2iUyAIjZ8qLkSTL-A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnxgNyP0SJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL0pNQ0EtMDMtRW1haWwtTWFyY2gyMDI0LUZSLU1hcmNoPyZyZWZjb2RlPUU3MzIxLTIwMjQwMzAxLVNhY0JlZVJlYWRPdXQtZ3JhcGhpYy1FbmRvcnNlbWVudE9yZyZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZeKEfuNlicM_WVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAC0~) "California’s 3rd congressional district begins at its west with suburban foothill populations in Placer and Sacramento counties and then spans the Sierra Nevada north to Lake Almanor in Plumas County and south to the mining town of Trona in the Mojave Desert in San Bernardino County. This district’s representative faces a huge challenge to both visit its communities and represent them with a unified voice. Voters need a leader who prioritizes communities over partisan considerations. Its biggest issue is its backbone, a Sierra Nevada range unprepared for worsening cycles of droughts and flooding. **Democrat Jessica Morse would be Congress’ resident expert in fire management on her first day in office.** She served in the Newsom administration as its deputy secretary for forest and wildland resilience at the California Natural Resources Agency. This job placed her on the front lines of developing state wildfire strategy, and she helped oversee a $3 billion resilience program over three years to strategically reduce fuels that contributed to the explosive fires in recent years. Morse correctly identifies how natural resource issues are what ties this sprawling district together. Watershed management is as nonpartisan as it gets. Morse sees funding needs to harden Sierra homes with defensible spaces, fuel breaks around communities and forest thinning to remove a century of forests that have grown artificially dense due to fire suppression. Before her years in Sacramento, Morse spent almost a decade in national security and support roles for the Defense Department, State Department and the U.S. Agency for International Development. Her years included duty of more than a year in Iraq as well as India. While she has considerable background in international affairs, Morse hopes to focus primarily on district issues. **'I am a problem solver,' she said. 'I care a lot less about the label.'** As a fifth-generation Californian, Morse is running against the hyper-partisan atmosphere that has taken over Congress. It is unfortunate that her opponent, Republican incumbent Kevin Kiley of Placer County, has chosen to focus on the political wars in Washington and cultural wars back home. The misdirection of Kiley’s clear talents is in direct conflict with what his district needs. **Kiley has voted to support abortion restrictions. Locally, he has supported candidates for school district races who have antagonized transgender students. He has also placed Donald Trump’s interests over the national interest to financially support Ukraine in its war against Russia which has global implications.** Morse has not served in public office before. But this is not a disqualifier: She has intimate familiarity with government, having worked for state and federal governments, and she has demonstrated an impressive command of a breadth of subject areas from her years in government and public affairs studies at Princeton University. She has no plans to engage in local curriculum wars. Her Sierra resource strategy could help address one of her district’s greatest problems: the property insurance crisis that is gripping fire-prone portions of the state. A strategy to reduce the physical risks of wildfire is the only long-term way to lower the cost of insurance that inevitably has to cover the real risks. She has the pocketbook interests of her district truly at heart. This district was redrawn substantially in the latest remapping process. This is both new physical and political territory. Districts like this are crying out for champions of their needs with a bipartisan mindset that rejects a polarized approach to politics. **Jessica Morse represents the kind of candidate that both major parties need to advance in far greater numbers. Morse can put out every type of fire."** | | [DONATE TO SEND JESSICA TO CONGRESS »](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/nLpdalLtVhVgO3EcY4vRWw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnxgNyP0SOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL0pNQ0EtMDMtRW1haWwtTWFyY2gyMDI0LUZSLU1hcmNoPyZyZWZjb2RlPUU3MzIxLTIwMjQwMzAxLVNhY0JlZVJlYWRPdXQtU0ItRW5kb3JzZW1lbnRPcmcmYW1vdW50PTI1JmFtb3VudD0yNVcDc3BjQgpl4oR-42WJwz9ZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAALQ~~)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Let me get straight to the point: thank you.
At the most basic level, this campaign is about people.
The people in Arizona who deserve better leadership, and the people who are fighting to make that happen.
Your grassroots support is what will help us win one of the most competitive races in the country. It will help us pass nationwide protections for abortion. It will help us reach a deal on water security that provides for generations to come and builds a brighter future for our kids.
We still have a lot of ground to cover in this race — but with your support in February, we exceeded our goal.
I will never forget how big of a difference just one person can make in a race like this.
Thank you for being part of this fight!
Onwards,
Kirsten

name: George Whitesides
subject: Good news and bad news:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80175958/458594764/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU4M2E2NC1jYmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwwh2L6gnDcgl8pIb_gd8-zw9vJFYOPSaJpMq8Wlh88=)
Peter, the countdown is on – we have **72 hours** until Election Day.

I know I’ve sent you a lot of messages lately, and I’m so grateful for your continued support. As we move closer to our primary, I wanted to take stock of why I got into this race and what we’re up against...

**[Before I get into it, will you chip in $3 now? It may seem like our work is done, but your support has never mattered more. Your donation today helps us reach undecided voters until the polls close – on their doorsteps, over the phone, with our billboards and online ads.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80175959/458594765/-46109959?refcode=em-3.2.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU4M2E2NC1jYmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwwh2L6gnDcgl8pIb_gd8-zw9vJFYOPSaJpMq8Wlh88=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80175960/458594766/-46109959?refcode=em-3.2.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU4M2E2NC1jYmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwwh2L6gnDcgl8pIb_gd8-zw9vJFYOPSaJpMq8Wlh88=)****
---

I got into this race because I could see that our community was hurting with Mike Garcia as our representative.

He’s become more and more out of touch with the people of this district, and don’t just take my word for it: _Recent polling shows that his approval rating here in CA-27 has plummeted by nearly 10%!_

Garcia would rather cozy up to the far-right than do right by the people of the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys. He co-sponsored a national abortion ban, voted to give himself a pay raise, engaged in shady stock trading, and that only scratches the surface.

**The good news is that the momentum is on our side.** This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Garcia has never been more vulnerable – in 2020 he only won by 333 votes while President Biden won this district by a double digit margin.

**The bad news is that Mike Garcia is on the attack.** He’s blanketing the district with nasty false mail pieces against me in an effort to get more voters on his side. I’m not fazed, but we need to fight back before Election Day.

**[That’s where you come in, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in $3 or anything you can afford today to help me defeat Garcia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80175961/458594767/-46109959?refcode=em-3.2.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWU4M2E2NC1jYmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwwh2L6gnDcgl8pIb_gd8-zw9vJFYOPSaJpMq8Wlh88=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, the countdown is on – we have 72 hours until Election Day. I know I’ve sent you a lot of messages lately, and I’m so grateful for your continued support. As we move closer to our primary, I wanted to take stock of why I got into this race and what we’re up against... = | **= I got into this race because I could see that our community was hurting with Mike Garcia as our representative. He’s become more and more out of touch with the people of this district, and don’t just take my word for it: Recent polling shows that his approval rating here in CA-27 has plummeted by nearly 10%! Garcia would rather cozy up to the far-right than do right by the people of the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys. He co-sponsored a national abortion ban, voted to give himself a pay raise, engaged in shady stock trading, and that only scratches the surface. The good news is that the momentum is on our side. This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Garcia has never been more vulnerable – in 2020 he only won by 333 votes while President Biden won this district by a double digit margin. The bad news is that Mike Garcia is on the attack. He’s blanketing the district with nasty false mail pieces against me in an effort to get more voters on his side. I’m not fazed, but we need to fight back before Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

Manteca, CA 95337
United States

clean_body: We're running out of supplies. | = | Hey Peter, Today is the start of Get Out the Vote weekend, and there are still tens of thousands of Democrats who haven’t returned their ballots for Josh. Thankfully, we have our volunteer army to help us chase down ballots this weekend. But we’re running low on supplies! Our printer’s ink is about to dry up and we need more literature to give to voters at the doors!! = = = If there is one thing Team Harder knows how to do better than anyone else in the country, it’s how to get out the vote in the final days of a campaign. Josh has faced many tough opponents in the past, but none of them have outworked or out-organized our incredible grassroots team. We’re counting on that same level of dedication and support to help Josh win this election and defeat our GOP opponent Kevin Lincoln on Tuesday. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I’m off to Target! \- Evelyn, Team Harder *

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: There are more men named John than single moms in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
It’s no wonder the issues of women and families have been on the backburner for decades.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)
Derek, men named John are well represented in the U.S. Senate...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-2?refcode=em20240302-38585&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)
**But you know who is not? Single moms! Katie would be the first single mom of school-aged kids to serve in the U.S. Senate. We need her fierce voice in the Senate standing up to these MAGA extremists who are going to run the Republican party—[this is one of your last chances to help send Katie to the Senate, can you give right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-2?refcode=em20240302-38585&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-2?refcode=em20240302-38585&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)
A quarter of American kids live with a single parent, yet because single parents aren’t represented in Washington, they’re often penalized in our tax code. And it’s no wonder that with a Senate that looks like these guys ⬆️, childcare and the issues most important to women and families have been put on the back burner for decades.
**There’s no special interest group for single moms or for working parents.** That’s why we need to send Katie to the U.S. Senate. Our election is just three days away, and if we don’t pull ahead, it will be two men in the runoff for California’s Senate seat. That would mean California’s thirty year record of having a woman in the Senate will come to an end.
**[Is there anything you can give today to help us pull ahead and send Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-2?refcode=em20240302-38585&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240302-2?refcode=em20240302-38585&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)
****
Onward!
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240302-38585&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38585_3422442_6yFNYQ&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=38585%2E3422442%2E6yFNYQ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: LCV Victory Fund
subject: Did you see Barbra Streisand's message? Re: Hello, Gorgeous Environmentalists!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
__Match Extended: 3x 3x 3x your impact |
---

| Hey Peter -- **did you see Barbra 's earlier message?** As Barbra wrote, we are at serious risk of another Trump presidency -- and she's calling on everyone in the environmental movement to make sure that doesn't happen.

LCV Victory Fund is powering up our campaigns right now to make sure that pro-environmental candidates get elected in 2024 up and down the ballot, _especially_ in battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. **We need your help now to help pro-environment candidates win in November.**

A group of donors has agreed to extend our 3x match deadline until midnight tonight. [Donate to LCV Victory Fund today, before the match expires -- it will make a critical difference in how hard we can campaign in tight races all across the country this year >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Let's get to work.

-- LCV Victory Fund |

* * *

---

| Hi Peter, my name is Barbra.

**I 've always said, I can take any truth -- just don't lie to me. So I take this personally:**

Despite the criminal indictments, the threats of violence, and lie after lie after Big Lie, _**Donald Trump may have an edge in many of the places that will decide the 2024 elections.**_

We cannot afford another Trump presidency, Peter -- the harm to people and the planet could be irreparable. But here's the truth: LCV Victory Fund and environmentalists like us have a real chance to stop Trump and to elect leaders who will protect our environment, climate, and democracy in 2024. _But we have to start now._

**A group of generous donors has just put up a match pool that will triple every contribution to LCV Victory Fund before the end of the month, up to $50,000.**

These are resources that will go _directly_ towards electing candidates who will protect our environment and climate -- and defeating Trump and other pro-polluter candidates in battleground states across the country.

[Please -- join me to help LCV Victory Fund meet that goal by making a gift today. Even $5 is enough to make a difference.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

I've been supporting environmental causes for decades. Here's why I believe in LCV Victory Fund, and why you should, too: **More than any other environmental group, they focus on electing leaders who will protect our environment and democracy** -- running independent campaigns that help candidates win in tough races and defeating candidates who undermine progress like Trump and too many others. And they get results: In 2022, they **defeated more than 83% of the worst anti-environment candidates in key races.**

[Peter, I support LCV Victory Fund because, election after election, their campaigns win. We have a shot at doing it again in 2024 -- but we need your help now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

There is so much need to make a difference now! 2023 was a year of unprecedented climate-driven disasters in our country, with wildfires and floods destroying people's lives and homes and extreme heat causing illness and brutal, unbearable conditions for weeks on end. We need leaders who will act on this crisis -- not bury their heads and deny the truth and pretend it doesn't exist.

LCV Victory Fund has a plan. They're working to flip the U.S. House by going after anti-environment incumbents in districts that Biden won in 2020, to protect pro-environment, pro-democracy leaders in the U.S. Senate, and to re-elect President Biden and Vice President Harris.

And they're doing it with **tested strategies for success,** which include their highly effective canvassing programs and other efforts including friend-to-friend, influencer, digital, and social media campaigns to turn out millions of environmental voters this year. They're investing early in places and races that matter most. **But these strategies will only work if environmentalists like you and me step up now.**

I promise you, Peter -- our actions now can decide the outcome in 2024.

The way we will win is by starting early to build our campaigns to turn out every voter who cares about the environment. Everyone who wants to restore the fundamental rights being rolled back by an extreme Supreme Court. And everyone who cares about the future of democracy.

This is a fight about the kind of world we want to pass on to our children, and the kind of country we live in today. **So I ask you, will you join me to make sure voters turn out for pro-environment candidates and that every vote counts in 2024?**

[Triple your impact, Peter. Help raise $50,000 for LCV Victory Fund before the end of the month -- even $5 can help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

We can do this together. Let's get to work!

All my best,

Barbra Streisand
_Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www.lcvvictoryfund.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate 's committee._ |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10692387&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk0MDA0MTE4MAS2&spReportId=MTk0MDA0MTE4MAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10692387&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTk0MDA0MTE4MAS2&spReportId=MTk0MDA0MTE4MAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://www.lcv.org/) |

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Fair maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This past month, our friends in Wisconsin got all new, fair legislative maps for the first time in over a decade. Maps where the voters get to decide, not the politicians. Here in Indiana, Statehouse Democrats proposed a similar plan to study redistricting reform — it was killed by the Republican supermajority on a party-line vote. **[Will you stand with us today and chip in to help us flip four seats and break their total control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80176358/458596088/405560545?refcode=240301maps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5ZTljNi1jY2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kHmuhAgmGuZgYey3rX4C6CXJxLttVwtgJSkLIHOIRyE=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80176359/458596089/1643342139?refcode=240301maps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5ZTljNi1jY2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kHmuhAgmGuZgYey3rX4C6CXJxLttVwtgJSkLIHOIRyE=)** [**Hoosiers want fair maps — it’s time to deliver them. body:
#
Derek, there are a lot of things you could be paying attention to right now.
It means a lot to us that you’re choosing to invest your support in VoteVets.
20 years ago this organization didn’t even exist. Today it is one of the most successful organizations in politics. We run some of the hardest hitting ads in the game, we combat disinformation, we support Veterans, and we get results.
We couldn’t do any of that without your help. So as we build capacity around defeating Donald Trump once and for all this year, as we gear up to hold the Senate and take back the House, as we support Veterans and National Security candidates in elections up and down the ballot — thanks for being here.
And we’ve got an important request:
This is an official FEC reporting month, which means we’ve got to file a report that announces what we’ve raised since January. A lot of people will be watching — our allies and our opponents.
To kick off this year strong, we need to put up a huge number in that report. Our friends need to know we’ve got what it takes to back them up, and our foes need to know that we’ve got their number — and that we’re coming for them.
**[So please, to set us off strong in this important deadline month, can you chip in your first $3 donation online and support our work?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar24.wfDmiq&refcode=em240302-1-30&t=1&akid=24946%2E3013755%2E7s4JqG)

subject: Eric Hovde’s anti-abortion agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Eric Hovde is “totally opposed to abortion.”
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2143%2E35263%2EsRMhRW)
When it comes to his record on abortion and reproductive freedom, we’ll let Eric Hovde’s own words speak for themselves: Hovde is **“totally opposed to abortion."** If you’ve heard enough and are ready to join the fight to keep this anti-abortion extremist out of the U.S. Senate, **[pitch in to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2143%2E35263%2EsRMhRW)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2143%2E35263%2EsRMhRW)
---
Eric Hovde wants to take away women’s rights nationwide with his anti-abortion agenda.
Hovde supported overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , a decision that sent Wisconsin back to its draconian 1849 abortion ban and paved the way for Republican attacks against reproductive freedom.
If elected, he would help extreme Senate Republicans pass a national abortion ban.
At a time when right-wing officials are even targeting birth control medication and IVF, we cannot let someone who’s “totally opposed to abortion” represent Wisconsin in the Senate.
But Tammy Baldwin needs your help to defeat this anti-abortion extremist.
**[Make a donation to help send Eric Hovde packing and reelect a true champion of reproductive freedom in Tammy Baldwin.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240302_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2143%2E35263%2EsRMhRW)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
This latest ruling in Alabama is already having devastating effects on women across the state – the University of Alabama has paused IVF treatment, and it could lead to the end of IVF in the state altogether.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80176870/458597787/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVlMDhkMDItY2ZkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dCR_gCQNVNuTtPcUdaFJ94rN_Lx8K4cOHomEWKXwb6k=)
---
Peter,

This latest ruling in Alabama is already having devastating effects on women across the state – the University of Alabama has paused IVF treatment, and it could lead to the end of IVF in the state altogether.

**This has made one thing clear: extreme politicians and judges in the South and across the country won’t just stop at abortion – they’ll go after family planning, reproductive healthcare, contraception, and more.**

Virginia remains the only southern state in the country that hasn’t restricted access to abortion following the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , but Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin has signaled that he would “happily and gleefully” sign anti-choice legislation into law.

**These attacks on our fundamental rights have no place in Virginia._We have to protect reproductive freedom for every Virginian in 2025 — and that means electing a pro-choice Governor._**

Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on defending women’s rights and making sure that a woman’s healthcare decisions remain between her and her healthcare provider – not with politicians.

[_**As Governor of Virginia, I’ll continue to support a woman’s right to choose and make sure that reproductive healthcare remains safe and accessible. Will you join me in my campaign today with a contribution?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80176871/458597788/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-03-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVlMDhkMDItY2ZkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dCR_gCQNVNuTtPcUdaFJ94rN_Lx8K4cOHomEWKXwb6k=)

clean_body: This latest ruling in Alabama is already having devastating effects on women across the state – the University of Alabama has paused IVF treatment, and it could lead to the end of IVF in the state altogether. | = Peter, This latest ruling in Alabama is already having devastating effects on women across the state – the University of Alabama has paused IVF treatment, and it could lead to the end of IVF in the state altogether. This has made one thing clear: extreme politicians and judges in the South and across the country won’t just stop at abortion – they’ll go after family planning, reproductive healthcare, contraception, and more. Virginia remains the only southern state in the country that hasn’t restricted access to abortion following the overturning of Roe v. Wade , but Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin has signaled that he would “happily and gleefully” sign anti-choice legislation into law. These attacks on our fundamental rights have no place in Virginia.We have to protect reproductive freedom for every Virginian in 2025 — and that means electing a pro-choice Governor. Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on defending women’s rights and making sure that a woman’s healthcare decisions remain between her and her healthcare provider – not with politicians. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. We came to this country over 40 years ago because we wanted to give our children better opportunities — opportunities they would never have otherwise. And so we came to America and watched our son Jirair receive an impactful education and go on to work a meaningful career in public service and become an advocate for underprivileged communities.
Now he is running for Congress and far exceeding any expectations we could have imagined for him. Our family is living out the American Dream.
**But that American Dream is slipping further and further out of reach for so many Californians.** Rent and mortgages are higher and gas and groceries are more expensive. Jirair is running to change that — to be an advocate for all Americans regardless of race, income, religion, or gender. Jirair is running to change that — to be an advocate for all Americans regardless of race, income, religion, or gender. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Sincerely, Azad and Seta Ratevosian * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. Let's Build A Campaign Together That Lifts Up Every Californian. | = Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress Jirair Ratevosian for Congress 321 N.
