name: US Army Capt. John James
subject: After a hard-fought race, my Team and I won by LESS THAN 0.5%. Now, Democrats want me GONE. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic veteran and father of three; the Left can't stand me because I'm an unapologetic conservative!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
We're fighting tooth and nail to defend these seats and protect the House Majority; losing simply isn't an option.
I served our country for eight years in the US Army as an Apache helicopter pilot. And now, I’m serving my country again. But this time, I’m fighting for your freedoms here at home.

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=b076158f96894ece85d40d41087d2d78&_t=7g2OgDatwvvFfbJq-1qcTixSgRf0_vbjXjln6sVX9Fo0fSuXIiua5ms_knnFA7ZJmo4fpoHZPsLkIcQ4MRsiKDLUfAka9AoyuBSSfBNKMi4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=b076158f96894ece85d40d41087d2d78&_t=7g2OgDatwvvFfbJq-1qcTixSgRf0_vbjXjln6sVX9Fo0fSuXIiua5ms_knnFA7ZJmo4fpoHZPsLkIcQ4MRsiKDLUfAka9AoyuBSSfBNKMi4%3D)

| Friend,

Thanks for opening this email. This might be hard to believe, but less than 30% of conservatives who receive messages from me even open them!

These numbers make it tough for conservatives like me since we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with our supporters. So again, thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is John James.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b076158f96894ece85d40d41087d2d78&_e=6ZycEZN7pFCO9rRmIUPoPXkDRpzDWEyaSrtE45Kyxbj7LToIT3ZcAiiAZa8eSxN9uvHocpG0BhCCi4PSRdS_VC1EWPHkakNqekr-mcNDhiIhYCuMT7rEX1l7ys96XZbOVnrMRiyGxJPC4fNZiIIncFF0_WX3Qfd_VXaov_E4FBfB19eayaPMHmlRPNjnC8523kLckwTIOAjQuBqqrfFq4fAaue0tB_VdAhQzShEdpURVVG9Ztu_C9mHYbtJ5qISvFD1Xwac5BdejvlEWYP1n3xv6_vB3hj1NM6BLLDOkkUa2llsEAorhoeE5ypJx1cTKpWED5PQJpt3swgOWLj0SzYT5f8_gNHnSRBRU3R_I6AEXxcLzUfhRvGTHVtZfkUlYUJH0IxCksdh_b7Z8Gx_qpyMXalJufZXAM5LQeF20--XDXYMwiTwtFh-ybksQyTFS "U.S. Army Captain John James")
---
_U.S. Army Captain John James_
I served our country for eight years in the US Army as an Apache helicopter pilot. I led two Apache platoons in combat operations in the Iraq War. I wouldn't trade my service in the Army for anything, Friend. It's there that I learned true leadership and the price of freedom. **Truly, it was an honor to serve my country, Friend.**

And now, I'm serving my country again. But this time, I'm fighting for your freedoms here at home. I decided to run for Congress in 2022 because I truly believe our nation needs veteran leadership.

**After a hard-fought race, my Team and I won by LESS THAN 0.5%.** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic veteran and father of three; the Left can't stand me because I'm an unapologetic conservative!

My colleague and Retired Navy SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, knows my situation because he's in a very similar one himself. He narrowly flipped a seat Democrats had held for 26 years, so you'd better believe the Left is coming for his head this year too!
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b076158f96894ece85d40d41087d2d78&_e=6ZycEZN7pFCO9rRmIUPoPXkDRpzDWEyaSrtE45Kyxbj7LToIT3ZcAiiAZa8eSxN9uvHocpG0BhCCi4PSRdS_VC1EWPHkakNqekr-mcNDhiIhYCuMT7rEX1l7ys96XZbOVnrMRiyGxJPC4fNZiIIncFF0_WX3Qfd_VXaov_E4FBfB19eayaPMHmlRPNjnC8523kLckwTIOAjQuBqqrfFq4fAaue0tB_VdAhQzShEdpURVVG9Ztu_C9mHYbtJ5qISvFD1Xwac5BdejvlEWYP1n3xv6_vB3hj1NM6BLLDOkkUbgz-tPN5mSZ6PgA7LBE-updJSWYIFiyZgEp4uS5AGrNeE1NSIilZaT20qzRnuAFFv1o56I-eS0j5Iat015vWaHBmoFfufbl-ueBJHPNj2qSf712_v7fPbej7rE5dD159QHs4PLX-ufCWyWJgzsDpdh "Navy SEAL Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden")
---
_Navy SEAL Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden_
Derrick and I know we have tough battles ahead of us. We're fighting tooth and nail to defend these seats and protect the House Majority; **losing simply isn 't an option.**

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Senate Republicans REFUSING to Protect IVF
body:
Last week the Alabama Supreme Court ruled that embryos are considered children under the law and put the future of IVF in the state in jeopardy. All across the country, people are outraged, including Republicans.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80177375/458599618/444630146?refcode=3-2-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZTJkOTI1LWQwZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmdjR43tRw5v7wyKy9IJGxvDeF83PhIcKPBd4J-3MJo=)
---
| | Friend, Last week the Alabama Supreme Court ruled that embryos are considered children under the law and put the future of IVF in the state in jeopardy. All across the country, people are outraged, including Republicans. It’s unfortunate that Republicans in the Senate won’t stand up for fertility services like they said they would. Earlier this week, Senate Republicans _blocked_ a bill that would protect access to IVF, even after conservative Senators like Ted Cruz voiced their support for it. The stark difference between Republicans’ statements and their actions could not be clearer. They may claim to support IVF, but when push comes to shove, they won’t stand up for it when we need them the most. **This IVF ruling is heartbreaking for families in Alabama, and we’re already seeing the fallout from it across the country. We need everybody to stand up for fertility services right now — including Republican Senators who have publicly shown their support for it in the past.** **[The past few years have clearly shown us the dangers that far-right ideologies have on our courts and their decisions regarding our basic fundamental rights. It’s up to us to continue to fight for a judicial system that fights for the American people, and not for far-right causes. Stand with us in this fight and chip in $10 right now to help us bring sanity back to the Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80177376/458599619/444630146?refcode=3-2-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZTJkOTI1LWQwZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmdjR43tRw5v7wyKy9IJGxvDeF83PhIcKPBd4J-3MJo=)** Listen, we’ve seen how the Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision impacted reproductive care across the country, and now the courts are coming for fertility care as well. We must hold our elected officials accountable for their words and actions — if they claim to support IVF they should be voting to protect it, not voting against it. The right to start a family and receive necessary fertility care should not be in the hands of the judicial system or the Senate. It should remain a personal conversation between individuals and their doctors. **[**This is unacceptable behavior from our judicial system that is supposed to be above partisan politics. And Senate Republicans voicing their support for IVF and then immediately blocking a bill that would protect it is despicable and hypocritical. Please contribute $10 now and we can work together to fight for an independent judiciary and hold these Republican Senators accountable.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80177377/458599620/444630146?refcode=3-2-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZTJkOTI1LWQwZDgtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmdjR43tRw5v7wyKy9IJGxvDeF83PhIcKPBd4J-3MJo=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

All across the country, people are outraged, including Republicans.| | | = | | Friend, Last week the Alabama Supreme Court ruled that embryos are considered children under the law and put the future of IVF in the state in jeopardy. All across the country, people are outraged, including Republicans. It’s unfortunate that Republicans in the Senate won’t stand up for fertility services like they said they would. Earlier this week, Senate Republicans blocked a bill that would protect access to IVF, even after conservative Senators like Ted Cruz voiced their support for it. The stark difference between Republicans’ statements and their actions could not be clearer. They may claim to support IVF, but when push comes to shove, they won’t stand up for it when we need them the most. This IVF ruling is heartbreaking for families in Alabama, and we’re already seeing the fallout from it across the country. We need everybody to stand up for fertility services right now — including Republican Senators who have publicly shown their support for it in the past. = Listen, we’ve seen how the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision impacted reproductive care across the country, and now the courts are coming for fertility care as well. We must hold our elected officials accountable for their words and actions — if they claim to support IVF they should be voting to protect it, not voting against it. The right to start a family and receive necessary fertility care should not be in the hands of the judicial system or the Senate. It should remain a personal conversation between individuals and their doctors. = Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. Ever since the Supreme Court’s terrible 2022 Dobbs decision eliminated the constitutional right to abortion, we’ve seen MAGA extremists across the country wage an all-out war on reproductive rights. **States have eliminated abortion with no exceptions, threatened to imprison doctors, and enacted restrictions on all kinds of basic reproductive services.**

**That’s why I was proud to introduce the SAFE Act last week; to protect access to IVF treatments in New Jersey and across the nation from extremist attacks.** [Will you take a stand with me against these far-right attacks by making a contribution today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80177831/458600886/1809543647?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240302_FR_IVF_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQzZGFlMi1kMmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoXt4JLQeM004ankmnxx6LhWcz7nq7efZQfSM4WHJsg=)

The Alabama Supreme Court recently issued a radical decision that severely restricted access to in vitro fertilization (IVF) across the state, with clinics shutting their doors; forced to say “we can’t” to parents hoping for children. Let me make something clear: **I will always stand with women in the fight against far-right extremist attempts to block access to reproductive healthcare.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80177832/458600887/1809543647?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240302_FR_IVF_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQzZGFlMi1kMmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoXt4JLQeM004ankmnxx6LhWcz7nq7efZQfSM4WHJsg=) We know that the NRCC is eyeing this seat as they look to reinforce their anti-choice House majority – [that’s why we need our grassroots supporters to stand with us today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80177833/458600888/1809543647?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20240302_FR_IVF_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_reprorights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQzZGFlMi1kMmQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoXt4JLQeM004ankmnxx6LhWcz7nq7efZQfSM4WHJsg=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Let me make something clear: I will always stand with women in the fight against far-right extremist attempts to block access to reproductive healthcare. = We know that the NRCC is eyeing this seat as they look to reinforce their anti-choice House majority – = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for supporting our campaign to bring Jersey Values to Washington – we couldn’t do this without you. Best, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

name: Lt Col Oliver North USMC (Ret)
subject: A True American Hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Fellow Patriot, When Hung Cao says, "Joe Biden is unfit to be our Commander-in-Chief," I agree.

In 2021, the Biden White House perpetrated a horrific, humiliating withdrawal from Afghanistan resulting in the death of eleven U.S. Marines, a Navy Medical Corpsmen and a U.S. Army soldier. Though Hung Cao never sought any credit, he devoted months of his recent retirement from the U.S. Navy, in a quiet, uncompensated, 24/7 effort to help rescue American citizens, allies and brave interpreters who were abandoned by Mr. Biden's catastrophic capitulation in Afghanistan.

Hung Cao won't run from a fight. He never has. He never will. Though possessed of true humility, he won't "play it safe" or deliver meaningless speeches or strive to be "politically correct."

What Hung Cao will do is boldly employ his God-given gifts of faith, courage, experience and wisdom to become a leader in the U.S. Senate.

We, our children and grand-children deserve to have Hung Cao, an American Hero, a man of faith, integrity, and proven courage in mortal combat, representing us and our values in the U.S. Senate. **[That's why I am officially endorsing Hung for the Senate and asking you to join me in endorsing him today >>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0714b1d1fb244e219267574557ac3cb4&_e=IixGxvHlTF2eAYQK8v83x6QcY0UDMlacTXcdLsMTMZEcqfqVVzFC_wDkV-8vp6v0hHTbMGest2o4ZnCfuxTXaOPHY5Jg9Mygfoh5F3QZWyq8fLljkr-jaBb3Ko6joMyZJjkS6ETjavuL3I56X0XIar2keOFSkw3q9jdcYMbfC5ECWGBlT059SdzYs22sHDzjSr4wih_kR6v1u4IC4xyzgQMrawIs6nSSP7ugGOflWhN_tqJ-0DYAgtZfdShkz4epUr1JbiG5-9XBjxYSAS-tzA%3D%3D)
**
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0714b1d1fb244e219267574557ac3cb4&_e=IixGxvHlTF2eAYQK8v83x6QcY0UDMlacTXcdLsMTMZEcqfqVVzFC_wDkV-8vp6v0hHTbMGest2o4ZnCfuxTXaOPHY5Jg9Mygfoh5F3QZWyq8fLljkr-jaBb3Ko6joMyZZA7YqJjX_bAwi1dHL_DMcBZnn5vjMQEGhVK3aUI6lJJ0j4FBFpafkXyFt0GiKwcLpSmyQRWNgwS5kv8KyRz2e9U_cG-DbMfh_UAySCBY0bU4ZkCKVOivKNzI6ZDlGtuvLQKhsCOPc0k42zAkcOxKYQ%3D%3D)
---
When Hillary Clinton ran for President her hand-picked Vice Presidential candidate, a professional politician and liberal activist, is now Hung Cao's opponent here in Virginia. Like all of Mr. Biden's far-left, self-serving comrades, he pays lip-service to the American Dream and "Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness."

Hung Cao is the most relevant person to address our present national crises. I know of no one more qualified to speak out against the socialist propaganda plaguing our military, education system, and culture. We are at a tipping point and Hung reminds us that our power doesn't derive from bureaucrats in Washington; it's cultivated in our communities, our homes, and around our kitchen tables.
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0714b1d1fb244e219267574557ac3cb4&_e=IixGxvHlTF2eAYQK8v83x6QcY0UDMlacTXcdLsMTMZEcqfqVVzFC_wDkV-8vp6v0hHTbMGest2o4ZnCfuxTXaOPHY5Jg9Mygfoh5F3QZWyq8fLljkr-jaBb3Ko6joMyZlF_gCcU6MwZVGDJJXcScO3QeERezjPzKmJO3v0-7k5gmx4BJ6TJqtTv0XDhjtGD14JMzlkjngQG4udViW0Xod6r_rwooar5aaD-yw_KfUzI6w-8qHMYP-wY_2Urp5eE-W_2tHoO9XssbYyu5VM2LlQ%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0714b1d1fb244e219267574557ac3cb4&_e=IixGxvHlTF2eAYQK8v83x6QcY0UDMlacTXcdLsMTMZEcqfqVVzFC_wDkV-8vp6v0GULGX8ncud7pVbGFbXrsbvPx42Hy6lZxn8MRa2fF9n9ZrWKDrHVDZKmsFgd29Y6_idLm96hJSMrNr5NNO1PWxJ3O6OvMi0ae1bry_mmnsEbMnMfh9KxB8fMKAz1jdWalRI9tO6LulWGsl-tVWGcAbhN4Ce-c4xT_QBELbwBvCaGJo-wjXERbSPa5VwFHWUJpODYTbaCin_76F3wG6MmIlyGxPIeaAJraGNftcA19u_g%3D)
---
Virginia is where our entire family lives and works. On behalf of our 18 grand-children, my wife Betsy and I pray every day we Virginians will show our countrymen how to preserve America's future by electing a conservative champion, our dear friend, Hung Cao, to a seat in a Republican-majority, U.S. Senate.
---
For America,
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0714b1d1fb244e219267574557ac3cb4&_e=IixGxvHlTF2eAYQK8v83x6QcY0UDMlacTXcdLsMTMZEcqfqVVzFC_wDkV-8vp6v0hHTbMGest2o4ZnCfuxTXaOPHY5Jg9Mygfoh5F3QZWyq8fLljkr-jaBb3Ko6joMyZSRfxMRhmuRKKPT7zwG-F-5QDlKD3FR7I-dMmLXQcXRs8YtsqU2gztbkjXLTjBfaDq0HHI0FVOCaNLygj07szaMrGwZ9WYkHnVuhgzTuSvRiINPnJQssxZojwGAcBWyHd0J0jLJY57RMrLeoggmogTQ%3D%3D)

name: WisDems Chair Ben Wikler
subject: The nightmare of gerrymandering is over. Fair maps are here. WOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178188/458601558/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=)
---
The long, dark night of ultra-partisan gerrymandering is over, and a new day for democracy now dawns in the Badger State. **In late February, a new set of state legislative maps were signed into law for Wisconsin.** These maps are graded “A” for fairness by the head of the nonpartisan Princeton Gerrymandering Project. The current maps scored an F. With the stroke of a pen, Wisconsin went from a “democracy desert” to, well, a democracy. This was all possible because of you. [**I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and****the Arizona Democratic Party**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178189/458601559/-962552435?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=), but I want to tell you how we got here: Wisconsin’s gerrymandering crisis began in 2011, when Republican lawmakers drew legislative lines that guaranteed even landslide election losses wouldn’t cost them their majorities. The result was one of the most egregious, extreme partisan gerrymanders in American political history. In 2012 and 2018, Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly voted for Democratic majorities in the legislature but Republicans won huge majorities of the seats. In 2020 and 2022, Democrats won major statewide victories, but Republicans won near-supermajorities. All the while, Republican politicians in Wisconsin have used their power to restrict access to the ballot, remove authorities that voters had entrusted to statewide elected officials like the Governor and Attorney General, and smash the freedoms of workers to organize and advocate for themselves. _For thirteen years, the democracy-proof legislature has been laying siege to democracy itself. _ But those statewide victories added up. In 2018, 2020, and 2023, voters built a new progressive majority on the State Supreme Court. By electing Governor Evers and preventing GOP supermajorities, they stopped hard-right maps from being signed into law. And last year, a civic uprising prevented Republicans from impeaching Janet Protasiewicz. In December, the Supreme Court ruled that Wisconsin’s legislative maps were unconstitutional. This wasn’t easy. This team had to knock on doors, call phones, chip in, and share our views with friends and online—year after year, election after election, never giving up even when it felt like all was lost. _But we did it. _ **Today, the work doesn’t end. The candidate recruitment process now goes into overdrive. And at the same time, we remain vigilant in case Republican politicians in Madison and their allies once again, through the courts or any other strategy, attempt to thwart majority rule.** Today, we commit to doing the work, ending the malign speakership of Robin Vos, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate, and paving the way towards a Democratic state Senate majority in 2026. I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask. The number of competitive legislative seats will triple so we’ll need triple the support. [**Can you chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and the Arizona Dems**** to help us organize voters in every corner of Wisconsin and Arizona where Democrats have the chance to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178190/458601560/-962552435?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178191/458601561/-962552435?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178192/458601562/-962552435?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178196/458601566/-962552435?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240302_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzNTA4NTUtZDRkOC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dyW_jNaoY44YOIDozGsGxvqkAERUlRkXZTrOcppNIA0=)

This is a story with millions of heroes. Supporters like you and the Arizona Democratic Party are some of them. From all of us at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, please know you have our boundless gratitude.

body:

The Michigan Republican Party is in absolute chaos–the elected chair, Kristina Karamo, was deposed by the base, but she refused to step down, and a court LITERALLY had to tell her to stop calling herself the chair. Then, the other half of the party began to recognize Pete Hoekstra.

To the casual observer, this might be laughable, and it might seem absurd. But we’ve laughed at this kind of insanity before. **In 2016._When Trump won Michigan._**

The reality is all this chaos is generating excitement and turnout for the GOP. In last week’s primary, Trump received over 100,000 votes more than President Biden. And today, Republicans are hosting one convention in Detroit and one convention right here in Grand Rapids.

They will be allocating their delegates to Donald Trump.

Meanwhile, Michigan Democratic voters need to be reminded of the stakes–especially here in West Michigan. Winning Kent County will be crucial to reelecting Joe Biden.

[_**We know that Donald Trump and Republicans are going to spend millions in Michigan. Can you donate $5 right now so we can turn out Democrats in Kent County this November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80178716/458603300/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-03-02_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzIwM2ZkNS1kN2Q4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xok5YYDUmKP9fOOQZHqLuhhmwEVWMsItZFVnjcijGd0=)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: [BREAKING] This changes everything
body:
|
#
_Peter: Debbie asked me to send this note along. Aloha, Mazie_
* * *
**Peter, did did you see this MAJOR update? Mitch McConnell just announced he’ll STEP DOWN as Senate GOP Leader in November!** My opponent, Rick Scott, has already tried to wrestle the leadership from McConnell before. Now, this announcement has all but cleared the way for him to take power. I’ll be clear: A Rick Scott Senate would be DISASTROUS for our country. Texas' ultraconservative attorney general has made attacking the LGBTQ+ community a _cornerstone_ of his work. He is trying to obtain the medical records of transgender children who received care _outside_ of Texas. This is not only a severe privacy concern but also a chilling display of just how far the Texas AG is willing to go to attack transgender children.
We _cannot_ and _will not_ stand for this. I have made protecting the LGBTQ+ community one of my _top_ priorities – and you have my promise that I will continue this fight until the very end. But my work is only possible because of the support of people like _you._

clean_body: | | | = | | Peter, the Texas attorney general has gone too far: 10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: | | Peter, far-right lawmakers are not even attempting to disguise their blatant attempts to oppress the voiceless and vulnerable anymore. Texas' ultraconservative attorney general has made attacking the LGBTQ+ community a cornerstone of his work. He is trying to obtain the medical records of transgender children who received care outside of Texas. This is not only a severe privacy concern but also a chilling display of just how far the Texas AG is willing to go to attack transgender children. We cannot and will not stand for this. I have made protecting the LGBTQ+ community one of my top priorities – and you have my promise that I will continue this fight until the very end. But my work is only possible because of the support of people like you. Peter, I'm counting on you to be one of the 10,000 folks I need to sign my petition now DEMANDING that we protect the rights of transgender people. My petition closes at midnight tonight, so please: | | Thank you. – Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Casey
subject: Making real progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2184%2E552475%2EBkVAqK)
**We need to keep Bob Casey fighting for workers’ rights in the Senate, Peter.**
For years, Bob has been fighting for working Pennsylvanians, standing up for the economic freedom of workers, and bringing investments and jobs home to Pennsylvania.
Much of this was possible thanks to the historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, which David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent, said he would have opposed.
The truth is, as a hedge fund CEO, McCormick got rich by outsourcing jobs to China and India while laying off workers in Pennsylvania. He even said he doesn’t care if American manufacturing jobs are shipped overseas.
**McCormick will fight for large corporations and his Wall Street backers in the Senate, which is why the national GOP is all-in to flip this seat. We have to fight back.**
[**Can you chip in $5 or $7.50 to help us re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240302-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240302-2&refcode2=2184_552475_BkVAqK&akid=2184%2E552475%2EBkVAqK)

clean_body: We need to keep Bob Casey fighting for workers’ rights in the Senate, Peter. For years, Bob has been fighting for working Pennsylvanians, standing up for the economic freedom of workers, and bringing investments and jobs home to Pennsylvania. Much of this was possible thanks to the historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, which David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent, said he would have opposed. The truth is, as a hedge fund CEO, McCormick got rich by outsourcing jobs to China and India while laying off workers in Pennsylvania. He even said he doesn’t care if American manufacturing jobs are shipped overseas. McCormick will fight for large corporations and his Wall Street backers in the Senate, which is why the national GOP is all-in to flip this seat. We have to fight back. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thank you for being part of this team! Together, Team Casey

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
| | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a039bf56be0d4917a9925f712db2effc&_e=3rXMzWFG52y5PG4vwrPg6_7MebCBisrErj40o-EqKwoG8JklzXxL6x3wm3zQe8W6a40FNPXcIw_lCPcf9-eopf-cl9hQCmqLSKx_Co9CKE2n8IXoA8jjrw3RBIx31cq3FE-p9btNZZMhbeJTvoyYNgRHImX0uHo6gyy0K7lorcMqpZ5ufKJQCIgZpzQ130t25rClnlVU-QNKlu5tOwjn-qNg9FLVWJ9c3Tr8P4Sik8JcYoNMOr-4wdQejlWrpVdkCGf4Wlam3n282e_I1tHjHNSNDq7R55WO7VjZcDFnOBcw3a4vWAA0LvTp34Kna6t3tY0el5KwjQizb7DL3-FrCSvSmC4vTRzs7aOrUg6LaZfuPQ4pGSY74g7uYM9wbn8txyWgoodmhr-GTHkEkfu4FmuCpJ0LHgsaaAkIvJlgd1itpul7DXDM3hDqVjFpdDlV)

Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. _That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a039bf56be0d4917a9925f712db2effc&_e=3rXMzWFG52y5PG4vwrPg6_7MebCBisrErj40o-EqKwoG8JklzXxL6x3wm3zQe8W6a40FNPXcIw_lCPcf9-eopf-cl9hQCmqLSKx_Co9CKE2n8IXoA8jjrw3RBIx31cq3FE-p9btNZZMhbeJTvoyYNgRHImX0uHo6gyy0K7lorcMqpZ5ufKJQCIgZpzQ130t25rClnlVU-QNKlu5tOwjn-qNg9FLVWJ9c3Tr8P4Sik8JcYoNMOr-4wdQejlWrpVdkCGf4Wlam3n282e_I1tHjHNSNDq7R55WO7VjZcDFnOBfQFjo7BMvXhAujG0Jk4nS6muN2RHgiybqM-mlJChqde8fNWuYlGmPFctLGiSMt2KPdEAAiIP_jFEGLuhoPWCKZ4eXGp14fNJ5r9G2or7SUU0E4mkCy5JcMCAVfi1krVFL7JGipghTkXvko7v-gG_7f) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a039bf56be0d4917a9925f712db2effc&_e=3rXMzWFG52y5PG4vwrPg6_7MebCBisrErj40o-EqKwoG8JklzXxL6x3wm3zQe8W6a40FNPXcIw_lCPcf9-eopf-cl9hQCmqLSKx_Co9CKE2n8IXoA8jjrw3RBIx31cq3FE-p9btNZZMhbeJTvoyYNgRHImX0uHo6gyy0K7lorcMqpZ5ufKJQCIgZpzQ130t25rClnlVU-QNKlu5tOwjn-qNg9FLVWJ9c3Tr8P4Sik8JcYoNMOr-4wdQejlWrpVdkCGf4Wlam3n282e_I1tHjHNSNDq7R55WO7VjZcDFnOBcZqZh0jghoDF1aVYFoOO3gZO4X7RbmnaMiUiLfxkJ8b74DUkAsltonMcHZI8JyX4ESJAHVScvQCuIuat5EKk6kvacvq0v7Rw4vIHHDp22MusXEJM-LTQfLk_VtMQcq7giwP7veuh_GporgKLamFSZ0)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|

| [**DONATE >>**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a039bf56be0d4917a9925f712db2effc&_e=3rXMzWFG52y5PG4vwrPg6_7MebCBisrErj40o-EqKwoG8JklzXxL6x3wm3zQe8W6a40FNPXcIw_lCPcf9-eopf-cl9hQCmqLSKx_Co9CKE2n8IXoA8jjrw3RBIx31cq3FE-p9btNZZMhbeJTvoyYNgRHImX0uHo6gyy0K7lorcMqpZ5ufKJQCIgZpzQ130t25rClnlVU-QNKlu5tOwjn-qNg9FLVWJ9c3Tr8P4Sik8JcYoNMOr-4wdQejlWrpVdkCGf4Wlam3n282e_I1tHjHNSNDq7R55WO7VjZcDFnOBdBE7Pv-SEfbrRC6LmxcvL_V7oOKw16i-zb96mFcvScVcp18IGf06s0wmNRqrXitCwtLqcM0oAzDNPTNUFnY3GbaNMXRgHELgunJ4nEP12hG1SSGgpMdW7bWJwlnNxkiL0UvjPaERUASGeehp3QwLJ-)

name: Elect Barbara Lee via Our Revolution
subject: Barbara Lee: A permanent ceasefire is urgently needed to end the killing of civilians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1011?refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Barbara Lee is the Peace candidate in the race for U.S. Senate in
California — the only to call for an unequivocal Ceasefire since day one
of Israel’s bombing campaign in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15675?t=1053&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ][IMG]

Barbara has been the strongest antiwar voice in Congress since she stood
alone as the sole vote against the war in Afghanistan. She has pushed back
against endless wars from Day 1 and was one of the first to speak out for
peace in Gaza.

After we helped make Michigan a megaphone for Peace with 100,000
“Uncommitted” votes in support of a Ceasefire, our next chance to amplify
our voices for Peace is in California this Tuesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]Chip in now to fund thousands more GOTV phone calls to support Barbara
Lee, the Peace Candidate for U.S. Senate in California. We just have a few
days left to show the strength of the progressive pro-Peace voting bloc
once again.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Barbara Lee is the movement candidate in this race. She’s the true
progressive in the race. We can’t miss out on this opportunity to send
Barbara to the Senate.

While Our Revolution and our grassroots supporters are using small-dollar
donations and people power to GOTV for Barbara, the other Democrats in the
race are using their campaign money to boost right-wing Republicans in the
race. Why? They’re afraid to face Barbara’s record on Peace and
progressive change in November.

In California, the top two vote getters move on to the general election,
regardless of party affiliation — so, other Democrats in the race are
using their large sums of corporate money to elevate Republicans to the
second place spot to face off against in November.

Meanwhile, Barbara is focused on her message of Peace, Medicare for All,
fighting climate change, and raising wages.

Barbara Lee has been an effective advocate for people, peace, and the
planet throughout her career — and she would advance real change in the
Senate. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15675?t=1052&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]But we can only pull off the kind of GOTV campaign we need to
elect her with your support.

We’re not only phone banking, door knocking, and texting progressives
throughout California, we’re also executing an effective online
advertising campaign in support of Barbara — and political ads are
expensive, Peter Willis.

Our Revolution has been on the ground with Barbara Lee since early on in
this campaign, strategizing with the team, and working with local
progressive leaders and grassroots activists to help get the word out
about Barbara as the clear progressive choice to become California's next
U.S. Senator.

This is our last chance to bring in grassroots donations on GOTV weekend
so we can ramp up our voter turnout operation to elect Barbara Lee to join
Bernie Sanders in the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240302&akid=5390%2E5885482%2E1zDoSU ]Contribute now to elect Barbara Lee — another unwavering progressive to
join Bernie Sanders in the Senate!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Honoring Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240302-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240302-email]
Friend,
As we commemorate Women's History Month, it’s an honor to reflect on the incredible contributions of strong women throughout the history of North Carolina and renew our commitment to advancing gender equality in our great state.
Throughout our history, women have played pivotal roles in shaping our communities, economy, and culture. From the inspiring efforts of suffragists like Gertrude Weil to Lillian Exum Clement, the first woman elected to the North Carolina General Assembly - our state has been home to trailblazers who have left an enduring impact on our society.
Yet, even with these remarkable achievements, there is still work to be done. As a husband and a father of a daughter, I am dedicated to championing the rights and well-being of women in our state and across the country.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240302-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240302-email]
This includes fighting for the protection of reproductive healthcare . With the overturning of Roe v. Wade and the recent Alabama Supreme Court decision, women’s reproductive rights are in constant danger. Women must have the resources and support they need to make their own decisions about their bodies.
In Congress, we must fight to find comprehensive solutions to gender-based challenges, including domestic violence, pay inequity, and educational opportunities.
This Women’s History Month, let us double down on our commitment to honoring the women of the past and making the future brighter for the women of tomorrow.
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flipncnickel?refcode=240302-email&recurring=true]

name: Team Williams
subject: What one supporter has to say about Brian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:

clean_body: 🚨 This is a five-alarm fire! 🚨| | | I’m in shock. We can’t let it happen, Peter, Colin Allred is already within two points of our campaign! I’m sounding the alarm because the Democrats are coming to flip Texas BLUE. And we already know that Colin Allred will be running an effective campaign, so we can’t count him out. He will be among the most formidable opponents I’ve ever faced in a general election. This election is shaping up to be my most challenging race ever. I need all my best supporters with me to be successful. So, I must reach you by email, mail, and phone. I’ve included a link to your below. - Democrats want to buy Texas. Don’t let out-of-state Democrats prop up Colin Allred against me with their massive contributions. Help me fight back! We can’t afford to fall behind this early in the race; complete your today so I can rely on your support throughout this critical race! | | Thank you, Ted Cruz Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: CIA Warns: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAURb_mZEbkbBubDDzgcX0HqIhOKjF0HKe4spvghEb8fQWlnZ7H2kvbpiGG7qZJbQg4h3YkgPiagMtpTvn6kfb_Fxt25IuLPKTlfYstAdNt8H-nT0rpkw3xPlW7otW8a5kovK4Uq0WlGOfFWXcWKzSqW0rp6pX0sCsI1VSubpn1lSuCBoNgnAFgXIiystJCArLxddsokGCPnNImn4Oz1TjNNue-T6XrUxH1eZqG8SFmCGbOffl5ddFfx5831yeCeSoTzBfBvB7NYXN6edseiZtHC3z3bxn5JNbNvsi6HeYQYxilIsHefzHfAQAA___zpl8p)

**FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_ **Former CIA Director James Woolsey stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR** [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw) Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjjGPozAQhX_N0IGGGWNDQZEcIjqddEp7VWRsk_iCF2KcjfLvV0S7W2w5732a9-mwTH58tqD2QHTxdgUi4B0Q3f49Qrz_D38O-R6PnN_k31BtLf0CovRc3Df6-aVwQftpS1WX2ZZHiyJzbamwEaVC5uzSNlybUbGulJMD1trasXIOdWOtcY0pM98SkkBGIkIWoii11CSJ5OAaOygCga-dQgcXvdHlmh46xnkOhZlDNrWXlJb1JdYD9WJJ8cq4dUC9mby5AvcpvnsL3JVMXAPJXf-7205sKiCpx_G03octqBnzL6F8DyTvKZyMDov25zfg7ng85D-gLLZ2efhp8qtUIPD8sjVz-AgAAP__59VpEw) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**

clean_body: FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS: DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out? Former CIA Director James Woolsey stunned listeners with a stern warning... An attack on America's infrastructure would "blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse". In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators. Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. name: Team AOC
subject: NEW: $1.2 billion in student loan for forgiveness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We wanted to take a moment to email you today about the recent student loan cancellation development from the Biden Administration.
Last week, **President Biden announced loan forgiveness for an additional 153,000 borrowers** — this time for those enrolled in the Saving on a Valuable Education (SAVE) Plan for student loan repayment, who have made at least 10 years of payments. This represents a total of $1.2 billion in student debt relief.
**All of the borrowers who were eligible should have received an email letting them know they qualified for this cancellation.**
The fight for student loan cancellation is alive and we are making progress. The organizing and pressure from everyday people like you has changed the lives of 4 million people — **and we will continue to push for more**. It’s working.
Back in September, Alexandria launched a [six-part video guide](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22976?utm_source=em20240302-5922&t=1&akid=5922%2E2526796%2E-59RbO) on student loans to help answer some common questions, and help people navigate the overload of information.
[Check out AOC's student loan guide →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22976?utm_source=em20240302-5922&t=2&akid=5922%2E2526796%2E-59RbO)
One part of the series was dedicated to the SAVE program, where Alexandria encouraged borrowers to enroll for the opportunity to lower or eliminate loan payments. Under this new program from the Biden Administration, income-driven repayment decreased from 10% of discretionary income, down to 5% (meaning many people could see their payments cut in half).
Another major change **under the SAVE program is that your loan balance will NOT grow over time**. Because of high interest rates, a lot of borrowers would see their balance grow despite making payments, or they would not be able to make a dent in their principal. Now, under the SAVE program, the Department of Education will not charge interest that isn’t covered by your monthly payment.
[For more info about the SAVE program and how you can enroll, check out Alexandria’s video here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22976?utm_source=em20240302-5922&t=3&akid=5922%2E2526796%2E-59RbO)
There’s a lot of confusing information and mistaken claims floating around about student loans and we want to make sure that people have access to the facts.
**Together we will keep sharing information and keep pushing until all student debt is canceled.**
Thank you for staying in this fight.
Team AOC

clean_body: We wanted to take a moment to email you today about the recent student loan cancellation development from the Biden Administration. Last week, President Biden announced loan forgiveness for an additional 153,000 borrowers — this time for those enrolled in the Saving on a Valuable Education (SAVE) Plan for student loan repayment, who have made at least 10 years of payments. This represents a total of $1.2 billion in student debt relief. All of the borrowers who were eligible should have received an email letting them know they qualified for this cancellation. The fight for student loan cancellation is alive and we are making progress. The organizing and pressure from everyday people like you has changed the lives of 4 million people — and we will continue to push for more. It’s working. Back in September, Alexandria launched a on student loans to help answer some common questions, and help people navigate the overload of information. One part of the series was dedicated to the SAVE program, where Alexandria encouraged borrowers to enroll for the opportunity to lower or eliminate loan payments. Under this new program from the Biden Administration, income-driven repayment decreased from 10% of discretionary income, down to 5% (meaning many people could see their payments cut in half). Another major change under the SAVE program is that your loan balance will NOT grow over time. Because of high interest rates, a lot of borrowers would see their balance grow despite making payments, or they would not be able to make a dent in their principal. Now, under the SAVE program, the Department of Education will not charge interest that isn’t covered by your monthly payment. There’s a lot of confusing information and mistaken claims floating around about student loans and we want to make sure that people have access to the facts. Together we will keep sharing information and keep pushing until all student debt is canceled. Thank you for staying in this fight. Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Biden Campaign
subject: Would $25 be worth keeping Trump out of the White House?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Can President Biden count on you today? | | |
---
$25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $25 -- or whatever you can afford today? clean_body: Can President Biden count on you today? | | | $25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you very much, The Biden Campaign

name: JD Vance
subject: Closing the curtains…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c51aad3b4d0746e5825e12bbe6a919ed&_e=CF2ymhuKgeSp-6_nbuJQdIUeNBxgtOpJ1WIKPTqM2vJxhIVX2CsXZG0YNfekHP7HxvCyhUE39W9fTekV_RPdw-7Iz8pfCtX8h7tBq0HTjVpwhKSiyvs51ik7nEO0mLoDY3dtwSPWG5BU6v0UlmupDqhCraX7lpDfajJaF9yo57eoa_WaGLp-XSCyjQi81AUnMgU29vDhH0K-_EYQUSlj-OeTf5f5DCdRIlE3BBGhHO5iBsJS76hwOwiSIFRpyX6xUWdI55c58qD9z5xZRCq4NrN_heQQW_joT9Ptx5d5sNhXS8-6_AeRwP0lr_PnlUoIdG_URG5YJDhp5E0mBdYztsi-fXP8vlOrImBqpKmNBT7BnQFlW_rB12YxGFc-0YzZcndCUjpyRmE7z2fC4mDwxIvMh9v5PR876SvcdOPdoKA%3D)
---

Guys.

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!!** The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. Chip in to help me keep going.

[At this point, if I don't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race again. Help SAVE AMERICA now!](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c51aad3b4d0746e5825e12bbe6a919ed&_e=CF2ymhuKgeSp-6_nbuJQdIUeNBxgtOpJ1WIKPTqM2vJxhIVX2CsXZG0YNfekHP7HxvCyhUE39W9fTekV_RPdw-7Iz8pfCtX8h7tBq0HTjVpwhKSiyvs51ik7nEO0mLoDY3dtwSPWG5BU6v0UlmupDqhCraX7lpDfajJaF9yo57eoa_WaGLp-XSCyjQi81AUnMgU29vDhH0K-_EYQUSlj-OeTf5f5DCdRIlE3BBGhHO5iBsJS76hwOwiSIFRpyX6xUWdI55c58qD9z5xZRCq4NhA584DpfltQVK5c9rSzXmZ-0rwOR4UqcFqjloKoseFCPrEwtC5JUOTk1aPQ10QG9_TRI0ubTfG6xqrEcnk805v9KDPiaDridCMExAgkln3hu0-_YF3nIW39xYVIFReR75WBdnqz4sppVmR8nXoid7k%3D)
If the Democrats can beat us in November, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can.

[If you chip in just $25 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=c51aad3b4d0746e5825e12bbe6a919ed&_e=CF2ymhuKgeSp-6_nbuJQdIUeNBxgtOpJ1WIKPTqM2vJxhIVX2CsXZG0YNfekHP7HxvCyhUE39W9fTekV_RPdw-7Iz8pfCtX8h7tBq0HTjVpwhKSiyvs51ik7nEO0mLoDY3dtwSPWG5BU6v0UlmupDqhCraX7lpDfajJaF9yo57eoa_WaGLp-XSCyjQi81AUnMgU29vDhH0K-_EYQUSlj-OeTf5f5DCdRIlE3BBGhHO5iBsJS76hwOwiSIFRpyX6xUWdI55c58qD9z5xZRCq4Nu5-eLTZXr1vq5CAi3nvqraUfz5tHi_XGzBBdDpEdyV8RqxPAMwuTPSLudmAOVCyphYYrvU7JG2wwZG5dmzLhXqhBSMzPEW9MjCd6nAZkOC4qtNppK40m8hbn3MJ0WHogj0s8gVAUMJBBoFIxklCG8M%3D)
I'm humbly asking you, as someone who has been fighting my entire life, will you help me out?

Thank you,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: A senator’s job is to represent people, not rule over them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley’s obsession with controlling our lives is weird, it’s creepy, and it’s sure as hell not his job.
#
Peter,
**I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley because I believe a senator’s job is to represent people — not to rule over them or tell them how to live.**
That’s not what Josh Hawley believes. This guy wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, in your workplace, and your body. He even wants to decide if and how you build a family.
**It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it sure as hell isn’t his job.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44163?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44163?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6)**
I got into this race because I want to fundamentally change who has power in our country, so everyday Missourians can finally make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives without some corrupt politician like Hawley getting in the way.
**That’s why I’m fighting to end the filibuster, codify Roe v. Wade, restore abortion rights, and protect reproductive freedom in our country FOREVER.**
**[Will you help me get it done by rushing a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign today? The national insiders backing Hawley are doing everything they can to tear me down, but I know this grassroots team is ready to fight back, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip this U.S. Senate seat on November 5.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44163?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44164?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44163?refcode=em20240302-4957&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4957%2E614464%2EYnubX6)

| Peter,

Thank you for being part of the Emerge community and helping us surpass our February fundraising goal. We’re overwhelmed by the support of this grassroots team and your commitment to electing Democratic women up and down the ballot.

**As the election cycle heats up, we have so much more work ahead of us.** We know that to deliver for all our communities, we must bring change to the face of power in those systems.

_**When we recruit, train, and elect Democratic women at every level of government, we elevate fresh perspectives and real community priorities to the center of our politics.**_ That’s why we’re already building a pipeline of powerhouse Democratic women who will fight for our communities in 2024 and beyond.

Thank you for being a part of this movement, and here’s to keeping up our strong momentum in March!

With gratitude,

Team Emerge

clean_body: | | | Peter, is there ANYTHING I can say to get you to donate $5 today to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? What if I told you that CNN ranks incumbent Jacky Rosen as one of the most vulnerable senators in the country? body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/lDlwEOYmn_s-f7eaauZvpw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnxj_uP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9sbW1fc3RhZ2VfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmQ5YW9paFFuZ0pXRktpdVNqMmhrRkNHV3dJJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJkOWFvaWhRbmdKV0ZLaXVTajJoa0ZDR1d3SSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yZDlhb2loUW5nSldGS2l1U2oyaGtGQ0dXd0lXA3NwY0IKZePuuuNlIC7o1lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter, I had to take a second between acts here at MadSoul Fest to let you know how UNREAL this day has already been!!!

Lin-Manuel Miranda just left the stage and the crowd is HYPE. He got everybody so fired up about the impact each of us can have when we’re registered and actually go out to VOTE.

Really, everybody who’s spoken today – AOC, David Hogg – has made that same impact. **_We’re energizing a true movement,_ and when I’ve looked out at everybody in the crowd today, I see the blue wave, live in person.**

But here’s the best part: It doesn’t stop here. Peter...this is just the _beginning._

**Today’s festival is one step along a YEAR-ROUND journey of organizing, mobilizing, and turnout. Only so many people can attend this event. But if we do this right... the energy we start _here_ can spread NATIONWIDE. ** [**_Peter, the spotlight is on us. What are we gonna do with it? I’m fighting to organize a new generation of voters, and deliver the future we deserve. If you’re in, too, can you donate $27 right now, before MadSoul ends, to keep this momentum growing _every_ day?? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/lDlwEOYmn_s-f7eaauZvpw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnxj_uP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9sbW1fc3RhZ2VfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmQ5YW9paFFuZ0pXRktpdVNqMmhrRkNHV3dJJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJkOWFvaWhRbmdKV0ZLaXVTajJoa0ZDR1d3SSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yZDlhb2loUW5nSldGS2l1U2oyaGtGQ0dXd0lXA3NwY0IKZePuuuNlIC7o1lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/bUm32HPk2DblVZiKT58Uig~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnxj_uP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9sbW1fc3RhZ2VfZW4mYW1vdW50PTEwJmNkbWM9MmQ5YW9paFFuZ0pXRktpdVNqMmhrRkNHV3dJJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJkOWFvaWhRbmdKV0ZLaXVTajJoa0ZDR1d3SSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yZDlhb2loUW5nSldGS2l1U2oyaGtGQ0dXd0lXA3NwY0IKZePuuuNlIC7o1lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

clean_body: | ~ Peter, I had to take a second between acts here at MadSoul Fest to let you know how UNREAL this day has already been!!! Lin-Manuel Miranda just left the stage and the crowd is HYPE. He got everybody so fired up about the impact each of us can have when we’re registered and actually go out to VOTE. Really, everybody who’s spoken today – AOC, David Hogg – has made that same impact. We’re energizing a true movement, and when I’ve looked out at everybody in the crowd today, I see the blue wave, live in person. But here’s the best part: It doesn’t stop here. Peter...this is just the beginning. Today’s festival is one step along a YEAR-ROUND journey of organizing, mobilizing, and turnout. Only so many people can attend this event. But if we do this right... the energy we start here can spread NATIONWIDE. ~ | | | ~ ~ | ~ | ~~ ** Back to it – more to come!! Thank you!! – Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to keep this seat for poor and working-class people. body:
I am proud to co-sponsor the Access to Family Building Act to protect the right to access IVF under federal law. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80181744/458612702/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240302_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVkYWI0Mi1mMGQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfFiclxI2iN2azQVS21RhOpUp4N-lfYlKwEkpX7yWJU=&emci=895dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8c5dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=252045)
---
Last week, the Alabama State Supreme Court ruled that frozen embryos are children — effectively banning in vitro fertilization, or IVF, in the state. **Several medical providers in Alabama have already started pausing IVF treatments.** Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was only the start. From trying to take abortion pill mifepristone off the market to banning IVF, Republicans are attacking reproductive rights at every turn. **But the GOP has no right to make healthcare decisions for women — including when or how they start a family.** **[That’s why I am proud to co-sponsor the _Access to Family Building Act_ to protect the right to access IVF and other assisted reproductive technology services under federal law. Will you add your voice to this fight by becoming a citizen co-sponsor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80181745/458612703/1175734929?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240302_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVkYWI0Mi1mMGQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfFiclxI2iN2azQVS21RhOpUp4N-lfYlKwEkpX7yWJU=&emci=895dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8c5dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80181746/458612704/1175734929?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240302_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzVkYWI0Mi1mMGQ4LWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfFiclxI2iN2azQVS21RhOpUp4N-lfYlKwEkpX7yWJU=&emci=895dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8c5dab42-f0d8-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=252045)

About 1 in 8 couples across the country struggle with fertility. I won’t stand idly by while Republicans try to take away their right to begin or grow a family. Thank you for speaking out alongside me.
— Martin
